name: Katie Porter
subject: What will happen to my House seat?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23400%2E3422442%2ECz_i70)
Derek,
I'm not one for BS, so I'm going to give you the straight answer to a question I've been getting:
_What will happen to your House seat? Isn't it an easy flip for Republicans?_
**Derek, I'm confident Democrats will hold this seat.** This district was carried by President Biden by over ten points in 2020. It was particularly competitive last November because it was a tough year for Democrats across the country. But in a presidential year, and with this Senate race increasing turnout amongst Democrats, we have a clear path to victory.
Here's more good news: Our 2022 Republican opponent is running again, and should he advance to the general, the Democrat in the race will have a big advantage. **We spent millions last year showing Orange County voters what this guy is about** —he's an extremist and a lawbreaking lobbyist, as our many TV ads pointed out.⬇️
Thanks to the support of grassroots donors, I've been able to win three congressional races here in Orange County. The millions of dollars and many hours we've put into mail, digital, TV ads, organizing, and door-knocking don't just translate to wins every other November. **They translate into changing the political lean of an entire area, and make it easier for Democrats to win for decades to come.**
**Democrats can take back control of the House by flipping just a few seats, and California could make all the difference.** I know how to campaign in tough areas, and I love doing it. California's next Senator will have the opportunity to **guide Democrats' messaging and priorities, and can help us win up and down the ballot in purple areas in and outside of California.**
**[Can you join our team? Like every race I've run, I'm not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so every contribution from supporters makes a real difference.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230522-1?refcode=EMAH22_1_SEA_20230522_V1_F&refcode2=23400_3422442_Cz_i70&akid=23400%2E3422442%2ECz_i70)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230522-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH22_1_SEA_20230522_V1_F&refcode2=23400_3422442_Cz_i70&akid=23400%2E3422442%2ECz_i70)**
Thanks for reading,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH22_1_SEA_20230522_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23400_3422442_Cz_i70&akid=23400%2E3422442%2ECz_i70)**

name: Patty Murray
subject: Parents, I've got your back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Peter – I'm a mom and grandma, so I know firsthand the kind of stress working families can face to find and afford child care close to home – and it’s only getting more challenging.

In the last few decades, the cost of child care has increased 220% – with most families paying close to 20% of their income on child care. This is in addition to providers struggling to find and retain staff because of low wages for child care workers. It’s a crisis–and one that’s hurting our economy, too.
That's why I just introduced a bill to reduce the cost of child care and lift a huge weight off parents' shoulders. **[_Will you sign my petition now to support affordable child care?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63674932/407610281/2012411429?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk26-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjIyNGRhOS0wMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EgAETnNm7p2QCNPhuEL8iKy-vAK5LcU_gHoUKEQR6hk=&emci=d2bcb69d-a2f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=76224da9-01f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
**The Child Care for Working Families Act would support families and our economy by:**
* Making sure families spend no more than 7% of their income on child care.
* Supporting increased wages for child care workers.
* Helping keep parents in the workforce by offering free child care to families with low incomes.
* Supporting opening new centers in child care deserts.

I've been working to pass affordable child care for years, and am committed to getting this across the finish line – but I need you to stand with me today. **[_Will you sign my petition now to show your support for affordable child care?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63674933/407610300/2012411429?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk26-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjIyNGRhOS0wMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EgAETnNm7p2QCNPhuEL8iKy-vAK5LcU_gHoUKEQR6hk=&emci=d2bcb69d-a2f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=76224da9-01f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)**
| | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63674934/407610326/2012411429?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk26-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjIyNGRhOS0wMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EgAETnNm7p2QCNPhuEL8iKy-vAK5LcU_gHoUKEQR6hk=&emci=d2bcb69d-a2f6-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=76224da9-01f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=13116610)

– Patty Murray

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.05.20_B1_Urgent-Request_Main-90o_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.05.20_B1_Urgent-Request_Main-90o_logo] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.05.20_B1_Urgent-Request_Main-90o_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.05.20_B1_Urgent-Request_Main-90o_logo]Hey folks, Today, a role model, champion for Delaware and a good friend of mine announced after 46 years in public service, he's retiring after his term is up in 2024.
Rep. Lisa Blunt Rochester and Sen. Tom Carper [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K0zaXqlR6UKT7uO6nAF7gw2]It would be impossible to even partially capture the accomplishments that Senator Carper has had in his over four decades of service to our state and nation – the list is as long as it is impressive.
My team and I are collecting signatures to thank Senator Carper for everything he’s done for the people of Delaware and beyond. Will you add your name to thank him for his dedication and unwavering commitment to public service? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K0zaXqlR6UKT7uO6nAF7gw2]
ADD MY NAME: THANK SEN. CARPER >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K0zaXqlR6UKT7uO6nAF7gw2]
I first met then-Congressman Carper at a town hall meeting. I was holding my son on my hip – and even though I didn't know it yet – I was pregnant with my daughter. I went up to him and asked him a question, and we started talking about all of the issues affecting our state. That's when he encouraged me to apply for an internship in his office.
After that, I became a full-time staffer, handling constituent services, and I even had the honor of following him to Dover when he became our state's 71st Governor.
If it weren't for Senator Carper encouraging me to apply for an internship all those years ago, I may never have run for office. My experience isn't unique. Almost every Delawarean can point to a time when Tom took the time to get to know them and encourage them. So thank you, Tom, for everything you've done for me, the people of Delaware, and the country. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K0zaXqlR6UKT7uO6nAF7gw2]
ADD MY NAME: THANK SEN. CARPER >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/K0zaXqlR6UKT7uO6nAF7gw2]
Together in service,
Lisa Blunt Rochester
Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC 'Red to Blue' program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers.
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbr-em-may2023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2023.05.20_B1_Urgent-Request_Main-90o_bio&refcode2=biobox&recurring=1]

Wilmington, DE 19810
United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: Join us and Spokane County Treasurer Michael Baumgartner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Come see Michael at our Spokane Heart of the Party and our 46th Annual Dinner! | | | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f5b822bb98&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter,

I am thrilled to announce that Spokane County Treasurer Michael Baumgartner, a steadfast Republican leader with an impressive record of public service, will be joining us at two of our upcoming events: As the Master of Ceremonies at our 46th Annual Dinner in Bellevue, and as a special guest at our 5th Annual 'Heart of the Party' Reception in Spokane! Before becoming the Spokane County Treasurer, Michael Baumgartner served as a Washington State Senator from the 6th Legislative District, most notably serving as the Vice-Chair of the important Ways and Means Committee.

Before his time in elected office, Michael was a US State Department Officer in Iraq and a counternarcotics advisor in Afghanistan. His global perspective, formed by extensive travel to over 80 countries, makes him an invaluable asset to our party. Michael is a public servant through and through and we appreciate his strong dedication to our state, country, and Republican Party.

I hope you are just as excited as I am to join fellow Republicans and Michael at one, or both, of these upcoming events! Please click on the links below to find more details and register today!
---
|
---
| 🌟 **46th Annual Washington State Republican Party Dinner:** Michael emceed our 2022 Annual Dinner and was such a crowd favorite that we had to bring him back again this year! If you missed last years' dinner - be sure to come to this one! This event promises to be one of our best yet as we honor the outstanding leadership of Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers, and welcome Congressman Burgess Owens (UT-04) as a keynote speaker.

_**Event Details:**_
**Date:** Friday, October 27th
**Time:** 6 PM | VIP & General Receptions, 7 PM | Dinner
**Location:** Hyatt Regency Bellevue, Bellevue, WA
**Tickets:**[Click here!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=459aa1dd41&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Get Tickets Now! [46th Annual Dinner]](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=3f0b960698&e=6a281f566d "Get Tickets Now! \[46th Annual Dinner\]")
---
| 🌟 **Heart of the Party - Spokane:** We invite you to join us, alongside Spokane County Treasurer Michael Baumgartner and Congresswoman Cathy McMorris Rodgers, at our 5th Annual 'Heart of the Party' Reception in Spokane. This event is your opportunity to engage with local elected officials, candidates, and fellow Republicans from the Spokane Area at the Beacon Hill Event Center.

_**Event Details:**_
**Date:** Tuesday, June 27
**Time:** 6 PM - 8 PM (VIP Roundtable at 5 PM)
**Location:** Beacon Hill Event Center, Spokane, WA
**Tickets:** [Click here!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=1f3b251400&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Get Tickets Now! [Spokane Heart of the Party]](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a9c6bf74b3&e=6a281f566d "Get Tickets Now! \[Spokane Heart of the Party\]")
---
| [Join us at a Heart of the Party Reception Near You!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=10de5f0494&e=6a281f566d "Join us at a Heart of the Party Reception Near You!")
---
| | These events give us an opportunity to celebrate what makes our party great, but they are also very important to helping fund the important work of the WSRP as we try to maintain one of the largest field programs in the country, reach new voters with our messaging, and implement new programs like Ballot Collection that will bring our party to victory this year and next. Don't miss this chance to connect, celebrate, and work together towards a stronger Washington State.

In partnership with you,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/michael-baumgartner-announcement?e=6a281f566d)
---

| Peter,

Tonight is the most important deadline of the campaign so far, and we only have 3 hours left to hit our fundraising goal. With New York's 8-1 matching program, New York residents can make a huge difference with just one small donation.

[**I know we're up for the challenge -- chip in today before time runs out!**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=2bde064193&e=2de202398d)

| Our June 27th Primary Election is a little over a month away, and from here on out, we have to make every day count. Hitting tonight's fundraising goal will help us make sure we have the resources we need to make calls, knock doors, and continue to deliver for our community.

We have a lot of work ahead of us, but I have never doubted the strength of our people-powered movement. Against all odds, we've achieved huge wins for our community -- now it's time to do it again.

[**Are you with us? Donate now and remember that your donation will be matched 8-1 by the city!**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=907a3d96ad&e=2de202398d)

Thank you,
Carlina

[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=c20a2bec58524aafb8fcfe6215182a64&_t=SUZL4BiYt-L2LBOG-kGb2MbohlXSYJrmqj-1Zj3eo6ZHJ9e33DE0zDTSz2CfkuxwQyKbv1Sc-pS0UhuXGlZRY6qLo35a_ga1vbRKpv9KzSs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=c20a2bec58524aafb8fcfe6215182a64&_t=SUZL4BiYt-L2LBOG-kGb2MbohlXSYJrmqj-1Zj3eo6ZHJ9e33DE0zDTSz2CfkuxwQyKbv1Sc-pS0UhuXGlZRY6qLo35a_ga1vbRKpv9KzSs%3D)

| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c20a2bec58524aafb8fcfe6215182a64&_e=WGh-vRzXkcbznNj5FBfztErgMG8e29JgPZIRLfaZf9UlnpoP_Qlt6QJx9Uak4ZQ0l6P93evMdh6aJkCSsaFhWdA0MQOX-bWQ9_NZF5VhL4Utv11nEY01L_oNv1OPcHjrR4jOwHmj1069QsIatMk7Dzp3pfMfnT3vUeETzJbQv2DP2etCpd1jUj2fACeRC7EMg3FA3SzKzfEwv1iPyldkdgI65YIEci-IZbOI_o1YxpnF1sIwo3cC-_KR4S50-sXsvQHZ-sQP7lHUd70Rka0lWvqN3yy5Aae7Er8www9F3DqKDQQ3QHhcSGNGsvTE5m-NxFSxVjIw6jzrGJueZ7LYK5cFbmGQNAZZlRhMJKgwUderPnIri64zOufO3_ktQU1zh3bxfU-sT2OpfAe7ytBL3P48ppZLKJbcikdfk_QrEydQ9cn7BXY53n-armThpUng)
Peter,

I am sending you a different type of political email - _mostly because I am not building your typical political campaign._

When I launched my campaign for President, I knew that for us to win on November 5, 2024, we needed to change the way conservatives reach Americans–that's why I am looking to recruit founding members of our new cultural movement to revive the American Dream.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c20a2bec58524aafb8fcfe6215182a64&_e=WGh-vRzXkcbznNj5FBfztErgMG8e29JgPZIRLfaZf9UlnpoP_Qlt6QJx9Uak4ZQ0l6P93evMdh6aJkCSsaFhWdA0MQOX-bWQ9_NZF5VhL4Utv11nEY01L_oNv1OPcHjrR4jOwHmj1069QsIatMk7Dzp3pfMfnT3vUeETzJbQv2DP2etCpd1jUj2fACeRC7EMg3FA3SzKzfEwv1iPyldkdgI65YIEci-IZbOI_o1YxpnF1sIwo3cC-_KR4S50-sXsvQHZ-sQP7lHUd70Rka0lWvqN3yy5Aae7Er8www9F3Dos7wh57irkHPhEretPJ3T3P_6i-X5imR9Zq9JhG2b7yFHCx7qmfoT4LLe-NUOijoRBFAkT3b9iZYkuSw0Vx8QqIPqJSx8XS2fzMg0zqlAesMOXJ_1lyUoJ3oClcvitMd2xbJUo8rNVuMEgiBe6QKqP)
I am running for President to restore the voices of everyday citizens. It's time to stand up to the ruling aristocracy. They try to divide and conquer, **but that won't work if we stay united.**

How do we start? Bottom-up, grassroots support. **[A $1 donation will help us take back the Oval Office from politicians and put it back in the people's hands.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c20a2bec58524aafb8fcfe6215182a64&_e=WGh-vRzXkcbznNj5FBfztErgMG8e29JgPZIRLfaZf9UlnpoP_Qlt6QJx9Uak4ZQ0l6P93evMdh6aJkCSsaFhWdA0MQOX-bWQ9_NZF5VhL4Utv11nEY01L_oNv1OPcHjrR4jOwHmj1069QsIatMk7Dzp3pfMfnT3vUeETzJbQv2DP2etCpd1jUj2fACeRC7EMg3FA3SzKzfEwv1iPyldkdgI65YIEci-IZbOI_o1YxpnF1sIwo3cC-_KR4S50-sXsvQHZ-sQP7lHUd70Rka0lWvqN3yy5Aae7Er8www9F3DrkHL8x3nPAvsMnNWZ7bmz0BRn402rT2wdRP9fnRb1tGIeo9lg8eKm9IkXq5MG1xJ1sDA47wVyZbXy-2PRxkKTF7jzKxhHh3zvtRI5XYcVSmFvUHSAh0BMNDGWLPz1q4Fl_LYJJMuYvcXxMz6a1AVk1)**

Change starts today. Thanks for joining this movement.

For The American Dream,

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c20a2bec58524aafb8fcfe6215182a64&_e=WGh-vRzXkcbznNj5FBfztErgMG8e29JgPZIRLfaZf9UlnpoP_Qlt6QJx9Uak4ZQ0l6P93evMdh6aJkCSsaFhWdA0MQOX-bWQ9_NZF5VhL4Utv11nEY01L_oNv1OPcHjrR4jOwHmj1069QsIatMk7Dzp3pfMfnT3vUeETzJbQv2DP2etCpd1jUj2fACeRC7EMg3FA3SzKzfEwv1iPyldkdgI65YIEci-IZbOI_o1YxpnF1sIwo3cC-_KR4S50-sXsvQHZ-sQP7lHUd70Rka0lWvqN3yy5Aae7Er8www9F3Dr9wlVdw3r3rdH_2NoMtNrIbz-dol7kvaoQBpVv5d5AXZgSvX6NuiYQFeMlDZcCFClzoTKMT2EVOPiL8yD5zPSEsgOhX_xdy0wcYuQiq9mmbRWZbbwZCz1hkFLkqIuF8r3kjGC3JOKgr9l6ikNUJzmL)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. To build this new movement, I need people just like you to sign on to be a founding member. **[That means a little bit of money (as little as $1) from as many people who are looking for a change. Join Team Vivek today to become a founding member!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c20a2bec58524aafb8fcfe6215182a64&_e=WGh-vRzXkcbznNj5FBfztErgMG8e29JgPZIRLfaZf9UlnpoP_Qlt6QJx9Uak4ZQ0l6P93evMdh6aJkCSsaFhWdA0MQOX-bWQ9_NZF5VhL4Utv11nEY01L_oNv1OPcHjrR4jOwHmj1069QsIatMk7Dzp3pfMfnT3vUeETzJbQv2DP2etCpd1jUj2fACeRC7EMg3FA3SzKzfEwv1iPyldkdgI65YIEci-IZbOI_o1YxpnF1sIwo3cC-_KR4S50-sXsvQHZ-sQP7lHUd70Rka0lWvqN3yy5Aae7Er8www9F3DojmDiQNhYyRQIrIkyVagzBULgEWPhudjclU0VPeuu5rBAIY8E7dSn4SODDDInjLQa8wLGKH-TpMJPwWG3jcBy5s_zEtouAKQWmqEW3a7OHinWgkmYetMPWdbvgBt4Z2dNzwYNcfC17AvFfjiiO9ENO)**

| [** BECOME A
FOUNDING MEMBER ->**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c20a2bec58524aafb8fcfe6215182a64&_e=WGh-vRzXkcbznNj5FBfztErgMG8e29JgPZIRLfaZf9UlnpoP_Qlt6QJx9Uak4ZQ0l6P93evMdh6aJkCSsaFhWdA0MQOX-bWQ9_NZF5VhL4Utv11nEY01L_oNv1OPcHjrR4jOwHmj1069QsIatMk7Dzp3pfMfnT3vUeETzJbQv2DP2etCpd1jUj2fACeRC7EMg3FA3SzKzfEwv1iPyldkdgI65YIEci-IZbOI_o1YxpnF1sIwo3cC-_KR4S50-sXsvQHZ-sQP7lHUd70Rka0lWvqN3yy5Aae7Er8www9F3DrjeZR_4IR4ze9ZZDD12CsuSWlfwgeQWrFw-5tvNC2PPISvqGzgUID5URsATYAO0FFTY5c_6falWhIRAHVYqATb6IXu82f7Y0BDCqvexlaoGRUfxa5hzQ9dvEEhO-iff7IDzrSj7IdQlDp11x9XTOeH)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c20a2bec58524aafb8fcfe6215182a64&_e=WGh-vRzXkcbznNj5FBfztErgMG8e29JgPZIRLfaZf9UlnpoP_Qlt6QJx9Uak4ZQ0l6P93evMdh6aJkCSsaFhWdA0MQOX-bWQ9_NZF5VhL4Utv11nEY01L_oNv1OPcHjrR4jOwHmj1069QsIatMk7Dzp3pfMfnT3vUeETzJbQv2DP2etCpd1jUj2fACeRC7EMg3FA3SzKzfEwv1iPyldkdgI65YIEci-IZbOI_o1YxpnF1sIwo3cC-_KR4S50-sXsvQHZ-sQP7lHUd70Rka0lWvqN3yy5Aae7Er8www9F3Dr2hIESgcUV5WIyH3uaLRCxFZseloYqOGGqwD8Z1VmIy2tzxxko_DsUR_UBjaVU-bOJktwATGoTICqud-6OtLQWZzW3SdQkKTcLjrX0m-mq2dgoMARqWF9oLhDb3fjC3dAlKcpn_64uZmk6LiQb3rQw)

---

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znrerfcgrbat0et3ca555bk354bgq1vdpst1snao_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znh9dhljmut4l7tmkva6qivvp9r5tuvr1a4oa338_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36c9h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh4q36pugv04pkm7ues4r5dtblvqg9t61s5ov458_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z45dhvnuuktc28luah9ne2nte1tiqu6i1bip5p18_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdhb3i0qc2c1vrgqekmcmtrhjp4c3f667vfe7qg0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7gcnu61fpu9bb3okfcg6tiaaujkjgehvnkcrkg0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36c9h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbaf9viakjurfs33ncrj1p3790sujpeii4rs4c00_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36c9h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk6g6frdsqsitbv9nc3e1v4n42mtdmbdhlj112p8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36c9h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhl2kci5hhcetcb7ke82kribpac03mbkcg4tcv8o_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36c9h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeg9sjf2ftiu9cbdo1gfs9oicbrr52ovoaeitgr8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36c9h2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: We need to hear from a fresh voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
If we want to make the debate stage in August, we need to secure unique donors to our grassroots campaign.

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z13qpe8s5i4d3sbcnee9t36uo9pjhb7io3792cng_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36cph2bs)
Fellow American -

I have a clear vision for how to win the White House in 2024: **a grassroots, bottom-up campaign made of people just like you.**

We're about to hit a major campaign milestone - 35,000 unique donors in just months of campaigning. Unlike my opponents who have years of politicking under their belts, we started with NOTHING and have built this movement.

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zablo8ujn5281jl4apjii64h0v6e5jsvv4kt5a2g_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36cph2bs)
So here's what I am asking of you today: **[will you be one of the unique donors I need to get a prime spot on the debate stage? Make it a small donation - every dollar makes a huge difference when it comes to planning our "Great Uprising."](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zri4j8tt0nomo7v2f2vdee7j8vikoqj3m6spgpj8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36cph2bs)**

As I have traveled the country, I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually, truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

**[Be a part of our movement, Fellow American, by becoming our 35,000th donor!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0e5tgic90gnq4fsjlmog370m2sm2aqhi2e5mi80_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36cph2bs)**

Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z056e6npi9364e0s0bh92ride3agc8lkgei10k80_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o36cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Don’t let this classic disappear forever
body:
Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze0g95drseaqnrtuvqradn3jfp9u578682jfcj2g_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o31c5h2bs)
---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2cti708bo37s3s3jmdvgav5ehcj004jokocqic0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o31c5h2bs) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z72a2j92kj3eelmbu12i6kulva4gddsijcsndptg_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o31c5h2bs).
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvcqik9vmc6dv0hbhoc0s6l1spotkho9a5afeef0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o31c5h2bs)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgbm6po7bd57p0r37fmcdlkb576vpvd4pp1k0br8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o31c5h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6fut5rjgq443j8uc6csk8vcfte7eq0n7v8ldrqo_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3j66o31c5h2bs)
---

name: Valeria, American Federation for Children
subject: I used to work for teachers unions. Now I lead school choice.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children
body:
How did I go from the teacher's unions to school choice? Let me tell you my story.

| | | _****_
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhra4hr5tlt8b10trut6hfk995vk339opdpdchog_)
---
| | Friend, I’m Valeria Gurr, a Senior Fellow here at the American Federation for Children. **But I used to work for the teachers unions.**
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zse7k0mm2bf04hqmmnhtgfh99jqtk38nruqdn8cg_)
---
| | [**WATCH MY RECENT INTERVIEW**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaquos6roub4mgk2vs4uplpa7dpie0fftd1iooqo_)
---
| | **How did I go from the teachers unions to school choice?** Let me tell you my story.

As a first-generation Chilean American, I came to the United States seeking endless opportunities.

I was from a disadvantaged and not well-connected family, which means I grew up in the one-size-fits-all public school system.

**My education suffered as a result.** I struggled in large classroom settings, was often bullied, and found myself stuck in an education system that didn't work for me because of our financial situation.

I realized my story was not uncommon and recognized that **the surest way to attain the American Dream is to gain access to a good education. **

I thought the best way to help fix the education system and the next generation of students attain the American Dream was by working for organizations that support education and teachers.

**But, I quickly learned that this teachers union didn’t have the best interests of students or even teachers in mind.** They seemed more concerned with money and maintaining the status quo of the broken system.

That’s when I knew if I was going to make a difference, I had to make a change.

I founded the **Federación Americana Para Los Niños** , which brings information about school choice to Hispanic communities and joined the American Federation for Children as a Senior Fellow.

After leaving the teachers union and joining the school choice revolution, I never looked back.

**[_Friend, now I’m asking YOU to join the school choice revolution by pledging a donation of $20.23 or an amount of your choice today >>>_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0vlp9nk397g70l2u6geks3ih3vkui5ss09c3irg_)**
---
| | [**JOIN THE SCHOOL CHOICE REVOLUTION: $20.23**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zogh3m4d5umdj2ggkukn279ticf45im48r21fsdg_)
---
| | Thank you,
Valeria Gurr
Senior Fellow
American Federation for Children
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Paid for by American Federation for Children

Contributions or gifts to the American Federation of Children are not tax deductible as charitable contributions. |
| American Federation for Children 5950 Berkshire Lane, Suite 325 Dallas, TX 75225 |

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79320%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IU3ul5rQlOUth5uzaVNF%2fQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79320%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IU3ul5rQlOUth5uzaVNF%2fQ&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79321%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hj2vfEgNlT6CMc47lmivZg&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79322%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LWU88pzktEpCkitxMH5xPQ&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79323%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yN3PEy05gG4a2B0HA3AmgA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79324%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9aP7F3Zv%2fTgUGak2qQDCHw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79335%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2x4oLsJtYXtJxwAzCWphzg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79336%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1qySSlfO05GGy6jnLdf9JA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79337%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u31bwr9pX8MjMwSN5bXbeQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79338%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y7euMiHgMvCnhvGBEWYCwA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79339%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kGhbIxXOOLWksUgzJ6tSzw&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79330%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EnmV4eQXw387LYbBt3%2bgKQ&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79331%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dhqDOdU43a7Ef3U%2futhepw&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79332%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oy6ZyLGRwq9sqOqHbGXDNw&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79333%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GegLYnL14OdYYszAFNwnqQ&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It’s time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Great American Update 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314 |

## Speaking In Tongues
---
This **WKND** at [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12497.1.7dcdc54c91109d14d3a34a786b038f00), I addressed the _controversial issue_ of **[Speaking In Tongues](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12498.1.cdff359eff08403ce7e2d2164987450a)**. At [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12499.1.fab9165395c595ba7c7d1e7dea666557), we are going through the **Book of Acts** , _verse by verse_. Therefore, the topic of [Speaking In Tongues](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12500.1.44bc5cf0d3d573a4d0aaab3d8bcc1bb6) is _unavoidable_. In **Acts 2** , when the Spirit came upon the 120 believers in Jerusalem, they began to speak in other tongues and there were two reactions from the people present: **_curious_** & **_critical_**. Not much has changed in 2000 years. When it comes to [Speaking In Tongues](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12501.1.631653bbcc72ad5df363ca3c844d3e2c), there are the **_curious_** and the **_critical_**. In this message, I answer the question if the **Gifts of the Spirit** are still in operation today and what are the **_types_** , **_purposes_** and **_benefits_** of [Speaking In Tongues](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12502.1.8be14e472dcc9259e44027064788869a)? **If you are curious this message will bless you.** Watch [Acts Pt. 6 - Speaking In Tongues](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12503.1.ea2ded6e1884850846f816daefee8744) here: [https://youtube.com/live/_GY2cTfAISg?feature=share](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12504.1.e963fc897701178812abc14f9f78d806) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12505.1.be2acd526862499f66baf6fb51a5a2f2), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12506.1.a532eb93590b492e656c53f0fb02c91a), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12507.1.80c7d798d089f01783a6551eeca3fbb9), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12508.1.eeec16b52e81d6bc746aedb137f35de8), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12509.1.605c457a889b225b436f1e5fbc8081c4), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22001915.12510.1.068426fc121794ba4234ace3fc2ea9d8)). name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Your thoughts on American Education
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs6ikU3DNZ

I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom
are very similar.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os6ikU3DNZ

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Good day,
fellow American.

I'd like
to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very
similar.

Both were
born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing,
raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went
to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college
and now have a four-year degree.

In most
respects, these young women are nearly identical-same background,
grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music
and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that
difference is vital to preserving liberty in America.

The first
young lady learned false narratives about American history in her
K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and
professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and
frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political
correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race,
gender, and class.

Her
teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative
about our nation's history-a narrative that portrays America as
essentially and irredeemably unjust.

Absent
any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these
misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen-echoing what
she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses
this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid,
hateful, and even racist.

Maybe you
know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised-I do too.

What
about the other young lady?

Well, she
received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At
her schools, especially her college, she received an education
that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history
fairly and comprehensively.

She
understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution
because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson,
Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources.

Her
studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of
"oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth
defending.

This
young lady is an informed citizen. She will never be one to go
along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to
consider policies and political debates from a constitutional
perspective.

I ask
you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of
leadership?

You can
tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's
National Survey on the State of American Education using this
secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61834464:s6ikU3DNZ:m:3:2532013465:B74C3F927BFB210259B0ECAFFC230B46:r

This
survey lets you share your views about the state of our country
and how to change course before it's too late.

By
participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of
knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local
level.

The
survey is part of our CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS.

The goal
of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of
knowledgeable Americans who understand:

WHAT the
Constitution says;
HOW it
relates to current issues and events; and
WHY we
must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure.

If this
campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the
Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people
whom our education system failed.

These are
young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who
just didn't receive a proper understanding of American history in
school.

You are
essential to the success of this effort to make America more
knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited
government.

That's
because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach
the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to
10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative
starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights.

And we

clean_body: I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Please see a special message from our sponsor: Good day, fellow American. I'd like to tell you the story of two young women, both of whom are very similar. Both were born in the late 1990s. Both had a very similar upbringing, raised in a two-parent home in a suburban neighborhood. Both went to public elementary and high schools, and both went to college and now have a four-year degree. In most respects, these young women are nearly identical-same background, grew up at the same time, and even had the same tastes in music and books. BUT, there was one significant difference. And that difference is vital to preserving liberty in America. The first young lady learned false narratives about American history in her K-12 education but especially at college. Her teachers and professors cherry-picked "facts" to fit an ideological (and frankly anti-American) agenda. She was taught political correctness and viewed our history through a lens of race, gender, and class. Her teachers gave this young woman a false and dishonest narrative about our nation's history-a narrative that portrays America as essentially and irredeemably unjust. Absent any opposing viewpoints, she believed it and now repeats these misrepresentations daily to anyone who will listen-echoing what she learned in school. And when she's challenged, she dismisses this criticism (and those who hold these viewpoints) as invalid, hateful, and even racist. Maybe you know someone like her. If so, I'm not surprised-I do too. What about the other young lady? Well, she received a complete and unbiased view of our nation's history. At her schools, especially her college, she received an education that covered the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively. She understands the principles and meaning of the Constitution because she has read and understands the writings of Jefferson, Hamilton, and Lincoln, along with many other primary sources. Her studies allowed her to recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth defending. This young lady is an informed citizen. She will never be one to go along with the crowd on any issue, and she urges others to consider policies and political debates from a constitutional perspective. I ask you, which of these young women would YOU prefer in a position of leadership? You can tell us your preference by completing Hillsdale College's National Survey on the State of American Education using this secure link: This survey lets you share your views about the state of our country and how to change course before it's too late. By participating, you will give us a glimpse into the "state of knowledge" in your community that can only come from the local level. The survey is part of our CAMPAIGN FOR INFORMED CITIZENS. The goal of this new campaign we're leading is to build generations of knowledgeable Americans who understand: WHAT the Constitution says; HOW it relates to current issues and events; and WHY we must preserve constitutional principles if liberty is to endure. If this campaign is successful, we will spread knowledge about the Constitution among millions of citizens, especially young people whom our education system failed. These are young people that "educators" either deliberately deceived or who just didn't receive a proper understanding of American history in school. You are essential to the success of this effort to make America more knowledgeable about the principles of liberty and limited government. That's because we're seeking 1,000 people in each state to help us teach the Constitution and its underlying principles of liberty to 10,000,000 Americans in the coming year, and this initiative starts with you-YOUR knowledge and YOUR insights. And we must do this work without ONE PENNY of federal or state taxpayer support, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. Instead, we put our trust in citizens like you who want what's best for the country. So please, share your opinions by completing the National Survey on the State of American Education today. Thank you for reading my email, and I hope you have a wonderful day. For our children, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. Here 's the full story: Congressman Dan Goldman, aka Silverspoon, aka Schiff Jr., is lying when he says I bought and paid for FBI whistleblowers. This is FALSE, and he knows it. Only Adam Schiff could have taught him lying is the best way to make a living. We will not stand idly by. Here is a post that about sums it up: Breaking: Congressman Dan Goldman (D) claims the FBI whistleblowers were bought and paid for by Kash Patel. The reality is the witnesses had their lives destroyed and Patel set up a fund for them to they could feed their families after the FBI suspended them without pay and left them unable to afford groceries... These brave patriots decided to put their lives and careers on the line for their country by exposing the truth about corruption within the FBI. I did not coach them, instruct them to do this, or buy them in any way. They provided critical information to Congress, exposing massive corruption at the FBI. Then, our foundation heard about their bravery and entered the fray. The Kash Foundation, my America-First non-profit organization, helped provide financial assistance through a donation so these patriots wouldn't lose everything after the great sacrifice they made for their country. As President Biden announced on May 11, the COVID-19 public health emergency is over. Since January 2021, COVID-19 deaths have declined by 95% and hospitalizations are down nearly 91%. Globally, COVID-19 deaths are at their lowest levels since the start of the pandemic. And while VA continues to care for Veterans with COVID-19 each and every day, it is important to take this time to reflect on how VA's public servants responded to this national tragedy.

## Weak Economy Drags Biden’s Polling
Only one-third of Americans approve of President Biden's [handling of the economy](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQRb_G7ojwDGC7oHhNurx2S2uAIWGFwbJZR_n7VVJvee9pjs7XbblRyqnc_9PKtsW6kG_p5EVqASgAF-iDjczA2LMdzKQmhdNs-oc1JINCVnLWNDoZKY5jAMWspVNjwD5ZkIBSAw4SB6Uv6NA7N4fRzyxnbTolOaRW98t3TaU9OOZXPXm_-Lr22T5a244O_3Vw7eBKW-Hn8UbvsbfkM39uUeruxVZzFi4FLoK2ba8nZcG-lrq-xP2nHAIRyQOTcTBNkcAPbJi8liAjaq373YbtmXJOhxk7Je8rpfwxaX-H-Q0AAP__vitj6g), according to a recent poll. Even less--24%--say that the national economy is headed in the right direction. The poor numbers represent a bleak outlook for the President's campaign for a second term, and they come as he faces a debt ceiling crisis. Meetings with Speaker McCarthy haven't yet produced a compromise, and the threat of a [default on federal debt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL3OGyEQAJ_mrsPiWH6OgiKNO6dNeeJnsTfiwAJky28fOfVXjqYZzZ_bcfNUqN5_-xPdzO3wcdILD66YACbgEGtyGVEgrOg2vctdwm71-nBaB5DK5pQRAmo02kY0u_bWbwAKVnKCC-BKwMZhk-oCAWIINplokVulF8kx0Wz98rdRnQ_M5dNe2C-xnWtxjzmfY4Ffi7gu4uqfFd_jq77QJ8WCi7gmDJMVOmmy2Oq94xjs3XpJDGOr7fywjhHHoFZZoISVKZGyBoU27DbLsGljNqNz3JOymDNfu0vPN5VCQ5tF8vvpqfxPmj8f-hcAAP__muNnlg) looms behind the inability to solve the spending disagreement. Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen wrote a letter to Congress yesterday, stating that the government may not be able to pay its bills as early as June 1.
## Suspected Killer Quiet in Court
Bryan Kohberger stood silent at [his arraignment](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0Ltu7CAUheGnwR0W3oCxC4rTuJvTprS4bNskDIyAGctvH02UMt0nrWbp_7itNxNiSPt_c0fdtrwa18ILVyYpcAp8hc7rDRGQd6iHcRKT4NM8doeehXEwj2rgUqnNDlZ54NxLDzipYRq7oIEBZxL4wPggZM8td9bOXrkZ2SxHIhj60HLpP3NI7cAtXvmFpXf53kV9tPaohP8jsBBYzvPsk3UJz_reCSxvElielf4qeHNk6nKMuCOt7ekxtUprNFdIO63P-kDXqC2XSfQrHxbLjoVWbNSUYsKe0NPikpmkFKIr2j_OEGOooyKC7XcT4s-19nep7wAAAP__FR9scw) yesterday. He's charged with murdering four students at the University of Idaho last fall, and [he chose](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz79ugzAQgPGnMVuQOf_BDB66eEvXjsicj3CVjSOwgvr2VTtn_6RPv6_7fI-ceX98xkK-rXWO2PhFszQ3UDdQM3TJr0RAqiM_WKedVm6y3eZXkpHSgM6YaUJcrSXUzkZcxrRoSB17kKCkATVINWjTq0XhskxpxInkZKzQkhK3evTflfe20Zp_6ouOHmvpst9ae55CfQgIAsJ1XT2nuNWzxUZniftfJiDsdJ0CQq4Ys4CABxcSEOLRGDPBaKx2Tg_91kruDp-eF-fMpx2Flo8SOf_v2nv9bwAAAP__RONb9Q) to have his defense attorney speak for him in Latah County district court--with the exception of saying "yes" when asked if he understood each charge. The quadruple homicide in Moscow, ID, dominated [headlines](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAUAL8Gb0TwMLYZGLqwpWtHC8Nz_BoCESau_PdVOnc-6XS6r-t89ZQo3z79A21by-xDowNnoTkoDmqGLtoVEVB1aOUw9VOvJjN0mxURpRdeaqGEGfsJpcZJDzCZQa7Gjx1ZEKCEBiWFkr2-qEWFZTFxDAaF0QPrBUZqpV6-C-W24ZrOcmC9hPLokt1ae-5MfTBwDFw-n2Vvb8TAvcUMnNAMnBwZOB_Ca8fIX5kOrDu1k5eVU_Rb4XdKCStf6ukzv5dtwXrDyilHCg0jA9dVG58_lBLtw8h6cXt4Sn8V7f8pvwEAAP__8v1iIw) last November as it spilled over into a manhunt. The trial is set to begin on October 2nd.
## Presidential Betting Markets
Tim Scott [announced](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7GO6yAQRb8Gd1hkBrApKF7jLq_d0iIwTmaFTWSP4t2_X2Xr7a50pXN0Pq7zNXHl7f4_rRRlaXPKwi-ajdOAGnCGrsSFCAg7ihc_2tHiGHz3iH7MkKksPlgY7DLkFIJ1HtBkHNHmjiMYQOMALwYv1vV4w3y7hTLkQCY4r6yhwtL2_rPxJg9a6nd70d7ntnY1PkSeh8J_CiYF03meffridrxfBdObrWAy7r1BwSS86iM3EQ0GrH7udHChTThVTZWycNu6PZbnybXy4QdlzX1NXH918nf9TwAAAP__c-1ZWg) his run for president yesterday, and Ron DeSantis is rumored to be announcing this week, so we thought you'd be interested in what the betting markets have to say about who will win the Republican nomination and inevitably face President Biden. Here are the top five betting favorites according to [PredictIt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DuOpDAQgOHTmMzIlM0rcLAJWW-wSYfIj6KpXWMjU9tobj-aiecAv_Trez7Wh6NE-fXbHWh5K6sLTG9cVS9BS9ArNNFuiIC6QdsNk5mMnuah2e2MvsPgNzPN2xSHYZzGELAbUaEZfQcNWVCgVQ-6U7ozfau9Dt7PcQwzqrkfhFEYiUtt_xbKvOOWPsobaxvK0SS7M5-X0L8ELAKW-77bs2KkwMRtqS8By-HqP-RLwBKRHSUBy6h6LWB57kXelJK8KUveUYICI__g-d8nCi7Ls-JFETOTSzKXg7JjKrmpNp5fIV3DKIx6HY7S9w__zPMZAAD__58tZ-Y).
1. Trump
2. DeSantis
3. Scott
4. Haley
5. Pence

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Corporate plastic manufacturers need to stop putting profit over our health
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **The plastic industry is threatening our food, water, and air. Help stop the plastic apocalypse and protect our planet: donate $27 now.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785832?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785833?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785834?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785835?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Loggerhead sea turtles. Hawaiian monk seals. Steller sea lions. These are just three of the **_many_ ENDANGERED species dying off at the hands of the plastic industry.** They are found choked to death or with bellies full of plastic. But the plastic industry has no plans to slow down its deadly dealings. [**The plastic apocalypse is getting worse the longer we wait. Act now and donate $27 to help us reach our $6,230 goal for our oceans, people, and the planet.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785836?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
The harm doesn’t stop with marine life. From our food to our water to the _very air we breathe,_ plastic now touches every part of our lives. The average person consumes a credit card’s worth of plastic _every week._ But Big Oil and the plastic industry continue to line their pockets at the expense of people, communities, wildlife, and the planet.
**Now, Formosa Plastics has plans to build a monstrous petrochemical complex -- one the size of 14 football fields.** The plant would be catastrophic for people and marine life alike. We can’t stand by and watch while corporate greed endangers communities, poisons wildlife, and threatens our planet. But there is still hope if generous supporters like you take a stand. Will you join our fight today and help make real change for people, the oceans, and our planet?
**Help put an end to the plastic apocalypse. Donate $27 or more now and help us reach our $6,230 goal by midnight tonight.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785832?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785833?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785834?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785835?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Did you know that much of the plastic produced years ago still exists today? That’s because plastic never really decomposes when it’s in our environment. Scientists predict that _**by the year 2050, there will be more plastic in the ocean than fish.**_
But plastic waste isn’t just hurting marine animals -- it’s ending up in our air, food, and water, too. Plastic production causes tons of toxic pollution. Ninety-nine percent of single-use plastics are made from fossil fuels that pollute communities and worsen climate change. Communities with plastics facilities are also more vulnerable to serious health risks as a result of this toxic pollution. And those communities are disproportionately made up of low-wealth and BIPOC neighborhoods.
Now we’re seeing this pattern continue with Formosa Plastics and its deadly plans. Their proposed project would add even more toxic pollution to a predominately Black and low-income community already on the frontlines of corporate greed.
Formosa Plastics wants to build its new plastics mega-complex in a region known as “Cancer Alley.” The area suffers from an alarming amount of chemical and toxic pollution in the region. **Chemical pollution has been linked to respiratory damage and liver, brain, or heart problems, and... you guessed it: CANCER!** Even worse, these predominately Black communities already have more than 200 polluting industrial facilities and extremely high cancer rates. But Formosa Plastics is still willing to risk this community’s health for its own profit.
**Don’t let greedy corporations put profit over community health any longer. Rush your $27 donation now.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785832?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785833?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785834?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785835?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Formosa Plastics already has a track record of violating environmental laws. Formosa **illegally released BILLIONS of plastic pellets into local waterways for years** in Texas and has been fined millions of dollars. It can’t be trusted to build another facility anywhere.
If Formosa gets its way, the new project would further threaten local communities, ecosystems, and wildlife along the Mississippi River and around the world. On top of all that, the factory would continue the overproduction of plastics that drives the _**plastic apocalypse.**_ Imagine plastic filling our oceans and contaminating our food, water, and air -- more than it already does. And we already know that when wildlife eats plastic waste, it can be fatal.
We need to stop this plastic crisis before it gets any worse and takes over our planet. But we are facing serious pushback from companies that have a lot of resources, like Formosa Plastics. Your membership support today can help us fight back against big polluters that are wreaking havoc on our sea life, oceans, and our planet.
But the longer we wait, the more plastic is produced and thrown into our oceans. So please, don’t wait another moment -- make your $27 contribution to Friends of the Earth today. If just one in five people reading this makes a contribution, we could hit our $6,230 goal by midnight tonight!
**You could be consuming a credit card's worth of plastic every week. Help stop the plastic crisis and donate $27 today to help us reach our $6,230 goal!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785832?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785833?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785834?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1785835?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Marcie Keever Oceans and vessels program director, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

name: Colin Allred via Blue Amp Action
subject: Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas for 10 years. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me.
body:
Why I’m running
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdcb441c4-30f4-404c-bdca-76fc5c038f1e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because this fight is personal for me.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te9a8a5a0-5309-4363-a39a-0ebe8321519d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I'd love to take a moment to explain why. I'm a fourth-generation Texan. I'm the proud son of a single mom who taught in public schools and sometimes worked a second job just to make ends meet. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab30497e-eed1-43f3-8831-0f00dc2872f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Growing up, my world was pretty small. I never imagined I'd be working in the halls of Congress let alone taking on Ted Cruz, hoping to become the first Black senator from Texas. But I did dream of helping people – whether it was as Superman or a firefighter. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e558a26-c125-41f5-a500-514ae2b91f8f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) After playing football at Baylor University and in the NFL, I went to law school and became a civil rights attorney, specializing in voting rights. I've watched this fundamental right be attacked and eroded my whole life – right here in Texas we have some of the most restrictive voter laws in the country, and it's no secret that these laws target Black and brown voters. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T191b6425-3a7b-45f2-828f-e1d33e7f0443/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **It was one of the great honors of my life that one of my heroes and a voting rights and American giant, Congressman John Lewis, joined me on the campaign trail in 2018. I beat the odds – and an 11-term GOP incumbent – to win that race and help Democrats flip the House.[Now I'm ready to do it again and replace Ted Cruz in the U.S. Senate – but I need your help. That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5dcca150-452c-4843-b047-5da031379bfc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** We've all watched for 10 years as Ted Cruz has failed the people of Texas repeatedly. He's bowed down to Donald Trump, pushed dangerous conspiracy theories about the 2020 elections, cheered on the rioters that stormed the Capitol on Jan. 6 and abandoned our state while Texans froze in the dark. To add insult to injury, after we passed critical voting rights legislation in the House, he spearheaded the effort to kill it in the Senate. Time and time again, Ted Cruz has made it clear he will always put Ted Cruz first. That's not me. I'm running for Senate to be a voice for all Texans, for families like yours and mine, and I hope you'll help me get there, friend. Because the truth is, unseating Ted Cruz won't be easy. It's possible, if we all work together and amass a grassroots movement like Texas has never seen, but I need you with me. [**So please, will you split a donation of $5, $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar makes a difference in our battleground race, and I truly appreciate it →**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0e09bb56-7f22-4525-b356-7df8a189b9c8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks for reading my story – and for being on my team. I can't tell you what it means to have you with me in this fight from the very beginning. Colin Allred
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc92d35b0-81c3-4bca-9e2e-4f24a03a2c39/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212

body:
Joe Biden and the radical Left have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. They’re promoting victimhood instead of personal responsibility and they’re indoctrinating our children to believe we live in an evil country.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1cvilb6mplu1oqttgjsb813cm0rk6uti60n0l7o_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3im1pb6chh2bs "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Friend,

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. And I wouldn't ask for it to be any other way.

Charleston is home to me. It's where I grew up, it's where I learned to play football, and it's where I learned to be a man of faith and conservative values.

It's all of these things that I learned in Charleston that have led me to this exact moment: **I 'm officially running for President of the United States.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT ME HERE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zar7s96qpoj8598nl5hn6red87hartfj1s8nru88_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3im1pb6chh2bs "SUPPORT ME HERE")
---

Today, our country is being tested. Once again, our divisions run deep and the threat to our future is real. Joe Biden and the radical Left have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. They're promoting victimhood instead of personal responsibility and they're indoctrinating our children to believe we live in an evil country.

And all too often when they get called out for their failures they weaponize race to divide us... to hold onto their power. When I fought back against their liberal agenda they called me a prop. A token. Because I disrupt their narrative. I threaten their control.

And that's how I know I'm doing something right. And that's why I will continue to fight because I believe America's best days are ahead of us.

**_[So, Friend, will you please be one of the first donors to my Presidential campaign? I hope to see your name as a fellow American that has faith in this country.")_**

God bless you,
Tim

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpeieb0fasvlt9lv6egia6ar5hd26kos61pe18co_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3im1pb6chh2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrh9aurf81sn5626oa1rblmdbfde6rbb7qrs9tk8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3im1pb6chh2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---

Thank you for your support!

-Tim
