name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Fellow American, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13 _and _The Green Mile _or the CBS television series _CSI NY_ \- but it was in 1994 and playing the role of Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump,_ that my life changed and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. **This year, I'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
[](http://trk.readactnews._rg)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me 18 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. And this year, they're bringing the Parade back better than ever. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country - the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ \- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation's heroes deserve.**](http://trk.readactnews.-unsdgMgM4Mcepw)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Recording hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to today before we lose these stories forever.

* Holding our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear firsthand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.

* Producing veteran-focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans of the price of our freedom.

[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.readactnews.) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day - this year and every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://trk.readactnews.)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.readactnews.-dY8Hkqv3RA)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.readactnews.-yTItTurg)
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
Read/Act News PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.readactnews.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMxNDMtNzI5YTU2NDc4MjEzNDlhZDgzMzAxZjkzMmYxNzg2OWIiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2V9/RCL29mn7e3XlclHL2nWTxg) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Colin Allred
subject: I’m running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to
defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of
Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our
razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of
the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

That’s why I need you with me: Please, will you split $25 or whatever you
can spare between my campaign and Charles Booker to help reach our daily
goal of $150,000? [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18964?t=1001&akid=3260%2E346206%2EpLj8JE ]Every dollar you can spare will help us build a
people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our
Senate majority. Please donate now →

I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My
mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends
meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers,
coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football
scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I
wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what
I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly
served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas,
where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the
opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the
fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an
11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in
2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t
be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted
Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz
– when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you.
But I can’t get there alone:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18964?t=1002&akid=3260%2E346206%2EpLj8JE ]That’s why I’m asking you to chip in right now to become a founding
donor of my campaign. We’re going to need an unprecedented grassroots
movement to unseat Ted Cruz and I’m counting on you to be a part of it.
Please, split $25 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and
Charles Booker to help win in Texas, defeat Ted Cruz and defend our
Democratic Senate majority →

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way
to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

Colin Allred

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230523-3260-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3260_346206_pLj8JE&akid=3260%2E346206%2EpLj8JE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3260%2E346206%2EpLj8JE

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Hung Cao
subject: Three knocks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=ffcbd5f62056480a9a4bb1e78f266ffc&_e=cMWTmbka54cGngc82k1knHL34ktXLYby1tbTlvXeUXKiK4xOvomSoBoXojWKPCuGBj8zdaylHU0cBEOSudg2VYEU4S_P-67XaIpWTtPQ6yUDpESYJuBzQPBoRP9em04DRn1n2ty6LJvmETe7XCLdkot0cCexDALhPQ2nI4DFD5nXMx3j_J5_W4FvNXkAibrLA8wktSekGZYZPdxrRfdJ9YIwGo5x2zyrJswDTYKcAASISQh0peXFTAw1akWMD2KLICuBL33oYyDoPgAEcRH-KViNOn0FT5PFF0zqYH1LzkFjoQtQxqxffqnhR7u69AN7x3VZ-_y7mUlpdMIcy5DWvR-cqHp4MNu-noe43WZfIv1RnezpitD4Msp4C6-D9G6G)
---
Peter, Three knocks. That was the sound my Mother heard before her Father was taken away by the Communist party in Vietnam. It’s the sound my Father heard before his Father was taken away. It was the sound we were afraid of hearing.

Three knocks meant the communist party was coming for you. It meant you could be held captive, tortured, and killed. It’s a sound no one should hear - but in communist countries, it’s a reality for millions of families.

Right now, communism is some sort of trend among young people in America. It goes by many names - socialism, marxism, “equity.” But it’s all the same - and it all leads to the same three knocks.

[**I need your help to STOP the dangers of socialism in America. Peter, I’ve spent my life making sure America remains the freest country on Earth.

From serving in the most dangerous corners of the Earth to performing deep dives in the darkest waters, I wasn’t afraid to make sacrifices for the country that saved my life.

I’m only here because I was able to escape communism and come to the land of the free. And that’s why when I see people trying to trade in their freedom for socialism, I’m absolutely horrified.

I served so that our children will NEVER have to hear those three knocks. But if we’re going to keep socialism out of America, we need every member of our team doing their part.

[**Join us today so we can make sure America is NEVER a socialist country.**](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=ffcbd5f62056480a9a4bb1e78f266ffc&_e=cMWTmbka54cGngc82k1knHL34ktXLYby1tbTlvXeUXKiK4xOvomSoBoXojWKPCuGBj8zdaylHU0cBEOSudg2VYEU4S_P-67XaIpWTtPQ6yUDpESYJuBzQPBoRP9em04DRn1n2ty6LJvmETe7XCLdkot0cCexDALhPQ2nI4DFD5nXMx3j_J5_W4FvNXkAibrLA8wktSekGZYZPdxrRfdJ9cuOJqRi2PGw7qOVn_8oPAVsbg1l9LBXisVf-rrSZHCm6ulwlU6tJ4jnImWAvv8Kc3T9UWxmgr63T6aHmUfP9rDYsKd8mL7lQQX4XveSyJdbETjnnD-m8dt0m6RRhsaLCcoZGN5OjGVWhRZnqTj_pbUU8YWv9254mPyNhwWTZAKg)

clean_body: | | | Peter, Three knocks. That was the sound my Mother heard before her Father was taken away by the Communist party in Vietnam. It’s the sound my Father heard before his Father was taken away. It was the sound we were afraid of hearing. Three knocks meant the communist party was coming for you. It meant you could be held captive, tortured, and killed. It’s a sound no one should hear - but in communist countries, it’s a reality for millions of families. Right now, communism is some sort of trend among young people in America. It goes by many names - socialism, marxism, “equity.” But it’s all the same - and it all leads to the same three knocks. Peter, I’ve spent my life making sure America remains the freest country on Earth. From serving in the most dangerous corners of the Earth to performing deep dives in the darkest waters, I wasn’t afraid to make sacrifices for the country that saved my life. I’m only here because I was able to escape communism and come to the land of the free. And that’s why when I see people trying to trade in their freedom for socialism, I’m absolutely horrified. I served so that our children will NEVER have to hear those three knocks. But if we’re going to keep socialism out of America, we need every member of our team doing their part. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Fellow Conservative,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I need your help today](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=140fa9ee954b4edeb896dbc760031d63&_e=a8iuHmsEuW9yeYKU1KhxVFuXqwKDY8Rj4PCGz_-hH9ysi-0-pRzzlpj9GgivBFttTwomnYcs3zZTgCDD4JQ2HGhtp8-IbepvhuzoOVdeQLv0fIsdEhp8O-2J7zjTt1Q4_V3AVV0Xa1H3rr9ckN17QEut4nGTKmyXlK7p0Osd7R3pPXM07u6DBukHuxwOC4yAug91hIAUJ5cmO0ED2KhyeD7siRFmZU4DulyGKHqUKPuGvOWS_JU3QCI8q-md2wa6177Wv4AMnWgLjMBgVX3pQQ9uHBrGYd3BJqmuNcLNbQt8m8OAcn3WLawwwaLx_bX2at5-7aM6HBMm4Wb7wWBPiZLNw88beuCKFZJ7w2LGch9X6a5AwgJ_sdlS0BVLGfl6PZbDdQlCQWsktTMn3ZsM1AiyzFFCnA5xAzKZCOIkI1A%3D)**.

I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need my supporters at the ready – because the Democrats will do whatever they can to take me out of Washington.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:
Democrats have been EXPOSED.
[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=55e7e58ad000497c8a5888910f52f547&_e=3NIgy6zpwx6aGHli1o6Ifq9Xc540fleES8j0rBwjtTzx1ciNfsd8AUfp7SKLdMr6uwK2o4jdK4GTZSdKwLnLDMkh-dkyZDWq1YaOepsp450KbKsQ4m7BQtHUSnvFUDLtRbsDG6EoXdkxyM01guS_ulhZiupLsrf8Ug-SNrsW1vijFMEuc9p4MBAttdkTqNc0BOqTIRHe8IUFFQamTj87nGYMWCwGvY9SmGJWllBzVzR9KwJDUf3-4I0cepkSdOVga3H-N5mPdL_MQ0V9ZHVCBdVmTLeWYTZiL87jZM7Osi_pUhSF2ZzxPHYxvX8jWOPU3FQs3daLGbYLVLvh1SQczw8Ac6bzs09-kY7ImdB0OuPrbuG-wmzzSeAnKRc6ABAl8JCsBIz3wG7IkoxrZtiAKhql5RY3Tc_crsYQm1421VFIB6IRReXj-b-rXht2EKs3d26skKzNYNyZpEsz5UIwww%3D%3D)

Americans have been paying into Social Security for _generations, _knowing they could rely on it to support their retirement and help them pay their bills.

name: Roger R. Ream, TFAS
subject: Get a Free eBook on the Left's newest craze
body:
Friend, are you aware of the biggest threat to America? It's a threat to the principles that made this country great.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTQzLTBlMTFkNWQxYjhkMjRlOGFiYWZmNzFkOWZkMzVjNGIxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QveGgyc2xoYXFqaD91dG1fc291cmNlPVNQTzM5MjgyIn0/okrOSrnAUZH1g4MepTbLrw)
---
Friend, Are you aware of the biggest threat to America? It's a threat to the principles that made this country great. That's right, this danger could consume every aspect of an American's life: the government, workplace, and spirituality. It is far more insidious a movement than others because of how it taps into the religious motivations within American culture. The issue we're referring to is Identity Politics. But what **is** that? Put simply, Identity Politics is an ideology that seeks to punish people simply for belonging to the wrong group. It destroys the basic American principle that all people are created equal. Identity Politics lumps us all into broad groups, like race, gender or economic status, rather than looking at us all as individuals. If you are part of the "wrong" group you are punished while practitioners of Identity Politics give groups they view as "favorable" more power and benefits. And this ideology has already infiltrated various policymaking groups. It has become a core component of left-wing ideology, is integrated into numerous corporate policies, and is taught as gospel in some public and private universities. This issue is simply too big for TFAS to tackle alone. It's become too widespread. And it means we need to educate tens of thousands of concerned citizens. That's why we teamed up with renowned political theorist Dr. Joshua Mitchell to release an eBook with his teachings: _The Religion of Identity Politics_. By educating Americans like you, we can defeat this dangerous ideology **together**. [**So join the fight to save our country and get your free copy of**** _The Religion of Identity Politics_****today!**](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6NTE5ODk2OTgsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTQzLTBlMTFkNWQxYjhkMjRlOGFiYWZmNzFkOWZkMzVjNGIxIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QveGgyc2xoYXFqaD91dG1fc291cmNlPVNQTzM5MjgyIn0/nT8Gw11XRfgMcySyNpx90A)
---

Roger Ream

name: Rep. Jim Clyburn
subject: What powers Joe’s work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I am proud to be working with Joe on his reelection campaign for 2024. My hope is that you will join the team with us to march for a brighter future. | | |
---
Peter, I often say: This country does not need to be made great -- it is already great. The challenge we have is making that greatness accessible and affordable to all our people. That same challenge powered my work in civil rights activities as a young adult. It is the task that drives my work every day fighting here in Congress on behalf of my constituents in South Carolina. And I know that is what powers Joe Biden and Kamala Harris in their fight to continue improving the lives of all -- and I do mean ALL -- Americans. **That’s why I am proud to work with Joe Biden on his reelection campaign and why I hope you will join the team to reelect Joe as we push forward in the creation of “a more perfect Union.” A donation of $25, or whatever you can afford at this time, will show your commitment to Joe’s vision for this nation.** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Our fight is not yet won.
MAGA Republicans seek to sow division among us. They want to roll back all the progress Joe Biden has made leading the strongest jobs recovery in our history, tackling the climate crisis, and bringing down prescription drug costs for our seniors.
They want to cut taxes for America’s largest corporations and wealthiest people.
I know who I stand with in this fight. And I know who I trust to lead us forward: Joe Biden.
**[Show your support of Joe with a $25 donation to his campaign. I know he’d really appreciate it, and I would, too.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZpti-0hYGO1wbpprT27EYQh68Gizy0OgMVBKM-UIfBSzJg8Kmpg2blv_pvbmUvpSG_Sq3EDMH6l5zKa_eY81-bADKa3P9wgLE13qFOt9uUDfFvWkVuRGxC8pX0xQeygJN9mPwmZFthTxdQ7ii7QoZfzCAbtzW2UAQKs-_wotb7hY9jO8W2e7GgO96qvVkt9Xz2jySK_FlhePNiRSnjb7dhDIM8oceDjlb-SIrTEBfnzlIcMju-ZUh8NsqYKAq0oEbzG0Y0gSTGVGAI0fjjuuRqD7i_0vudwCNeLSTcNjegICVZp_9DKHUjId_7dl3HWMqaxIpSKek4mdZ7lOE2FQUI8jlURnSpOb13Xgtl8I8JwXE2HOB-x0S87QjfMl6GO-fDeSKP9Ye8F97AcssLudifA/3wf/5se6SRO6TuSVg4v_gxHjrw/h6/Z-bfPgkDkURicfPdhi6n8nI_nB02ms9igp_BkwhnFrA)**
Thank you for your time, Peter.
Jim
Jim Clyburn

name: Conservative Intel
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW-ctjJDeN

Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have
provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions,
of political and...

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW-ctjJDeN

Dear
Friend,
Over the
last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided
the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of
political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we've seen
a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and
against capitalism.

But do
they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and
capitalism?

This is
precisely why we put together this brand new eBook, The History
Of Socialism And Capitalism, from Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This
eBook consists of two papers-one from each scholar-written in
conjunction with The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and
Free-Market Capitalism. This project provides objective and
scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and
hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the
various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and
well-being.

I think
you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely,
given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US
historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political
leaders.

Simply
click here to request your free copy of The History Of Socialism
And Capitalism.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

name: America First War Room
subject: Tucker tweets video serving up ‘the scoop’ on why Fox really booted him

subject: 🚨We must hold the link on the debt ceiling debate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JR FOR OHIO](https://jrforohio
body:
For over 100 days, the President and Democrats have turned a blind eye to the responsible negotiation of a debt limit increase. They have treated... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8126041?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=70e24bb5d4&e=0426928d91)
Peter,

We are facing a critical moment in our nation's history, with less than 10 days remaining before a potential default on the national debt—an unprecedented and dangerous scenario.

For over 100 days, the President and Democrats have turned a blind eye to the responsible negotiation of a debt limit increase. They have treated this crisis with the same disregard as our border security, ignoring it until it becomes an emergency.

**Now, we face the grim possibility of Joe Biden becoming the first president in history to default on our national** **debt.**
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=9e649670d5&e=0426928d91)
| [JOIN TEAM MAJEWSKI TODAY BY CHIPPING IN $20.24 OR MORE >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=abd7860ce8&e=0426928d91)
---
**House Republicans have already passed the Limit, Save, Grow Act** , which supports a responsible debt ceiling increase that places limits on Washington's spending. This act ensures that annual increases are kept at a maximum of 1% and brings spending levels back to those of 2022.

Instead of prioritizing the needs of hardworking Americans, President Biden flew off to Japan to complain about the situation. It is clear that we cannot rely on the current administration to address this issue effectively.
**We need leaders in Washington who will not compromise your hard-earned tax dollars away. Join Team Majewski today by selecting an option below and making a generous grassroots donation to our campaign!

**[**Donate $20.24 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $6,600 (MAX AMOUNT) >>>
Donate ANY amount to SAVE AMERICA >>>**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=a9c24d14b6&e=0426928d91)
_**The rapid rates of inflation and out-of-control spending in Washington are wreaking havoc on hardworking individuals and families, not just in Ohio but across our entire nation.**_

I urge you to join us in this critical fight. **Contact corrupt Marcy Kaptur at (202) 225-4146** , voice your concerns, and let her know that we expect her to stand strong against an irresponsible debt ceiling increase.

Our country's future hangs in the balance, and together we can make a difference.

[**Can I count on your support?**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=40ded32291&e=0426928d91)
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=22c691f518&e=0426928d91)
JR Majewski
Candidate for Congress
Ohio CD-09

Fellow Conservative,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I need your help today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e580009fa3114d28add76573ce9bcfda&_e=c5X59fuLut1AJWjjOXysJeVz-fAkXJiXnPM1cX3qp0zKv5mFMwc5TjZmlLzP6ZXlpzDSD6iHAJIqLhC9WOS8RCHwyQu0hHO_rt2NQmSOHWiEDnNEixXgLwAkttN7TioxNk6S7pAdXfAENj-5hrlkfIgu6IHTVntN_5JIlEz5ZlRnrm2GW_HncsrEQV-ZjKaEh1clE3Kf1lBwn4l8pR7gtizK34GLeN2glvZ55OQb8wy_kUO1YFYz-yrBbp7p1lJH_LxgXcXIma4XjZisYQ4q_AdGNxXIAnvw7-ZGo8wCGcJ3Xaopyze8PTB4kk61nAGsOeonGUEjW5yu5IC2A7inVRId6589FIs0DLII1gzbPp9vcw7OWQ_oeNZIjSk0XLQFgg4t40nUK-FbHu7Mc6INY_6qgyXW2jrlM7dbNVzPPRg%3D)**.

HELP ME HOLD GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABLE-> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e580009fa3114d28add76573ce9bcfda&_e=c5X59fuLut1AJWjjOXysJeVz-fAkXJiXnPM1cX3qp0zKv5mFMwc5TjZmlLzP6ZXlpzDSD6iHAJIqLhC9WOS8RCHwyQu0hHO_rt2NQmSOHWiEDnNEixXgLwAkttN7TioxNk6S7pAdXfAENj-5hrlkfIgu6IHTVntN_5JIlEz5ZlRnrm2GW_HncsrEQV-ZjKaEh1clE3Kf1lBwn4l8pR7gtizK34GLeN2glvZ55OQb8wy_kUO1YFYz-yrBbp7p1lJH_LxgXcXIma4XjZisYQ4q_BtUoW0WDnbdDrPzd2K_AQDZjjgzxRDwLto7UcW-BhRuc9pdGzkHkbeKSIWlvA4mqVNuSz2etQK7UlIViRncYIen9x7d-Mfx5kFKBd4w3AehdYAvkXc9If8yyaCHHPde1uItkGFKyD_dNSIAtQwSbBo%3D)

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. | | Fellow Conservative, We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files. We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan. We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016. With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought. Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve. And the Democrats? They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on. I am in Washington to fight for YOU. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, this fight has put a HUGE target on my back , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, . I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need my supporters at the ready – because the Democrats will do whatever they can to take me out of Washington. As a personal favor to me, Make no mistake, Fellow Conservative - our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia. I’m proud to stand with you in defense of liberty. God Bless, Jim Jordan | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate. As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending. He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Barbara Boxer via Blue Amp Action
subject: This announcement should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart: former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House.
body:
Ken Calvert must go
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71a47da8-072e-4610-b03b-133c1a326747/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5d9ebc3d-1bb1-4d44-9b84-6441fb496bcb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart: former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House. Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal. There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign. I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent. [I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you split a $10 donation between Will’s campaign and Blue Amp Action to help him launch with strength? Will can win this thing, so please donate now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te65898f3-bedf-4614-b41d-408e6ae9eecb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84487edc-5ed1-4594-a9dc-81f8f488919c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race: 1\. We need candidates like Will in Congress. As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department. 2\. Retaking the House runs through CA-41. After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress. 3\. GOP super PACs. Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat! 4\. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go. Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage. The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support. [Please split a $10 contribution between Will Rollins’ campaign for Congress and Blue Amp Action today. I’m telling you, this will be one of the most critical races in the country, so don’t sit this one out! We need lots of Democrats to step up right out of the gate.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91510906-80f4-4590-9f46-ea945d9f1f51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks, Barbara Boxer Former U.S. Senator, California
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T143aeb88-1385-43fc-8846-732984746fbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

subject: Join our tele-rally
body:
Peter, Primary Day is happening in New Jersey on June 6th—it's right around the corner! We have some exciting races to watc
|

| Peter, Primary Day is happening in New Jersey on June 6th—it's right around the corner! We have some exciting races to watch, some of which feature solid conservative candidates who are growing our party and helping Republicans take back our state from the woke leftist insanity. This Thursday, May 25th at 5:45PM ET, you have the exciting opportunity to join a live tele-rally to hear directly from Bill and one of these candidates, Denise Gonzalez. The conversation will be focused on how we win a common sense GOP majority in November and keep it for the foreseeable future. Spadea will discuss his overall strategy and what it means to average New Jerseyans.

subject: I’ve got some news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
I’m running for President of the United States!
I’m in.
| |

| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=eecf654d852244378bf109cb7510ba0d&_t=pFOuSiSVxFXpLEJkc48MnM0q1nmt_RbJXX21WCZ6U3l6xFQdOc_aOdosvgb65NEjP31SJqEubWQbVhC9kkvzSkdMFb0h0rnM7ehIZx8KD4I%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=eecf654d852244378bf109cb7510ba0d&_t=pFOuSiSVxFXpLEJkc48MnM0q1nmt_RbJXX21WCZ6U3l6xFQdOc_aOdosvgb65NEjP31SJqEubWQbVhC9kkvzSkdMFb0h0rnM7ehIZx8KD4I%3D)

| | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=eecf654d852244378bf109cb7510ba0d&_e=1GLaMsI1u2XUiSPcZYz6odRUNC6_MvwC7pe2tfrwu5eYux1poLt1N4s71Ciqh7-9pnyHQTVm-BIAS4hR-D7qSSosPez13kh_o6EuHJJVq7mnKrw7v1spS-EPNwehPTIZsdS-97_9r3db85j4aKklq3Ub6jMJqsLEiy0gEXYARR1tbiErzCQ5YSNkoAGxRanHFVL4aCaYfYXldOmRbVCrTnOBwW6IL4pd-gap9ANv6dtf79nbphwZIMdQLe0HLwwgz73LfMdLd7OAx8c5Ql8BCe6sX_iK88aKsQKgCcRH8V7s7GdMWNYauedLFKe6S2x5U8UAkfTJd0vLyuqPqaceMbEB1rAwo7Th3fqa9Ufo4WfZWFmB-UV4gRjtFSWv2j3n "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Friend,

**I 'm running for President of the United States!**

_I believe we live in the greatest country on God 's green Earth, Friend.
I believe that America can do for ANYONE what she has done for me.
And I believe I am living proof that America is a Land of Opportunity, not a land of oppression._

**_[If you agree with me, then I ask you to please chip in anything you can afford to help me restore faith in America and get our country back on track.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=eecf654d852244378bf109cb7510ba0d&_e=1GLaMsI1u2XUiSPcZYz6odRUNC6_MvwC7pe2tfrwu5eYux1poLt1N4s71Ciqh7-9pnyHQTVm-BIAS4hR-D7qSSosPez13kh_o6EuHJJVq7mnKrw7v1spS-EPNwehPTIZsdS-97_9r3db85j4aKklq3Ub6jMJqsLEiy0gEXYARR1tbiErzCQ5YSNkoAGxRanHFVL4aCaYfYXldOmRbVCrTnOBwW6IL4pd-gap9ANv6dsEc_9uOo61V208ko47zFcEsA1FMExgbrSV74NDksZSS_ldmdg396AeKmrauQ0gDWZuGGMqAkFo_XAR3_3De04znLykCFBYr8kt28vITFqHjy4AAJzPlP69S8pqwdJKrMguNRZrV1Vl0nK9F9mdVQ5x "If you agree with me, then I ask you to please chip in anything you can afford to help me restore faith in America and get our country back on track.")_**

---
| | | [CHIP IN TO HELP ME RESTORE FAITH IN AMERICA](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=eecf654d852244378bf109cb7510ba0d&_e=1GLaMsI1u2XUiSPcZYz6odRUNC6_MvwC7pe2tfrwu5eYux1poLt1N4s71Ciqh7-9pnyHQTVm-BIAS4hR-D7qSSosPez13kh_o6EuHJJVq7mnKrw7v1spS-EPNwehPTIZsdS-97_9r3db85j4aKklq3Ub6jMJqsLEiy0gEXYARR1tbiErzCQ5YSNkoAGxRanHFVL4aCaYfYXldOmRbVCrTnOBwW6IL4pd-gap9ANv6dtMHHnJ1dtCrb5Mzor9hXnEDvcsKTGFKZnfpAuBS4XQtfyBuXXQN9gxA-aOP7gTecUQFAT35oFoPB54ktUA5BVRAow1FWzSwc9L9eO5xo6qXWnTsg2Rg7zS8YLmR3Fk71cHKk1n3yPqcI4KYL7Tky76 "CHIP IN TO HELP ME RESTORE FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

No longer will we allow our kids to grow up in a culture **where everyone is a victim.**
No longer will we allow our kids to be **indoctrinated,** able bodied people to **avoid work,** and violent criminals to **roam our streets with no repercussions.**
No longer will we ignore the **necessity of individual responsibility.**

I'm determined to tell the truth, Friend, but I need your help to do it.

**_[Will you please chip in before midnight?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=eecf654d852244378bf109cb7510ba0d&_e=1GLaMsI1u2XUiSPcZYz6odRUNC6_MvwC7pe2tfrwu5eYux1poLt1N4s71Ciqh7-9pnyHQTVm-BIAS4hR-D7qSSosPez13kh_o6EuHJJVq7mnKrw7v1spS-EPNwehPTIZsdS-97_9r3db85j4aKklq3Ub6jMJqsLEiy0gEXYARR1tbiErzCQ5YSNkoAGxRanHFVL4aCaYfYXldOmRbVCrTnOBwW6IL4pd-gap9ANv6duuhwUES9B5fokzXdIglYllMuog8jcaXuG_rcKIWiBccwaxQ518-2GEnsIVlxHT1xe0B5Rd2d6rmffKPjCV1HO6v8qpxWR-XiFI3AYEEaAtUS2eOQacTcR1PRTV-zgw5cghJ_JpqwIU6111M8EL1a6o "Will you please chip in before midnight?")_**

---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=eecf654d852244378bf109cb7510ba0d&_e=1GLaMsI1u2XUiSPcZYz6odRUNC6_MvwC7pe2tfrwu5eYux1poLt1N4s71Ciqh7-9GbvfmWUqXJ7oIpSLFFdwiAX-ykOuNnsRAVgC6FoViA9JlqJw4JtUg0YrERYf9hsHVrzIIdCgASVRfSikXXxcVC1D27larKqVWhio4nRZJ90JbBgxUMx9sVlMwBaCsUh2vvvJcFfRh6PWwkH_O4tKzqkWg76eziy7lIWl7y39bpInoO9mW5R7vKuOyjV_pwd-EPUkksXwm_DxrrHx_g5C3MKOcQTA9pSZHNZFvlBQBSVzixSzPud3ICQSl7swwXCzMwGZMphzIbrrrZLhv6-47ShqMt6lYDe4INH_OyqoPlVRx3oEuAxhKM-Kk09Fd13VflupiruFjHPXyARzqlXEDw%3D%3D "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=eecf654d852244378bf109cb7510ba0d&_e=1GLaMsI1u2XUiSPcZYz6odRUNC6_MvwC7pe2tfrwu5eYux1poLt1N4s71Ciqh7-9GbvfmWUqXJ7oIpSLFFdwiAX-ykOuNnsRAVgC6FoViA9JlqJw4JtUg0YrERYf9hsHVrzIIdCgASVRfSikXXxcVC1D27larKqVWhio4nRZJ90JbBgxUMx9sVlMwBaCsUh2vvvJcFfRh6PWwkH_O4tKzqkWg76eziy7lIWl7y39bpInoO9mW5R7vKuOyjV_pwd-dK8NU9PXDSCn8l-ttMoLpNC9vL8mjfO9yH1GHEmXd7UTi3Dzsp2fww11Z2WF9xYSxI-MMTaUGA9gIrnKqxtsVToVsZYcmpKroC9oarGsf-SpAL29on0rBCo2NmqAvgRGhd69G-ZG04kJ7cMTEMySYw%3D%3D "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

subject: It's official

body:
A far-Left Democrat just jumped into my race

| |
---
| | | Friend,

_**FIRST,**_ I was named 1 of 18 Republicans under attack by the White House because Biden won my district in 2020.

_**THEN,**_ far-Left groups pledged MILLIONS to defeat me.

**_NOW,_ I OFFICIALLY have a far-Left opponent.**

**Now, the attacks against me are only going to get worse now that I have an opponent.**

name: Tennessee Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Do you remember the Tennessee Three?
body:
It’s clear: Republicans will stop at nothing to keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy. With your help, we can equip Dems with the resources they need to defeat the GOP and win across the country. | | |
---
| | Here’s an update on the situation in Tennessee: **FIRST:** TN House Republicans voted to expel Democratic state Reps. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson for joining student-led, peaceful protests in support of gun violence prevention. **THEN:** Democrats nationwide denounced the GOP’s actions. President Biden called the expulsion _shocking and undemocratic._ President Obama said it _added to an erosion of civility and democratic norms._ **NOW: Special election dates have officially been set in Tennessee – and we need Reps. Jones and Pearson to know that we have their backs as they run for their original seats.** [Rush a donation of $7 to show your support and elect state Dems nationwide »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bDV3sUYNDQ0pLv9Z7uRZRARWBa8scgGXjx6S43ol2_5-BjqEXsNGXjSh8f2K3xcgdxzOEVPxjN7FHa3W6gQMBsW1WOpDwG3ENYR-8uejQEh6fJbM5A-VwqbM7yHnECRUpIcfh_neLaNX1X4mECRA1pmN7qzwEb4wXFxeWsX-vHiOOw1yclwLMtS2mhybDzsx2IiownHvbsLtq4IjFrrCBRIyb2Uc5Bh8ae9vxtcm_VDjtiE1IPQWrOka-tQfOA6Ile9_sTCoQ7LD4k6z9fNQR5nJEZCjmNft9TB-PqCfODqr2W2CXNmNeGCG651pVHScs1njh5cT2S9cXVXELmzLZ-CitQZvP0GiCp_6uLumtL30/3wf/hk5rfPQVSG-V58pf-aOvMA/h0/VCeJOZBu8StRbxG0dgFfkcE21z7bCjiYcEbo4r6_API) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

It’s clear: The Republican Party will stop at _nothing_ – including silencing their political opposition – to hinder our progress, maintain the status quo, and keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy.
But with your help, we can equip Democratic candidates with the resources they need to overcome these challenges and win across the country. Together, we will build a brighter future for all.
[Make your first donation of the year right now: Your immediate contribution of $7 or $25 will directly support things like grassroots organizing, voter outreach, candidate recruitment efforts, and more in states like Tennessee.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bDV3sUYNDQ0pLv9Z7uRZRARWBa8scgGXjx6S43ol2_5-BjqEXsNGXjSh8f2K3xcgdxzOEVPxjN7FHa3W6gQMBsW1WOpDwG3ENYR-8uejQEh6fJbM5A-VwqbM7yHnECRUpBwkWmmerYDzWcXCgRgkJU6AwuWH5Iah5o1ERGu7FFcpFZbvhnFu7rY-5oiC3rSH_gl7wyyrGgh7t703EQpN6cqeiPWV8-qrnKR5Op__Bp1c843jBeuXAa0pbF5WIKFxsZebzUB76FPygOyb_3cBIQjw3_fxH_iNIu7BDZNyRNNSyloC8AHHvITPAfKE2sLtb72uLWaFjofLeHCTozfx82HYxXNd6SQt1jvGyJ_NwYom/3wf/hk5rfPQVSG-V58pf-aOvMA/h6/50NOdWGra8L9PAmCQB574LKdtfqPntqDmcpbNKgrqKE)
These special elections are an opportunity for grassroots supporters like yourself to support the DLCC, the organization at the forefront of electing Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson to state legislatures. **Your contribution will bolster our efforts in states like Tennessee and help fight for progressive values nationwide.**
Thank you for your unwavering commitment to building a better America. Your support makes all the difference.
With gratitude,
Team DLCC

clean_body: It’s clear: Republicans will stop at nothing to keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy. With your help, we can equip Dems with the resources they need to defeat the GOP and win across the country. | | | | | Here’s an update on the situation in Tennessee: FIRST: TN House Republicans voted to expel Democratic state Reps. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson for joining student-led, peaceful protests in support of gun violence prevention. THEN: Democrats nationwide denounced the GOP’s actions. President Biden called the expulsion shocking and undemocratic. President Obama said it added to an erosion of civility and democratic norms. NOW: Special election dates have officially been set in Tennessee – and we need Reps. Jones and Pearson to know that we have their backs as they run for their original seats. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | It’s clear: The Republican Party will stop at nothing – including silencing their political opposition – to hinder our progress, maintain the status quo, and keep their buddies in the gun lobby happy. But with your help, we can equip Democratic candidates with the resources they need to overcome these challenges and win across the country. Together, we will build a brighter future for all. These special elections are an opportunity for grassroots supporters like yourself to support the DLCC, the organization at the forefront of electing Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson to state legislatures. Your contribution will bolster our efforts in states like Tennessee and help fight for progressive values nationwide. Thank you for your unwavering commitment to building a better America. Your support makes all the difference. With gratitude, Team DLCC P.S. Don't miss this opportunity! By making a donation today, you'll not only help elect Democrats in places like Tennessee but also contribute to our national efforts to strengthen Democratic power at the state level. | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jena Griswold
subject: SOS Griswold Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
Peter,
Earlier this year, I started my second term as Secretary of State. Across the country, we continue to witness the coordinated attack on American democracy. The opportunity to continue to fight for our democracy as Secretary of State is an honor.
Last month, I spoke about [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold/status/1654940651753181184] how restricting voting access enables extremist elected officials to pass oppressive policies to restrict our rights. Abortion access, women's rights, and equal rights depend on The People's ability to cast a ballot in free and fair elections. Protecting the right to vote and protecting our environment also go hand in hand. Access to the ballot box ensures communities can elect leaders who will put people over polluters. Read more here [https://www.lcv.org/blog/we-must-fight-for-a-more-free-and-fair-democracy-to-address-environmental-injustice/] in my joint op-ed with the League of Conservation Voters.
The Texas Senate recently passed a bill to allow the secretary of state to overturn Harris County elections. Watch my interview on this attempt to subvert elections here [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold/status/1654940651753181184] .
P art of strengthening our democracy means protecting election workers. Last year, I led a new Colorado law to protect election workers from threats and intimidation. And I recently called on Congress to follow Colorado’s lead and pass federal legislation to protect election workers in every state. These Americans are the unsung heroes of democracy, putting in countless hours behind the scenes to ensure every eligible voter can make their voice heard. This legislative session, several of my priorities passed including a new law that protects business owners from deceptive solicitations [https://www.cobizmag.com/jena-griswold-talks-deceptive-solicitations-act/?fbclid=IwAR13j9LGIMm18Qw0GQlyVhvkXcF4IIuoSzEjY-46dsjff9LAebBaWfKlYbE] , expanding voting access on Tribal lands, and automatic voter registration with Tribal membership lists. All eligible Coloradans deserve voting access!
As Secretary of State, I will always work to ensure Colorado remains a strong democracy and great place to run a business.
Follow me on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] and Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] to stay up-to-date on my work.
Best,
Jena Griswold Colorado Secretary of StateFollow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.
Jena for Colorado
P.O. Box 270218
Louisville, CO 80027
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/YJvPdKY-m0iHaSxsoQg-lg2?unsubscribedata=HKGBcjWM2y5I4GkFP2EsQfW6Phae32v6FikYw8zG7R3IM5u6zH6MEhH%2FSqNYqPFa9K2SOwL2RA97WvH0iZtsEkHnOgO3U4rRW8vdwR%2FoVSiwElN1lKlsmHxLNiETWfPS3p9s0I6ZrcTx2PEd5SeCw70eFkAcgkkq67DGJZzz5RjRC7rawq%2BsbJu3tFoYCeOFZ24RTGhxlTrWfQqFv0wYCPkNqL3cMV%2FjwtndXBiEOVCWcuSCvt%2FILycJ1oY7Zxk08CInP3IPPmJ07iApP1RQ3RxQMHwaP4XwYO8jv5GdVGvMZzKNR4HkfTchflyHexwTW9flAqFGqSOWUdB3O22YmPyp9eSGAQfxejxyINZxdfqjwJYye00R%2BNQ3kzx1brbeBIXDWefoDiHPH%2B53%2Bs4%2FeQB8hcBgCbUmT5MZ1e%2Buq8c%2FesJIcBcNF6xnjVLA%2F%2BYP

Peter,

**I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart:** former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House.

Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal.

There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign.

I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent.

[_**I’ll share more about why I'm backing Will, but first, I have an important request: Could you split a $10 donation between Will’s campaign and BACKROADS PAC to help him launch with strength? Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race:
1. **We need candidates like Will in Congress.** As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department.

2. **Retaking the House runs through CA-41.** After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress.

3. **GOP super PACs.** Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat!

4. **Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go.** Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage.

The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support.

[_**Please split a $10 contribution between Will Rollins’ campaign for Congress and BACKROADS PAC today. clean_body: Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. | = Peter, I’ve got a huge announcement that should bring a smile to your face and hope to your heart: former federal prosecutor, Will Rollins just announced his campaign for Congress in California’s 41st district -- one of the most important races in the country in the effort by Democrats to retake the House. Will stunned political experts in 2022 when he came so close to winning against right wing Republican, Ken Calvert. It ended up being one of the closest races in the country. He outperformed every projection and was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. That’s a big deal. There is no question in my mind that in this upcoming election, with the Presidency on the ballot, the larger turnout will be the key to victory IF we have a strong campaign. I have committed my energy, time and money to this race and today I am asking you to start Will off with a show of support that will send him a message that we are behind him 100 percent. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Here’s why Democrats across the country should pay close attention to this race: 1. We need candidates like Will in Congress. As a former federal prosecutor, he understands the ongoing danger that extremism poses to our democracy. He brought justice to insurrectionists, and I know he'll take the oath to defend democracy as seriously now as he did in the Justice Department. 2. Retaking the House runs through CA-41. After the new lines were drawn, CA-41 became a true swing seat. It’s the type of district Democrats MUST WIN to regain Congress. 3. GOP super PACs. Despite the tough midterm environment in 2022, Will was the third most “overperforming” Dem challenger in the country. He was also heavily outspent by the GOP’s dark money machine. If Democrats help Will keep pace, he can flip this seat! 4. Will’s opponent Ken Calvert has got to go. Calvert voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election. He backs the extreme ban on abortion -- including for instances of rape, and wants doctors who perform them to go to jail. CA-41 is home to one of the most LGBTQ-friendly cities in Palm Springs, yet Calvert staunchly opposes gay marriage. The rematch is on, folks. Will came so close to winning in 2022, and this is our chance to finish the job. But it depends on widespread, grassroots support. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Barbara Boxer Former U.S. Senator, California * | | = Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rubin=20Young?=
subject: The NAACP just told me I'm in danger!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rubin Young for Congress
body:
| | | | | Peter,
I am in danger and I didn’t even know it!
The NAACP issued a formal [travel advisory](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=e3a0761973&e=84ee529f47) for Florida in response to what the organization is calling "aggressive attempts to erase Black history and to restrict diversity, equity, and inclusion programs in Florida schools."
So, apparently, as a Black man born and raised in South Florida I am in danger for living here.
**Now, that is some incredibly funny and ridiculous stuff if I have ever heard it!**
Someone needs to also tell that to Byron Donalds who is a Congressman here, elected by Florida voters. He’s Black.
The bottom line is this - there is no danger to Black people in Florida. The real danger is this race-baiting BS that we continue to get day and night from the liberals.
---
| [STOP THE RACE BAITING! SUPPORT RUBIN TODAY!](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=5666ffd431&e=84ee529f47)
---
You want to talk about threats to our community? Let’s talk about it!
Debbie Wasserman Schultz, one of the most corrupt human beings on this planet, has been representing Florida’s 25th District for YEARS.
She hasn’t done a damn thing to help Black Americans, or any Americans. She’s anti-school choice and hates Opportunity Zones. Debbie is more of a threat to Black America than Ron DeSantis.
You know what else she supports? Planned Parenthood.
Nothing has killed more Black Americans than Planned Parenthood.
Where is the travel advisory for that organization?
As usual, the race-baiting stupidity never seems to stop. But the best way to prove the NAACP wrong is by electing a Black conservative to represent Florida’s 25th District.
Let’s show them loud and clear that their race-baiting foolishness is a bunch of lies to drum up votes.
**Can you donate to my campaign today so we can show the NAACP that their narratives don’t work and Florida is perfectly safe for ALL people who love freedom?**
| [DONATE $10.00](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=14142c96f9&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $20.00](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=f97624f27e&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $50.00](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=e554b08e24&e=84ee529f47)
---
| [DONATE $100.00 or MORE!](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=c32f64fb2d&e=84ee529f47)
---
Stay safe!
Sincerely,
Rubin YoungCandidate, Congress (FL-25)
[](https://1776pac.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=29219833f9&e=84ee529f47)

name: Kash Patel
subject: List of everyone guilty in the Durham Report
body:
The FBI launched the investigation with ZERO justification.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl3dsfanot8rpjc0j1l9sr4189un3od43uir6ic0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3hm6or2clh2bs)

Hello Friend,

The Durham Report reveals what we knew all along - **Russiagate is a political crime syndicate, the FBI rigged our elections, and they unlawfully targeted President Trump.**

_The FBI launched the investigation with**ZERO justification**._ Even CNN has to report that on their fake news website.

It was 5 years ago that I led the House investigation into Russiagate with Devin Nunes. Our report from then says the exact same thing as the Durham Report. The FBI had ZERO justification for going after President Trump. But for 5 years, the fake news media lied to the American public.

**Make no mistake:** The DOJ and FBI conspired with the fake news media to bury the truth.

America cannot let this happen again.

After serving under President Trump, I created the Kash Foundation. **The Kash Foundation provides legal aid to veterans, American-first patriots, and whistle-blowers fighting to expose the Deep State corruption.** We fund litigation grants for individuals who have been wronged, release documentation exposing government corruption, and call out each government operator that betrayed their oath of office.

I am on a mission to _**defeat**_ the Government Gangsters who robbed the American people of justice.

Now more than ever, I am counting on your support.

[Can you help me raise $45,000 for the Kash Foundation? Your support will aid those fighting the Deep State corruption. Please send an urgent donation of $250, $100, $35, or even $10 today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ha2a8hdg6s28mcaqk0kod0ekdvvnssob44e860_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3hm6or2clh2bs)

The investigation is the punishment. It allows the media to coordinate with government gangsters to smear your reputation and rig elections. The DOJ has unlimited resources while you have to fight in court for potentially years. It bankrupts America.

It has to stop. We are going to put an end to it.

[Please rush your support to the Kash Foundation and help us defeat the government gangsters weaponizing our DOJ >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkl3sts750se7nptgcekrap2kjhek4ll0j75i2p8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3hm6or2clh2bs)

You won't hear this anywhere else. Here is my biggest concern and criticism of the Durham Report.

**_Where are the charges? Who is being charged with this conspiracy to defraud America? Why has he allowed a two-tier system of justice to carry on?_**

It's a criminal cover-up of the crime, and there's a long list of conspirators...

FBI - Guilty

Fake News- Guilty

**The American People - Robbed of Justice**

The Kash Foundation is on a mission to end the Deep State and eliminate the traitors to our country.

But I can't do it alone.

Justice will only be served if we fight for it together.

name: Team Lateefah
subject: Just got back to the East Bay…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
We had a busy few days in Washington.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=29%2E1163%2EFRImqR)
Lateefah just got back from a busy visit to Washington D.C.
There, she met with inspiring leaders at the vanguard of progressivism, was honored as EMILY's List's first non-incumbent endorsed candidate at the organization's annual gala, and forged the type of connections necessary in order to ensure that California's 12th Congressional District continues to have strong, progressive and pragmatic representation in Congress.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230523-1?refcode=em20230523-1&refcode2=29_1163_FRImqR&akid=29%2E1163%2EFRImqR)
This is a crucial time for our progressive movement -- and we know that Lateefah will have our back both in the U.S. House of Representatives and on the ground. **But we have to make sure that we have her back, too.**
**[If you're with us, will you chip in $5 so we can send Lateefah to Congress to fight for all of us?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230523-1?refcode=em20230523-1&refcode2=29_1163_FRImqR&akid=29%2E1163%2EFRImqR)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230523-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230523-1&refcode2=29_1163_FRImqR&akid=29%2E1163%2EFRImqR)**
We're so glad you're part of this team — thank you!!
💜 Team Lateefah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper?refcode=em20230523-1&t=2&refcode2=29_1163_FRImqR&akid=29%2E1163%2EFRImqR)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=29%2E1163%2EFRImqR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=29%2E1163%2EFRImqR)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)
PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS

There, she met with inspiring leaders at the vanguard of progressivism, was honored as EMILY's List's first non-incumbent endorsed candidate at the organization's annual gala, and forged the type of connections necessary in order to ensure that California's 12th Congressional District continues to have strong, progressive and pragmatic representation in Congress. This is a crucial time for our progressive movement -- and we know that Lateefah will have our back both in the U.S. House of Representatives and on the ground. But we have to make sure that we have her back, too. We're so glad you're part of this team — thank you!! 💜 Team Lateefah

---
| | I joined Face the Nation last weekend to discuss the debt ceiling negotiations and the work of the Problem Solvers Caucus to avoid defaulting on the national debt.

**Let’s be clear:** America has NEVER failed to pay our bills. Congress has worked to prevent default 78 times since 1960, including 3 times under Trump. Whether we default or not should NOT be a partisan issue. **Not defaulting is a win for the whole country.**

[We cannot risk going into default and no one should be playing games with the full faith and credit of the United States. If you’re with me, will you chip in $10 or more to keep me fighting in Congress for bipartisan solutions?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63695029/407684420/-1095503587?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230523_FR_DebtCeiling_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_FaceTheNation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDQxMTQzOS03OWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1vbWkbBif9nzTFklfQDlKY3e5Atb7v-3O1sHMmO7QfI=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

All sides must sit down at the table and get this done. If we don’t, our economy, savings, and our standing in the world will suffer. We need to pass bipartisan legislation that can actually get through the Senate and to the President’s desk to prevent a debt crisis.

But, even after we solve this crisis, our work is not done. We have to come together to get out of this ridiculous partisan cycle of insanity.

The Problem Solvers Caucus has proposed a framework that would suspend the debt ceiling, prevent economic collapse, and address longer-term fiscal health — and I’ll be fighting to get this common-sense solution across the finish line.

[Will you show your support for my fight for bipartisan progress by chipping in $10 or any amount today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63695036/407684427/-1095503587?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230523_FR_DebtCeiling_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_FaceTheNation&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDQxMTQzOS03OWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1vbWkbBif9nzTFklfQDlKY3e5Atb7v-3O1sHMmO7QfI=)

Let’s be clear: America has NEVER failed to pay our bills. Congress has worked to prevent default 78 times since 1960, including 3 times under Trump. Whether we default or not should NOT be a partisan issue. Not defaulting is a win for the whole country. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = All sides must sit down at the table and get this done. If we don’t, our economy, savings, and our standing in the world will suffer. We need to pass bipartisan legislation that can actually get through the Senate and to the President’s desk to prevent a debt crisis. But, even after we solve this crisis, our work is not done. We have to come together to get out of this ridiculous partisan cycle of insanity. The Problem Solvers Caucus has proposed a framework that would suspend the debt ceiling, prevent economic collapse, and address longer-term fiscal health — and I’ll be fighting to get this common-sense solution across the finish line. = = Thank you for your continued support, Josh | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign =, if you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | = | = | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 United States

# _EPISODE 5: No Doubt About It_
# _Welcomes Brian Stern from Project Dynamo to the Pod_
|
---
The latest episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast has dropped!
Episode 5 features an incredible interview with Brian Stern from Project Dynamo.
Project Dynamo operates in regions where the U.S. government lacks a presence, such as Ukraine, Afghanistan, and other countries with dangerous environments. Their mission is to rescue Americans who find themselves stranded in these areas, in many cases behind enemy lines.
From rescuing hostages to navigating complex geopolitical situations, Bryan shares how the Project Dynamo team operates on the front lines facing grave dangers. It is a gripping and eye-opening conversation.
Watch the podcast on YouTube to see exclusive footage by clicking the image below ⬇️
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=844aad2d61&e=567664f14c)

subject: The silence deafens

Defense contractors caught in $100 billion/yr price gouging scandal, and Bergman is silent
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund]
The US military supply chain is rife with price gouging, as recently exposed by a 60 Minutes investigation [https://www.votedrbob.com/blog-1] . Private military contractors are overcharging the Pentagon by over 200% for products and weapons.
Inflated pricing and excessive profits by defense corporations significantly threaten the nation's defense budget and military readiness.
Yet, Rep. Jack Bergman remains conspicuously silent about the issue. Why?
Jack Bergman wields power and influence as a member of the Armed Forces and Budget Committees. His acceptance of campaign donations from corrupt defense contractors raises doubts about his ability to perform his duties ethically and effectively.
If he cannot address price gouging in his realm of expertise, how can he be trusted with other critical matters?
I expect my opponent to respond — not with silence or neglect — but with honest answers. Jack Bergman has explaining to do, and I intend to hold his feet to the fire until he does.
, help me [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miruralfund] demand accountability.
Thank you for your consideration,
Bob
Bob Lorinser
Democratic Candidate for Congress, MI01
