Peter,

We thought the government was pressuring Big Tech to censor stories about Hunter Biden’s foreign business dealings and his laptop days before the 2020 presidential election...**then brave journalists exposed the Twitter Files.**

We thought that it was likely that COVID came from a lab. Then FBI Director Christopher Wray confirmed this spring that coronavirus likely stemmed from a lab leak in Wuhan.

We thought the Steele Dossier was fake. Then we found out the **Democrats knew the dossier was false but used it to spy on President Trump’s campaign in 2016.**

**With every new bit of infomation we find that the truth is always worse than we thought.**

Whether it is the CDC or the DOJ, the FBI and social media companies taking down posts and limiting speech, **federal agencies are targeting the American people who they are supposed to serve**. And the Democrats? **They always seem to turn a blind eye and move on.**

**I am in Washington to fight for YOU**. I don’t think the government should be targeting people on the Right OR the Left. But I must admit, **this fight has put a HUGE target on my back** , one that will no doubt grow larger as the election approaches, **[which is why I need your help today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c17330ea6e9431b8cbdf6f7dbda4490&_e=0NeDabvs24tIzKjgYmnCHYP-VBn1tViUu8H4dVgQ0wnZeDasVO4_lIUfIvHWL0R_MT6to7IbN3xcnWKzZycIFQ8vT7A6xq_eNo2QzIk1X-C1qnv5Z4Clrrv9fTYIwH9Cj7yyIFJq-LhycZ2Uz7ihn4KmVtdADbL63YkPIQDLuqlq0nIFF7T46VIqm0gLTocZljaYpvubdhrHFyGu0IHha43RzvIrNSt1MYDZ8zL5z8-aMFav538Wqfl2D8dJgnoEhpLBupbNrqtL0lHAfqDtsNnNE6r6JasX2SPyKdzqllF-YMRTFHJb9683-qJo2H-VeTiZQS1dlkLTzHMTEIse92RzhFGzmKQpgFNHMirp7WYo2Ln45AnOsKY_NjJAcXdjZ888BjfoPSwF7I_pO12iTmNKgjNtuL5_eW0sA4w3X_c%3D)**.

[**CHIP IN $2
HELP ME HOLD GOVERNMENT ACCOUNTABLE-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c17330ea6e9431b8cbdf6f7dbda4490&_e=0NeDabvs24tIzKjgYmnCHYP-VBn1tViUu8H4dVgQ0wnZeDasVO4_lIUfIvHWL0R_MT6to7IbN3xcnWKzZycIFQ8vT7A6xq_eNo2QzIk1X-C1qnv5Z4Clrrv9fTYIwH9Cj7yyIFJq-LhycZ2Uz7ihn4KmVtdADbL63YkPIQDLuqlq0nIFF7T46VIqm0gLTocZljaYpvubdhrHFyGu0IHha43RzvIrNSt1MYDZ8zL5z8-aMFav538Wqfl2D8dJgnoEhpLBupbNrqtL0lHAfqDtsPy3TLahPIqP3PRefLYGczvCmL88U1wIActvp-C2MbeHB-2hwlc0LkjyVmYb1DU0-ioSPZStUG3WUEq8ve558tMepQUbeuZuMXMNwLlSHpnsfCZ9GD-pkjCwD404KMGrpORZvecO-n_ysSDgCpwXOm8%3D)
I’ll never stop standing on the frontlines in defense of our constitutionally enshrined liberties. That said, I need my supporters at the ready – because the Democrats will do whatever they can to take me out of Washington.

As a personal favor to me, **[would you please make an immediate contribution of $10 or more right now?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c17330ea6e9431b8cbdf6f7dbda4490&_e=0NeDabvs24tIzKjgYmnCHYP-VBn1tViUu8H4dVgQ0wnZeDasVO4_lIUfIvHWL0R_MT6to7IbN3xcnWKzZycIFQ8vT7A6xq_eNo2QzIk1X-C1qnv5Z4Clrrv9fTYIwH9Cj7yyIFJq-LhycZ2Uz7ihn4KmVtdADbL63YkPIQDLuqlq0nIFF7T46VIqm0gLTocZljaYpvubdhrHFyGu0IHha43RzvIrNSt1MYDZ8zL5z8-aMFav538Wqfl2D8dJgnoEhpLBupbNrqtL0lHAfqDtsBLkPflSB5KZ9th_cc3wkBc9yWDz_Au4Hv_OQqPGjL_z9QmxeGa4-67Qhw-z413K39QCRLzx1DD7v2SYdn5eE9eh91SKz5oj_YJQfsMdxsnmF1jW2tY0fqrIfFenl15ALv6zyAhPVR4tLl-yk3GN-iA%3D) **

[**IT'S OUR TURN TO FIGHT BACK
JOIN THE FIGHT-> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c17330ea6e9431b8cbdf6f7dbda4490&_e=0NeDabvs24tIzKjgYmnCHYP-VBn1tViUu8H4dVgQ0wnZeDasVO4_lIUfIvHWL0R_MT6to7IbN3xcnWKzZycIFQ8vT7A6xq_eNo2QzIk1X-C1qnv5Z4Clrrv9fTYIwH9Cj7yyIFJq-LhycZ2Uz7ihn4KmVtdADbL63YkPIQDLuqlq0nIFF7T46VIqm0gLTocZljaYpvubdhrHFyGu0IHha43RzvIrNSt1MYDZ8zL5z8-aMFav538Wqfl2D8dJgnoEhpLBupbNrqtL0lHAfqDtsEcc5iWvqKUAlzL68YfStrkRZ0PHVSSmz1EybDmHWAJsajKKlHqkOfMNJI1-pzLAeosRg7FGS3nBiUqxud7Dfkq2WV4Y2HkP9eKaYXEmDlcOVmMZ1Hkk4XPaKRXPl7YbnBmJtZ7qr1n6tAUvIgmB_yw%3D)
Make no mistake, Peter - our way of life is under attack from the Left, and I need my team of top supporters willing to stand by my side to help push back against the assaults on limited government and individual liberty.**I need your help to fight back against those who want to transform our great Republic into a socialist utopia.**

**[If you’re with me, please make an immediate contribution of $10, $50, $100, $25, or even just $1 right now.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0c17330ea6e9431b8cbdf6f7dbda4490&_e=0NeDabvs24tIzKjgYmnCHYP-VBn1tViUu8H4dVgQ0wnZeDasVO4_lIUfIvHWL0R_MT6to7IbN3xcnWKzZycIFQ8vT7A6xq_eNo2QzIk1X-C1qnv5Z4Clrrv9fTYIwH9Cj7yyIFJq-LhycZ2Uz7ihn4KmVtdADbL63YkPIQDLuqlq0nIFF7T46VIqm0gLTocZljaYpvubdhrHFyGu0IHha43RzvIrNSt1MYDZ8zL5z8-aMFav538Wqfl2D8dJgnoEhpLBupbNrqtL0lHAfqDtsCmD4LsdZuZX9dkXST4PrcuDJnsFBuOaDkdVFNGMtu_31A7O07TIJJRxDZgU150diR8ObsndGi6Ul3S5SwgyinxNACZPI_Ipihuk83119D3EgGY5JsqVFp1exoOlug5gzfGrp33MywicOzniqD3hb_U%3D)**

God Bless,

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsnA9NJDNf

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

I am fearful that legal persecution will intensify
against Americans holding to faith-based values

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osnA9NJDNf

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61836499:snA9NJDNf:m:3:2532013465:1CB7808D98B7C34841F996A3F62AECB5:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

Gabe has had a very busy first few months in Congress. Between committee meetings, introducing his bipartisan economic development package of bills, and hosting round tables and events across New Mexico, his calendar has been completely packed. In any spare time, Gabe is fundraising to fight back against the outside money the GOP is pouring into our district. It’s not what he wants to use his time in Congress for, but this re-election is predicted to be one of the tightest races in the country , and GOP Speaker Kevin McCarthy is already directing big donors to our extremist opponent. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = As I mentioned, this is going to be a tight race, and the House Majority could hang in the balance. _**This link to our LIVE POLL was generated for dpwillis67@gmail.com only. Deadline: 11:59 p.m.**_
---
Tomorrow marks the first anniversary of the deadly mass shooting at Robb Elementary in Uvalde, Texas. Nineteen children and 2 teachers lost their lives that day. **But the gun violence epidemic in our country has only gotten worse.**
From schools to banks, grocery stores to malls, Americans are forced every day to contend with the reality that the next mass shooting could be at any place, in any state. **But it doesn’t have to be this way. We can prevent the next tragedy by replacing incompetent, do-nothing GOP leaders with bold Democratic women ready to make change. **
Leaders like **State Rep. Gloria Johnson** , a founder of Emerge Tennessee, who has fought for red-flag bills, and **State Sen. London Lamar (Emerge Tennessee)** who has fought for stricter permitting requirements.
Leaders like **Congresswoman Lucy McBath (Emerge Georgia),** who ran for Congress after she lost her son to gun violence, turned her activism into legislation. McBath was instrumental in seeing the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act of 2022 – the first major national legislative action on gun violence prevention in almost 30 years – signed into law. **But the majority of Republicans in Congress voted NO.**
**Peter, it’s going to take persistent pressure from our movement to achieve real lifesaving action. That’s why we’re asking 47 more Emerge community members – including you – to respond to our urgent poll before the deadline at midnight tonight:**
**Do you think Congress should address the gun violence epidemic?**
| | | [YES](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63696596/407690092/1945865653?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1216-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNDE1NjM0LTdiZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XHOVvdI51t3ngCFDV9LMbCQ9L2BFG8t3eICSG0A9kpk=&emci=85ea7fc8-e4f4-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=2c415634-7bf9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)

Thank you for speaking up today as we work toward real solutions.

– Team Emerge
|

Emerge is a national organization working to recruit, train, and get Democratic women elected across the country, and we are so grateful to have you on our team. Our alums are strong voices for Democratic values — and they are running up and down the ballot to fight for working families. They are fighting for critical issues that affect our communities, such as the environment, accessible and affordable health care, social justice, and education equity. We need more alums fighting for us across the country.

You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support — that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our organization depends on thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our communities and across our country by building power through investing in Democratic women. **[If you’d like to donate, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63696598/407690094/-1986725773?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk1216-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJjNDE1NjM0LTdiZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XHOVvdI51t3ngCFDV9LMbCQ9L2BFG8t3eICSG0A9kpk=)**

name: Juliana at United We Dream Action
subject: DACA update from Texas:
body:
We need permanent protections now! | | | I have an urgent update out of Texas, Peter: Judge Andrew Hanen scheduled a hearing for early June in the court case that could determine DACA’s fate. **Here’s what you need to know:**
1. Judge Hanen ruled against DACA before, shutting down the program to new applicants two years ago
2. If you currently have DACA, you’re still protected and will be able to continue renewing for now
3. Regardless of the outcome, this case underscores the urgency around permanent protections for DACA youth and all undocumented people

There’s no way around it: **DACA is dying.** We need permanent protections now! **Peter, if you’re able, chip in now to support UWDA’s fight to secure permanent protections for DACA recipients and all undocumented people.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8mx_5ABkFHmeFViL7NEeBD_AogMf18kAB-piHwjkW8FHplf_LzaO-uY5K_GXpuKc9lM-vj6OIp1m_q2jEDnU5Vs7YaRkiJY3asDDDZfTg9SrdQaclgUCy9YxThcZ17R-x-aWYPv-1VVQ6vtlkkg0ZHZwDtme5x2PLEfLBDrunSgbWLM5kVQZxCzKecgcDDMDdjOMTCfdjL_HiHyxzwsaAw0yCfkoy_x1z2Emx2PbQJG4S27xiFMSnh1ktt3dQ43Q4Sy2H3HwgOdelHLZZpiLacwnGy3bMHnC2OqD0vtpUOwrxnQODWhpgdTBNRMw4OgPCfGzhCyS8k9Sq7XyX2YcIxl98t3K-tuSAk6wmHrxCKCqQwSRfCDqbod9Sf-mJe93Iec2wTtQ8k9qBHsqfX6yJYkisNJUkW9fhbi56ar3lYkg/3wf/SC5oItbPQDKyaBKmX0HfYw/h0/gtQrqh5eJInJgG2qzW_SbtWIHusaSfCDVqnwY5FyBUI)

Far-right politicians and judges like Hanen are on a crusade to tear down DACA and upend hundreds of thousands of lives. This upcoming decision is only the next step in their campaign to shut down the program for good.
**We know DACA is right and legal — but DACA does NOT define us.** We were here before DACA and we are here to stay no matter what happens.
So with DACA under attack, action from Congress and the Biden administration is urgently needed.
We are putting pressure on elected officials — who pledged to protect immigrants — to deliver for our communities before it’s too late. Our families deserve to live in certainty and without fear of detention or deportation.
**Before Judge Hanen makes his ruling, will you add a donation to help us achieve an expansive, inclusive pathway to citizenship? We can’t do this without you.**

clean_body: We need permanent protections now! | | | I have an urgent update out of Texas, Peter: Judge Andrew Hanen scheduled a hearing for early June in the court case that could determine DACA’s fate. Here’s what you need to know: 1. Judge Hanen ruled against DACA before, shutting down the program to new applicants two years ago 2. If you currently have DACA, you’re still protected and will be able to continue renewing for now 3. Regardless of the outcome, this case underscores the urgency around permanent protections for DACA youth and all undocumented people There’s no way around it: DACA is dying. We need permanent protections now! Peter, if you’re able, chip in now to support UWDA’s fight to secure permanent protections for DACA recipients and all undocumented people. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Far-right politicians and judges like Hanen are on a crusade to tear down DACA and upend hundreds of thousands of lives. This upcoming decision is only the next step in their campaign to shut down the program for good. We know DACA is right and legal — but DACA does NOT define us. We were here before DACA and we are here to stay no matter what happens. So with DACA under attack, action from Congress and the Biden administration is urgently needed. We are putting pressure on elected officials — who pledged to protect immigrants — to deliver for our communities before it’s too late. Our families deserve to live in certainty and without fear of detention or deportation. Before Judge Hanen makes his ruling, will you add a donation to help us achieve an expansive, inclusive pathway to citizenship? We can’t do this without you. name: Adam Schiff
subject: A new low:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2300%2E5257348%2E6fwM6f ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

I’m hoping for a minute of your day to explain all that’s going on right
now.

Just days ago, Kevin McCarthy’s ally, Rep. Anna Paulina Luna of Florida,
filed a motion to expel me from Congress.

It was a new low, even for these extremists. And another dangerous
escalation of efforts to silence critics of the MAGA crowd.

It’s just the latest move to try to exact political payback on me for
holding Trump accountable.

First, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.
Then, he told a crowd of his supporters that I must “never” be a U.S.
Senator. And now, one of his allies is trying to expel me from Congress
entirely.

All because I had the audacity to stand up to Trump when they lacked the
courage.

But if they thought this would get me to back down,
Derek, they’re sorely mistaken.

I’m not going to back down from protecting the rule of law.

I’m not going to back down on defending our democracy.

I’m not going to back down on holding Donald Trump and his MAGA enablers
accountable.

Not now. Not ever.

The stakes of our race are too high to back down — so I hope you won’t
either:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=may2023_abs_em.-unVV4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_ND_20230523_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2300%2E5257348%2E6fwM6f ]We need to continue our work to bring truth and progress back to the
country. Will you rush in your first donation of $3 to have my back

body:
If you know anything about me

| |

---
| | | This is Jim Jordan.

If you know anything about me, you know I don't beat around the bush. If I'm worried about something, you'll hear about it. Immediately.

So let me be 100% honest with you right now.

I just spoke with Majority Leader Steve Scalise and he told me we're in quite a bind: **1)** _Inside Elections_ released their first set of House Ratings and they have us TIED with the Democrats for control of the House **2)** The latest FEC reports show Democrats OUTRAISED Republicans by $12,000,000+... **3)** _**[We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z16oplqptkhpmn3hnfgrnlr75lkuaa2qfl937hj0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3hm9pb4cth2bs "We still need fifteen-hundred strong Conservatives to make a small donation right away or our Republican Majority will be in SERIOUS JEOPARDY.")**_
---
| | | [I'M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkqnc7m7jpr0jgmc4g36s583cnbof62f07k2dvb0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3hm9pb4cth2bs "I’M PERSONALLY ASKING: CAN YOU HELP?")
---
Listen, House Democrats exploited every ounce of their power to cover for Joe Biden and misled the public during every crisis they created together.

_If they outraise us and manage to destroy our Majority, the American People will never get ..._
* **ANSWERS** on Biden's weak response to Chinese aggression
* **ANSWERS** on President Trump's corrupt indictment
* **ANSWERS** on how Big Tech interfered with our elections
* **ANSWERS** on Democrats colluding with Big Tech to silence critics
* **ANSWERS** on Biden officials treating parents as domestic terrorists

The American People deserve answers, but getting them depends entirely on Republicans holding the House Majority. If we lose our Majority, we will lose all of the progress we made.

We need the support of our grassroots donors to prevail. **Without it, we might as well throw in the towel.**

_**[As I write this, we're falling critically behind the Democrats' fundraising efforts. I'm counting on you to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze4rc30n7otr0i8gc8fu450qgj2mcu9fdh3qjtb0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3hm9pb4cth2bs "As I write this, we’re falling critically behind the Democrats’ fundraising efforts. I’m counting on you to make a small donation to help us catch up before our critical deadline.")**_

Time is of the essence and I'm really counting on you.

For America,

Jim Jordan

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
One of the reasons we are going to win this campaign is my commitment to campaign in ALL of Arizona.
#

Peter -
One of the reasons we are going to win this campaign is my commitment to campaign in ALL of Arizona.
I am going to campaign in the counties everyone calls “red” and I am going to campaign in the countries everyone calls “blue.” I will leave no county neglected.
I am going to campaign that way, because that is the kind of Senator I am going to be — the kind that represents every single person, in every single part of this state.
So today, we are launching something VERY special and important — an Arizona 15 County Fundraising Campaign, and we want YOU to adopt and help fund our outreach in one of those counties.
We’re going to assign you Pinal County. There are about 262,694 registered voters in Pinal, and it will probably cost about $1.50 a piece to reach every one of them. That means we need to raise about $394,041 for Pinal County in this phase of the campaign.
So, what do you say? Can I count on you to help me win in Pinal County?
**We’re assigning you Pinal. Here’s what you need to know.**

**County:** Pinal
**Registered Voters:** 262,694
**2022 Turnout:** 55.43%
**Voted for Biden:** 40.60%
**Estimated Cost to Turn Them Out:** $394,041

**Suggested Donation from Peter:** $3

[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to help us win in Pinal County and win this election in Arizona? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.79Akcp&refcode=em230523-1-f&t=1&akid=652%2E734936%2EJoBhiu)

_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.pt2_oL&amount=3&refcode=em230523-1-f&t=2&akid=652%2E734936%2EJoBhiu)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-1-may23.pt2_oL&refcode=em230523-1-f&t=3&akid=652%2E734936%2EJoBhiu)**
---
If we can turn out voters in every county in Arizona — in every corner of this state — then we are going to win this election and keep Arizona blue in 2024.
But I cannot do that alone.
Thank you in advance,
Ruben Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=652%2E734936%2EJoBhiu). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=652_734936_JoBhiu&akid=652%2E734936%2EJoBhiu)

biennial budget will invest almost $2.3 billion in new dollars for K-12
education, increasing the K-12 tuition support formula by $1.5 billion
over the current level.

That $1.5 billion increase will empower
local public schools to reach our goal of achieving a statewide average
teacher salary of $60,000.

And to further empower parents, the
legislature expanded school choice options to give families more
opportunities to choose the schools that they feel are best for their
kids.

But that’s not all. This session the legislature also:
Removed the hidden tax on Hoosier parents by eliminating textbook and
curriculum fees for more than 1 million students. Expanded work-based
learning, allowing high school students to gain experience outside the
classroom that can count toward graduation requirements.Increased
access to state scholarship programs for future teachers and doubled
the funding for Next Generation Hoosier Educators.

Hoosier Republican,

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: A Call to Action: Our June 5th Deadline is Near!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
Your contribution could make all the difference - help us meet our crucial June 5th deadline!

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fexpand-majorities/1/0100018849412653-20f04cd7-7852-46ba-9687-ee32534f573c-000000/jb-8N2JwH44CtiQaZ0-gVqLK4xg=323)
---
| | Derek,

Each day as I reflect, I am filled with gratitude and an overwhelming sense of responsibility. As a proud Granite Stater, I am fortunate to reside in this beautiful state that we all hold dear.

However, as a Granite Stater and an American, I cannot disregard the dangerous fiscal path our nation appears to be on. The unchecked financial recklessness championed by both parties in Washington, D.C., looms as a threat to our prosperity. It is against this backdrop that I am reaching out to you today.

I took my displeasure in what's going on and ran for office myself and founded a political advocacy organization, Granite Solutions, rooted in the core values that built our great state. Our mission is simple yet vital: to support the election of fiscally conservative leaders at both local and state levels in New Hampshire, ensuring that our economy continues to prosper for future generations.

With our first financial reporting deadline fast approaching on June 5th, I am reaching out to you to support fiscal conservatives in New Hampshire. As you know, Granite Solutions has been fighting hard to support fiscally conservative leaders and policies in our beloved New Hampshire. However, our mission is facing a significant challenge: [we are $5,000 short of our fundraising goal for this deadline.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/1/0100018849412653-20f04cd7-7852-46ba-9687-ee32534f573c-000000/utaLEuGjqIf_dHFwwMQ7A_spdws=323)

[Every contribution, whether $10, $25, $50, or even $100, brings us closer to this crucial goal.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/2/0100018849412653-20f04cd7-7852-46ba-9687-ee32534f573c-000000/pKsWK9apmdwpUMwlWeDImznzySk=323) Your generosity will directly influence our ability to advocate for responsible governance and ensure our economy continues to thrive for generations to come.

Don't let the deadline pass us by without making a difference. [Please, consider making a donation today.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/3/0100018849412653-20f04cd7-7852-46ba-9687-ee32534f573c-000000/Sxqvro8jvuLTZMoKPokTbHmftFg=323)

Best regards,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Founder and Chair, Granite Solutions

---

name: Katie Hill
subject: Everyone always wants to know if I’d consider running for Congress again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63698218/407696946/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230523_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTI4MTg3ODktN2ZmOS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RLeNlE68nfnspxVUjyaYN_hm0oCrsr2uPJBlhmWerRE=)
---
Peter, Whenever I do press or interviews, I always get asked the same question: “ _Would you ever consider running for Congress again?”_ And my honest answer is: I don’t know. But I think they’re asking the wrong question. The question they should be asking is: “ _How can you make an impact outside of Congress?”_ The reality is I’m not in Congress right now. That doesn’t mean my work for women, working families, and young people is over. There are so many ways to make a difference without standing on the House floor — that’s why I started HER Time. HER Time is supporting the women and young people running for office who are often overlooked and underfunded. We’re advocating for issues important to us and our families, policies that don’t get support from corporate lobbyists or super PACs, but will make a real difference in our lives. My time in Congress was always about so much more than just me or my seat. It was about making an impact. Now I get to do that with HER Time — so asking if I’ll run for office again really isn’t the most important question. It should be: **_“How can I help?”_** And here’s your answer: We have a really important fundraising deadline coming up next week, and we’re currently pacing behind our goal. You can have a huge impact, right now, by chipping in just $3. **[What do you say, Peter? Will you support HER Time and my work outside of Congress with a $3 donation today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63698219/407696947/-1193769910?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230523_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTI4MTg3ODktN2ZmOS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RLeNlE68nfnspxVUjyaYN_hm0oCrsr2uPJBlhmWerRE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63698220/407696948/-1193769910?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230523_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTI4MTg3ODktN2ZmOS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=RLeNlE68nfnspxVUjyaYN_hm0oCrsr2uPJBlhmWerRE=)

clean_body: | = Peter, Whenever I do press or interviews, I always get asked the same question: “ Would you ever consider running for Congress again?” And my honest answer is: I don’t know. But I think they’re asking the wrong question. The question they should be asking is: “ How can you make an impact outside of Congress?” The reality is I’m not in Congress right now. That doesn’t mean my work for women, working families, and young people is over. There are so many ways to make a difference without standing on the House floor — that’s why I started HER Time. HER Time is supporting the women and young people running for office who are often overlooked and underfunded. We’re advocating for issues important to us and our families, policies that don’t get support from corporate lobbyists or super PACs, but will make a real difference in our lives. My time in Congress was always about so much more than just me or my seat. It was about making an impact. Now I get to do that with HER Time — so asking if I’ll run for office again really isn’t the most important question. It should be: “How can I help?” And here’s your answer: We have a really important fundraising deadline coming up next week, and we’re currently pacing behind our goal. You can have a huge impact, right now, by chipping in just $3. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for listening, Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

As a parent, my number one priority is my children.

I want to make sure they grow up with the right values - and today, that means keeping them off screens.

_But the Democrats want our kids glued to their phones soaking up their propaganda._

# [Life Wins In South Carolina](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=123293548&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTIzMjkzNTQ4LCJpYXQiOjE2ODQ4NTY2OTIsImV4cCI6MTY4NzQ0ODY5MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.tnuAPfu0sOUJ5w532rJg9jRM9FgxY6HYRD3pQUc4qmI)
### Freedom Caucus member Rep. Melissa Oremus had the moment of the week
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/05df05a6-e45e-4ab6-90eb-dc98b1a74c83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| May 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/05df05a6-e45e-4ab6-90eb-dc98b1a74c83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack..JmYDnBIjjbanwsCKxDSlOOsQe_8EKaHOwU8YwzBRSHE?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
Friends,
Your must-watch video of the week came out of South Carolina, where the legislature finally passed the Heartbeat Bill. A previous version of the legislation was blocked by the state Supreme Court, but with the court's new conservative majority, the state will deliver a majority victory for unborn life.
Democrats went ahead with a last ditch attempt to block the bill by offering 1,000 amendments to try and wear the other side down but the caucus stood strong for life.
At the conclusion of 25 hours of debate, SC Freedom Caucus member Rep. Melissa Oremus delivered an incredible speech standing up for the right to life. She spoke from the heart about having a baby at age 16 and left every Democrat in a stunned silence.
Watch the entire thing.
**Arizona:**
Despite having to deal with Katie Hobbs who has used the veto pen more times in one year than any Arizona governor in history, the AZ Freedom Caucus has managed to put together an extremely productive legislative session. As we explained in our last email, AZFC Chair Sen. Jake Hoffman led the way to negotiate a budget with the governor that protects the state's school voucher program (which Hobbs vowed to repeal) and delivered tax relief to the tune of over $260 million, all of which infuriated her fellow Democrats.
The AZFC also successfully pushed forward a one-time $250-per-child tax rebate for Arizona families and even attached language to the legislation preventing Gov. Katie Hobbs from being able to take credit for passing it. If that didn't make Democrats look silly enough, they even at one point got them to reverse course and vote against a bill to protect tamale cooks that had passed with bipartisan support to prevent Hobbs from having her veto overridden.
Read more about the full list of AZFC accomplishments [here](https://substack.com/redirect/5756b91e-38b9-4417-8e2f-91a04f563534?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
**Wyoming:**
It was a battle in the Cowboy State's op-ed pages over the weekend between the Wyoming Uniparty and the WY Freedom Caucus.
We've written extensively in our emails about the disgraceful end to the last session of the legislature where House Speaker Albert Sommers blocked bills for universal school choice, to stop the grooming of children in schools, and ban minors from going through sex changes.
Well [according to Speaker Sommers](https://substack.com/redirect/966f1699-b443-45bd-9f47-01fad66317c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the WY Freedom Caucus "incites fear and stokes anger" and "pander to a national agenda" by demanding that the legislature actually keep the promises they make to their conservative voters.
In response, WYFC Chair Rep. John Bear fired back with an [op-ed](https://substack.com/redirect/bae4d87e-015b-4b04-a0da-bde7adaa2053?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of his own chastising Sommers and Senate President Ogden Driskell for putting social liberal legislators in charge of the governing agenda in Cheyenne.
"If you are politically progressive or live in one of the top five most populated cities in Wyoming, you will find that you are well represented by the Wyoming House Appropriations Committee. If you are traditionally conservative or live in a place other than Cheyenne, Casper or Laramie, you may find that those holding the purse strings wouldn't agree with you on many matters of policy," Bear wrote.
The Uniparty is finally getting exposed for their liberal behavior. This battle will only intensify going forward, but the public is realizing they have a friend and advocate in the WY Freedom Caucus.
**Montana:**
After a wild end to the session that saw LGBT activists storm the legislature to try (and fail) to stop a ban on child gender mutilations, the MT Freedom Caucus further solidified their victory over the woke mob this week.
Gov. Greg Gianforte signed bills into law yesterday that defined "sex" as either "male" or "female" in state codes, as well as another that bans children from attending sexualized shows on public property and bans drag queen story hours in schools and libraries that receive taxpayer dollars.
These bills were introduced by MTFC members Sen. Carl Glimm and Rep. Braxton Mitchell respectfully.
**Illinois:**
From red state victory to blue state incompetence.
The Illinois legislature was supposed to end their session last week but now they're back because the Democrat majority couldn't agree to a budget, costing taxpayers at least an additional $2.5 million. The IL Freedom Caucus called them out on it, saying the Democrats had 16 weeks to deliver a budget but couldn't get their act together in time.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f678c79d-b45b-4500-a3b1-f86d32849283?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**
_President
State Freedom Caucus Network_

Melissa Oremus had the moment of the week | | | May 23 | | | | Friends, Your must-watch video of the week came out of South Carolina, where the legislature finally passed the Heartbeat Bill. A previous version of the legislation was blocked by the state Supreme Court, but with the court's new conservative majority, the state will deliver a majority victory for unborn life. Democrats went ahead with a last ditch attempt to block the bill by offering 1,000 amendments to try and wear the other side down but the caucus stood strong for life. At the conclusion of 25 hours of debate, SC Freedom Caucus member Rep. Melissa Oremus delivered an incredible speech standing up for the right to life. She spoke from the heart about having a baby at age 16 and left every Democrat in a stunned silence. Watch the entire thing. Arizona: Despite having to deal with Katie Hobbs who has used the veto pen more times in one year than any Arizona governor in history, the AZ Freedom Caucus has managed to put together an extremely productive legislative session. name: Hung Cao
subject: Three knocks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=8209dd49eaf04b18938ea628c959e1ff&_e=3TV7A6Si3yfLU-0kpOBJ02k-iW2KJMEohl8PTWgc4kawnIakYCnFBUBk6qTOB-wla01Zneg6W3XrsZyiweA56D69oNM-aC7zYj1t4UmMvmFtkwdX75gNnC9k3gt4Q7spTqAob4SUxihyg6VyDb1iYI10TGNh54HsGIkNilDg1__YOCm-eAM2VKeCGoOLrfsBFSpWp0mEZTg4mxjyWDbKA-BdwYQYGvJXqW0OsP7Mi7dXVJfUJuBQ9q7RgLkSxE8kzCHLceY1Ke7a6EQRJ7514VlguPMJHhwnxbD8ZWxVgde31Xu9njV45FMfYRGvNb8SssvC-btm8DDw7T9VKbPoPBr4CmbsXwrE0JbOaDHT6k0aFvDJebNDNwp_BA1iHGvB)
---
Fellow American, Three knocks. That was the sound my Mother heard before her Father was taken away by the Communist party in Vietnam. It’s the sound my Father heard before his Father was taken away. It was the sound we were afraid of hearing.
Three knocks meant the communist party was coming for you. It meant you could be held captive, tortured, and killed. It’s a sound no one should hear - but in communist countries, it’s a reality for millions of families.
Right now, communism is some sort of trend among young people in America. It goes by many names - socialism, marxism, “equity.” But it’s all the same - and it all leads to the same three knocks.
**[I need your help to STOP the dangers of socialism in America. Join me today to keep our country FREE!](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=8209dd49eaf04b18938ea628c959e1ff&_e=3TV7A6Si3yfLU-0kpOBJ02k-iW2KJMEohl8PTWgc4kawnIakYCnFBUBk6qTOB-wla01Zneg6W3XrsZyiweA56D69oNM-aC7zYj1t4UmMvmFtkwdX75gNnC9k3gt4Q7spTqAob4SUxihyg6VyDb1iYI10TGNh54HsGIkNilDg1__YOCm-eAM2VKeCGoOLrfsBFSpWp0mEZTg4mxjyWDbKA-BdwYQYGvJXqW0OsP7Mi7eQS3uUbgotRpZ2AzN1I6OY8wfXYL5UOrz7EfuXqnBRX_KcwZqMKEu1SKJe2kaSLDuqCl1526o2Flb3UF484bSo1d4JUXxCcJJt_65BLr8p-iTWphn8iSf86hwcHhHvGdHVCNsS5NRc39RtAi-yKP7u)**
---
[**STOP SOCIALISM >>**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=8209dd49eaf04b18938ea628c959e1ff&_e=3TV7A6Si3yfLU-0kpOBJ02k-iW2KJMEohl8PTWgc4kawnIakYCnFBUBk6qTOB-wla01Zneg6W3XrsZyiweA56D69oNM-aC7zYj1t4UmMvmFtkwdX75gNnC9k3gt4Q7spTqAob4SUxihyg6VyDb1iYI10TGNh54HsGIkNilDg1__YOCm-eAM2VKeCGoOLrfsBFSpWp0mEZTg4mxjyWDbKA-BdwYQYGvJXqW0OsP7Mi7eowamk9AAOev3k8_v2ewwZGsemcqUWR6AidBVm696lkD722QHuDiiBkhrcanC6e7aFAeMOYFDZeUvgT2QFJTJsMUAk-mKYHDdXxaMVTkoC6aLxNZAIet9dBOZgIoUVijVcpupbpvF6rWeLmbMVSFz6)
---
Fellow American, I’ve spent my life making sure America remains the freest country on Earth.

From serving in the most dangerous corners of the Earth to performing deep dives in the darkest waters, I wasn’t afraid to make sacrifices for the country that saved my life.

I’m only here because I was able to escape communism and come to the land of the free. And that’s why when I see people trying to trade in their freedom for socialism, I’m absolutely horrified.

I served so that our children will NEVER have to hear those three knocks. But if we’re going to keep socialism out of America, we need every member of our team doing their part.

[**Join us today so we can make sure America is NEVER a socialist country.**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=8209dd49eaf04b18938ea628c959e1ff&_e=3TV7A6Si3yfLU-0kpOBJ02k-iW2KJMEohl8PTWgc4kawnIakYCnFBUBk6qTOB-wla01Zneg6W3XrsZyiweA56D69oNM-aC7zYj1t4UmMvmFtkwdX75gNnC9k3gt4Q7spTqAob4SUxihyg6VyDb1iYI10TGNh54HsGIkNilDg1__YOCm-eAM2VKeCGoOLrfsBFSpWp0mEZTg4mxjyWDbKA-BdwYQYGvJXqW0OsP7Mi7dUmm24wHod-ZRvHYtyOpFAOSBMTmzgNYiUWrM_2Es_jt79rHut65bN3oligviYMbVuwLasYnZnt2cvvmEJ4q6wF_vhNywhbNk7CEkD5UH3l-XNxfM5Ooq0CIAz7o_zx6IvRGSI65CJaanGPmKf6Br7)
---
[**STOP SOCIALISM >>**](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=8209dd49eaf04b18938ea628c959e1ff&_e=3TV7A6Si3yfLU-0kpOBJ02k-iW2KJMEohl8PTWgc4kawnIakYCnFBUBk6qTOB-wla01Zneg6W3XrsZyiweA56D69oNM-aC7zYj1t4UmMvmFtkwdX75gNnC9k3gt4Q7spTqAob4SUxihyg6VyDb1iYI10TGNh54HsGIkNilDg1__YOCm-eAM2VKeCGoOLrfsBFSpWp0mEZTg4mxjyWDbKA-BdwYQYGvJXqW0OsP7Mi7cmXZeNhOUHcVzvFu-XA7hHrUQ1xMc-Hp7d1zWoSfz6_eDepAODE77gLmM6q3el4mlO4L8VnqIETYf4B2QzHdCp5h1ZPNPES-a58RD4jZmCRwkeCKRFvoWH2U_5zUCL4NA1uMi_0zHwBfemOXZPXnxH)

In Liberty,
---

In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. name: =?utf-8?Q?Lisa=20Scheller?=
subject: I'm Not Giving Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Win Again PAC
body:
We can beat the Democrats at their own game | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/87bca267d3c4/im-not-giving-up?e=6ec25014bb)
---
| |
---
| |
# Beat the Democrats at their own Game

Peter,

_I'm reaching out to you because you were a great supporter of mine in 2022. If you want to hear more about this effort, you can reach out to me directly at lscheller@winagain.org._

When I and other PA Republicans lost our races in 2022, it came as a shock. Looking back on it though, we shouldn't be surprised. _**The Democrats are running circles around us thanks to their exploitation of mail-in ballots.**_ Just last year, it cost us dozens of key races across the state. And it could cost us a lot more in the years to come.

I'm sorry to say this, but we could lose this state to the radical left in the near future. __**if we as Republicans don't get our acts together and figure out how to beat the Democrats.**__

_**But I'm not giving up.**_ After the 2022 elections, _I got together with other Republicans in Pennsylvania to put an end to the Democrats' mail-in monopoly._ Together, we decided that if Republicans are ever going to win again in Pennsylvania, **_we have to beat the Democrats at their own game_.**

---
| [Learn How](https://winagain.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4d23cb6a962c3894367acf5d9&id=623de6bac3&e=6ec25014bb "Learn How")
---
| That's why we created _Win Again PAC_. A new effort to beat the Democrats in the mail-in ballot fight. If we succeed, we'll gain an equal footing going into the upcoming elections. If we don't, we risk losing Pennsylvania for a generation.

**I've already put my support behind this effort** , but I can't do it alone. We need all hands on deck if we're going to catch up to the massive, well-funded Democrat machine that's churning out ballots for their candidates. Can I count on you?
---
| [ ](https://winagain.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4d23cb6a962c3894367acf5d9&id=3417aa1ed3&e=6ec25014bb)
---
| Please donate to help us end the Democrats' mail-in monopoly and start winning again in Pennsylvania.
---
| [You can Count on Me](https://winagain.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4d23cb6a962c3894367acf5d9&id=31cf248113&e=6ec25014bb "You can Count on Me")
---
| Thank you for your support,

Lisa Scheller
---
| | | | | | | [](https://winagain.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4d23cb6a962c3894367acf5d9&id=191f075b61&e=6ec25014bb)
---
| | [](https://winagain.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4d23cb6a962c3894367acf5d9&id=d7ecdc821e&e=6ec25014bb)

| | [](winagain.org)
---
|

Win Again PAC2432 W Congress StAllentown, PA 18104-2938

subject: We're tired of losing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=8b733dd306424032ad72207933196990&_e=4nhCDTXaczLpAfa15sgMgrzq1iNaXv1thxTagmZi9ktPTH4fAcVOnzwOw9LemeCnyaqRQ2Z_-lfoLEBA2Lwon9JBnXSgttrauWecSpK-ZR-NNlqNpyQcMBz49T73eEHSv23K6WzrCqpmqw-LSIXVhyOb92ZC2yTMjLyavms6Jf9KN457iMmLCPQYBs8OUmwAFDA86ME-6Y41M7B50sjwYBb6SLafYUWXeD8jeLLyYkhu2j0iPcg0k4TenkwGO2TF0wXOLjfpwkiEus3s1Fti_w%3D%3D)
---
We need to address the elephant in the room, my friend... _**Republicans aren't winning and we need to fix it because we have the solutions, but they are being clouded by the typical toxic politics we see today.**_ Governor Larry Hogan iterates [_**in the video below**_](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=8b733dd306424032ad72207933196990&_e=4nhCDTXaczLpAfa15sgMgrzq1iNaXv1thxTagmZi9ktPTH4fAcVOnzwOw9LemeCnyaqRQ2Z_-lfoLEBA2Lwon9JBnXSgttrauWecSpK-ZR-NNlqNpyQcMBz49T73eEHSdX_aUlRhy9HciX7J2LKlY-E_u9WR9IBl_oULMGy0Qje_8BJcK2fx4XPSGEpfSlfWq9HQOMhYO9JpHxy88VeJQqSJ1qsDL752-s51i6FF0XwmOSKRO89cZdHZ4gMFg8lYHDAQg5hItQPLc7HcjWM01w%3D%3D), that the message of – _well, we're better than the Democrats –_ is NOT good enough. _Check it out:_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=8b733dd306424032ad72207933196990&_e=4nhCDTXaczLpAfa15sgMgrzq1iNaXv1thxTagmZi9ktPTH4fAcVOnzwOw9LemeCnyaqRQ2Z_-lfoLEBA2Lwon9JBnXSgttrauWecSpK-ZR-NNlqNpyQcMBz49T73eEHS86aa3CLTl5zoemIQ3mm9wH862wIdMdhTu6YCQAhvI2-Lx-kpmYmaqM6xa0mjYSWvmmkRYYb3fOsHBojwEjnzsw3ek9QMAEDkSRDJf5EttiNdpGHo4zDFfKpLs6ruA2nZ7_7CRb6tdVOD43AFA7miuQ%3D%3D)
---
We are the party of Lincoln and Reagan. We're better than excuses, lies, and toxic politics. They will NOT win elections – and the sooner we understand that, the better chance we have of coming together to restore America. Moreover, we are not going to win back the White House from Joe Biden and the Democrats with Donald Trump or an imitation of him. _**An America United**_ and Governor Hogan are siding with the exhausted majority of Americans. People are fed up with our broken politics. [**Watch Governor Hogan's speech and follow this movement if you agree.**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=8b733dd306424032ad72207933196990&_e=4nhCDTXaczLpAfa15sgMgrzq1iNaXv1thxTagmZi9ktPTH4fAcVOnzwOw9LemeCnyaqRQ2Z_-lfoLEBA2Lwon9JBnXSgttrauWecSpK-ZR-NNlqNpyQcMBz49T73eEHSy0IDUfrinqfwTohMA8V6x2YV1s2UIpX7__X8n00y5tCo5XiaCowd54ogTZXpGoc2U5cbPoRYHY34veBDk2cWfGmMdo75vIHvSP0hEQJeNH9Lvp7N93ZrpG6vzfACw2HsUP9tXHkrCqvEX3B0ad-kKw%3D%3D)

Friend, President Biden and Vice President Harris are boldly leading our country forward and fighting for the real issues that matter most to families.
They're using the full force of the executive branch to defend reproductive rights whenever and wherever possible. name: Kash Patel
subject: List of everyone guilty in the Durham Report
body:
The FBI launched the investigation with ZERO justification.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcl1ksjp4au7250o8t5f8140lvij7aq511mmphu8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3jm4pb7c5h2bs)

Hello Friend,

The Durham Report reveals what we knew all along - **Russiagate is a political crime syndicate, the FBI rigged our elections, and they unlawfully targeted President Trump.**

_The FBI launched the investigation with**ZERO justification**._ Even CNN has to report that on their fake news website.

It was 5 years ago that I led the House investigation into Russiagate with Devin Nunes. Our report from then says the exact same thing as the Durham Report. The FBI had ZERO justification for going after President Trump. But for 5 years, the fake news media lied to the American public.

**Make no mistake:** The DOJ and FBI conspired with the fake news media to bury the truth.

America cannot let this happen again.

After serving under President Trump, I created the Kash Foundation. **The Kash Foundation provides legal aid to veterans, American-first patriots, and whistle-blowers fighting to expose the Deep State corruption.** We fund litigation grants for individuals who have been wronged, release documentation exposing government corruption, and call out each government operator that betrayed their oath of office.

I am on a mission to _**defeat**_ the Government Gangsters who robbed the American people of justice.

Now more than ever, I am counting on your support.

[Can you help me raise $45,000 for the Kash Foundation? Your support will aid those fighting the Deep State corruption. Please send an urgent donation of $250, $100, $35, or even $10 today.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr5ld4ha7kc1smprc0eb62i6h4qnoua15asd0ql0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3jm4pb7c5h2bs)

The investigation is the punishment. It allows the media to coordinate with government gangsters to smear your reputation and rig elections. The DOJ has unlimited resources while you have to fight in court for potentially years. It bankrupts America.

It has to stop. We are going to put an end to it.

[Please rush your support to the Kash Foundation and help us defeat the government gangsters weaponizing our DOJ >>](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2qova8rh924dtodo5m9rca38qi714bkilu2pmd0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3jm4pb7c5h2bs)

You won't hear this anywhere else. Here is my biggest concern and criticism of the Durham Report.

**_Where are the charges? Who is being charged with this conspiracy to defraud America? Why has he allowed a two-tier system of justice to carry on?_**

It's a criminal cover-up of the crime, and there's a long list of conspirators...

FBI - Guilty

Fake News- Guilty

**The American People - Robbed of Justice**

The Kash Foundation is on a mission to end the Deep State and eliminate the traitors to our country.

But I can't do it alone.

Justice will only be served if we fight for it together.

Please help me raise $45,000 in the next 48 hours to fund the legal battles of whistleblowers, veterans, and America-first patriots working to expose the Deep State.

subject: Just Real News; No Bull SH**
body:
| [No Clickbait - No woke Agenda - No Wasting Time](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm5f8rnbbdhutdqqb9gh3ojvmghd8gapv54g5cu8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3jm4o75clh2bs)

| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4tanu5a7algbblohoc78saa3rac5nuu8ep0oeho_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3jm4o75clh2bs)
**JUST** REAL **NEWS**

---

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**First, Ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading?
---|---
2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information??
3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important?

[There is a better way!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9m4icujrbij70b3m6485is4kfs3non09qol4fo8_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3jm4o75clh2bs)

name: Dave Chase, Campaign Manager
subject: [MEMO] State of the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)

| | Peter, nice to meet you – I’m Dave Chase, Campaign Manager for Angela Alsobrooks for Senate. We launched this groundbreaking campaign a few weeks ago, and the positive reviews are pouring in:
* _The Washington Post_ says: **"Alsobrooks flexes on-the-ground support days after Senate campaign launch"**
* Political analyst John Dedie tells _Fox5_ : **"Alsobrooks is starting to be the runaway train in this race."**
* Political Science Professor Todd Eberly tells _The Daily Record_ : **"That’s a pretty well-oiled machine."**

**But early fundraising numbers are going to be the first real test of Angela’s strength as a candidate, and we need pundits and opponents alike to know that we have the resources to go the distance.[Can you chip in $25 or more to help us stay in this for the long haul?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1441?t=9&amount=25&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)** | | | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1441?t=10&amount=25&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)
---
| | [Donate More](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1441?t=11&amount=30&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)
---
It’s clear that the energy is behind Angela in this race: She’s received endorsements from over 40 elected officials across Maryland, EMILYs List, Higher Heights, and her launch rally was attended by over 250 Marylanders.
With her strong roots in the community and record of exceptional, effective service in Prince George’s County, **Angela is undoubtedly the best-qualified and best-positioned candidate to win this race.**
Our path to victory is already taking shape, but here’s the kicker: Angela’s up against an opponent who broke self-funding records by giving tens of millions to his own Congressional campaigns.
Unlike him, we’re relying on folks like you to power this historic Senate campaign.
**Grassroots donations are like the gas in our tank – we might have the most advanced car in this race, but without your support, our momentum will stall and we’ll get left in the dust.**
**[So please, will you fuel us up with a $25 contribution right now? Our whole team appreciates your support.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1441?t=12&amount=25&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)**
| | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1441?t=13&amount=25&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)
---
| | [Donate More](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1441?t=14&amount=30&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)
---
Talk soon,
Dave Chase
_Dave Chase_
_Campaign Manager_
_Angela Alsobrooks for Senate_

| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)
---

| | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/115?t=4&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)
| | [ Chip in a one-time donation ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/91?t=5&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)
---
| | [ Chip in a monthly recurring donation! ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/92?t=6&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m)
---

| If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click [here to unsubscribe](https://alsobrooks.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=76%2E52803%2ETSNV4m).

Alsobrooks for Senate
PO Box 6058
Largo, MD 20792

subject: The GOP’s newest strategy to restrict youth voting rights

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
NEW FROM CNN: Republican-controlled states target college students’ voting power ahead of high-stakes 2024 elections [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may23?refcode=em_fr_052323_b1_gop-attacks_30acc&amount=27]
Our Democratic Secretaries of State are working around the clock to DEFEND voting rights, while Republicans actively try to dismantle them!
Can we count on you to chip in anything you can so we can continue the fight to elect Democratic Secretaries of State who will defend and expand access to the ballot box? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may23?refcode=em_fr_052323_b1_gop-attacks_30acc&amount=27]DONATE NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may23?refcode=em_fr_052323_b1_gop-attacks_30acc&amount=25]
Team - Voter registration among 18-24 year-olds increased in several states last November over 2018 levels.
AND, there was a significant shift towards Democrats among young voters last November, blunting a so-called “red-wave” for Republicans.
But that has the GOP worried.
As we speak, GOP-controlled legislatures are pushing for limitations on youth voting rights:
*
In
Idaho,
a
new
law
enacted
this
year
will
prohibit
the
use
of
student
IDs
to
register
to
vote
or
cast
ballots.

*
In
Texas,
a
new
proposal
would
eliminate
all
campus
polling
places
in
the
state.

*
And
in
Ohio,
a
new
law
in
effect
for
the
first
time
in
this
week’s
primary
requires
voters
to
present
government-authorized
photo
ID
at
the
polls.

Instead of working on a strategy to win over young voters, Republicans are trying to make it HARDER for them to vote.
Luckily, our Democratic Secretaries of State are trying to protect and expand access to the ballot box. But they need your support!
Please, friend: Can we count on you to make a donation of any amount so we can continue our fight to defend voting rights and elect Democratic Secretaries of State? CHIP IN NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-may23?refcode=em_fr_052323_b1_gop-attacks_30acc&amount=27]

clean_body: [] NEW FROM CNN: Republican-controlled states target college students’ voting power ahead of high-stakes 2024 elections [] Our Democratic Secretaries of State are working around the clock to DEFEND voting rights, while Republicans actively try to dismantle them! Can we count on you to chip in anything you can so we can continue the fight to elect Democratic Secretaries of State who will defend and expand access to the ballot box? >> [ NOW >> [] Team - Voter registration among 18-24 year-olds increased in several states last November over 2018 levels. AND, there was a significant shift towards Democrats among young voters last November, blunting a so-called “red-wave” for Republicans. But that has the GOP worried. As we speak, GOP-controlled legislatures are pushing for limitations on youth voting rights: In Idaho, a new law enacted this year will prohibit the use of student IDs to register to vote or cast ballots. In Texas, a new proposal would eliminate all campus polling places in the state. * And in Ohio, a new law in effect for the first time in this week’s primary requires voters to present government-authorized photo ID at the polls. Instead of working on a strategy to win over young voters, Republicans are trying to make it HARDER for them to vote. Luckily, our Democratic Secretaries of State are trying to protect and expand access to the ballot box. But they need your support! Please, friend: Can we count on you to make a donation of any amount so we can continue our fight to defend voting rights and elect Democratic Secretaries of State? ---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I am asking you to join our movement if you agree with these DAY ONE Executive Orders. | | Fellow American, I have big plans for DAY ONE of my presidency. If you want to: | 🚫 | | GUT the managerial class ---|---|--- 🚫 | | REDUCE the federal government 🚫 | | END affirmative action Every dollar helps get us one step closer to the presidential debate stage in August. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Working for a better Minnesota
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-may23?refcode=052323SMH [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-may23?refcode=052323SMH]
Friend,
We wrapped up the 2023 legislative session last night, and what a historic session it was! Our House DFL team, along with our partners in the Senate and Governor Walz, worked hard to pass legislation that will improve people’s lives. Throughout this legislative session, our priority was to make Minnesota a better state for everyone, and that’s what we did.
It would take me quite a while to list all of our accomplishments this session. With this DFL trifecta we have been able to accomplish so much! We protected reproductive freedom, made historic investments in public education, finally got paid family and medical leave across the finish line, took bold climate action, passed important measures to prevent gun violence, and so much more.
I’m so proud of the work our House DFL team was able to accomplish this year for Minnesota. We couldn’t have done it without you, friend. Support of DFLers across Minnesota is what motivated us through late night floor sessions and early morning hearings. Thank you for being part of our team.
Melissa Hortman
Speaker of the House
Minnesota House of Representatives
Contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-may23?refcode=052323SMH]

[** DO IT FOR BABYDOG
HELP US FLIP MANCHIN'S SENATE SEAT REPUBLICAN-> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=555ff2832bee4255a3f679a721b3578e&_e=4ReTlWh8qSvxL3srBlmtZdEQT7497fVSimadptVYFbJvPHka5LfSvGrc-FKnUn7KpdVIy9XczjmcRSodupQcS5SnCalhBf14utV2KjaxS7gjxK_-ly4FoEdcGuV91LHrBsDmOXaESLtsfJVMJrrL3PcnYbyu5pIWJxuIHp3wwK2kPK-B_wdFpMA09B_dY60hIq7jLdQOsxC4ErETXkC9vutSVliFQ9rM89wbcTqhQhff0ER9Yjfk601xFHuyGaOxG7mGzZI0pHtAJtzvyMwgAuzDWe95UrtQArttTVn86Ennl1JsTwixo1bEPZO1icHWtHP1mxQxfElKWPYqS-asjDFgxn71caKqwimAy5p_a8QfbNDOx5EBROcwf9_fMTWN5rOM0_igyyt19ejicoGt_1YD8XR2ggTvxou6qE5P4dURNcJxsM-Y8O21GX4u3vRR)
I am so proud of my Dad for many reasons. I see how hard my Dad fights for West Virginians and our American values. He doesn't play political games (the only games he plays are with me), and **[he needs all hands – and paws – on deck to win.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=555ff2832bee4255a3f679a721b3578e&_e=4ReTlWh8qSvxL3srBlmtZdEQT7497fVSimadptVYFbJvPHka5LfSvGrc-FKnUn7KpdVIy9XczjmcRSodupQcS5SnCalhBf14utV2KjaxS7gjxK_-ly4FoEdcGuV91LHrBsDmOXaESLtsfJVMJrrL3PcnYbyu5pIWJxuIHp3wwK2kPK-B_wdFpMA09B_dY60hIq7jLdQOsxC4ErETXkC9vutSVliFQ9rM89wbcTqhQhff0ER9Yjfk601xFHuyGaOxG7mGzZI0pHtAJtzvyMwgAuzDWe95UrtQArttTVn86EluPtUdkVeNMZPFobUIu47OHN4nIhzEVSjAhJ7ayfntMjW-cngl8E9tPrBOy-pIGOtsbkGcNCh-1OSftAGoGdMdeHumZ340BUix6Gz0YLIdTkUy5p42VmxyvP_yhdd6_NyjpMvl4ZH2H0537sTXZMYv)**

This campaign won’t be a walk in the park. His opponent, Democrat Joe Manchin, is a career politician who hasn’t lost a race since the ’90s. **He has over $9 MILLION in his campaign accounts, and the Left is all-in to defend his seat.**

**Truthfully, Sen. Manchin belongs in the DOG HOUSE, NOT the Senate.**
* He pushed to impose $20 BILLION in new taxes on hard-working American families.

* He cast the deciding vote on the bill that authorized the hiring of 87,000 new IRS agents to harass YOUR family.

* He’s spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants (**and didn’t even bring home a doggy bag...**)

* He votes with Joe Biden almost 90% of the time and is responsible for fewer jobs, higher taxes, record inflation, and skyrocketing energy costs.

As long as he is in Washington, **Joe Manchin will continue to bite the hands that feed him here in West Virginia to appease Biden and the radical Democrats**.

I’m PAW-sitive we CAN defeat Joe Manchin and get America back on track, **[but we must start the fight today with your feedback on our 2023 Senate questionnaire.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=555ff2832bee4255a3f679a721b3578e&_e=4ReTlWh8qSvxL3srBlmtZdEQT7497fVSimadptVYFbJvPHka5LfSvGrc-FKnUn7KpdVIy9XczjmcRSodupQcS5SnCalhBf14utV2KjaxS7gjxK_-ly4FoEdcGuV91LHrBsDmOXaESLtsfJVMJrrL3PcnYbyu5pIWJxuIHp3wwK2kPK-B_wdFpMA09B_dY60hIq7jLdQOsxC4ErETXkC9vutSVliFQ9rM89wbcTqhQhff0ER9Yjfk601xFHuyGaOxG7mGzZI0pHtAJtzvyMwgAuzDWe95UrtQArttTVn86EmrnPyXic-QYLMnISpTs-S9oQoUW6DIw2HjXG71qYEtV5RH87U4wCk8b-GCNUDIY28b4UQCHyz5DJ1IqTNGz7fs0uKtFJv07JY93jybK7CBG6uNRCr25d6U5YgZa38i1U3iYyUWfSLwzldRTdP6Z9D8)**

Truthfully, we need to get supporters in the doggy door so we can run the campaign it will take to compete with Manchin’s fundraising machine and FLIP this Senate seat. **[Will you please consider taking our short questionnaire right now?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=555ff2832bee4255a3f679a721b3578e&_e=4ReTlWh8qSvxL3srBlmtZdEQT7497fVSimadptVYFbJvPHka5LfSvGrc-FKnUn7KpdVIy9XczjmcRSodupQcS5SnCalhBf14utV2KjaxS7gjxK_-ly4FoEdcGuV91LHrBsDmOXaESLtsfJVMJrrL3PcnYbyu5pIWJxuIHp3wwK2kPK-B_wdFpMA09B_dY60hIq7jLdQOsxC4ErETXkC9vutSVliFQ9rM89wbcTqhQhff0ER9Yjfk601xFHuyGaOxG7mGzZI0pHtAJtzvyMwgAuzDWe95UrtQArttTVn86EkwYqouT1ShYwchM9MBqVAAj--0EBuZkn1pAgIwWXqspznuxpefcElsUgamW1jkrD968tYBxR0T-4tkk--_5gi_ZfLuxR4-2x_hdOulPxVSblx6UzgHp3HfhVandw31h0QQVlyRaqJDANcigw2HIF4C)**

Babydog Justice

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Lauren Boebert should have the right to divorce … and the rest of us should have the right to say no to theocracy. We can ensure both by making sure Adam Frisch gets the ~600 more votes he needs to send Boebert home from Congress.
body:
Just say no to theocracy
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T198a76ab-c60d-4e45-a676-a29da04abe7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **" I'm Tired Of This Separation Of Church And State Junk"** _That's what Lauren Boebert said in a speech to the Cornerstone Christian Church in CO. Attacking our Constitution, which provides for separation of church & state, while looking to Saudi Arabia as a governing model._ **_Boebert's a self-proclaimed Christian Nationalist who believes her Bible should determine how we live. And Cornerstone believes the Bible's the written word of God, and must be followed as written._** _So it must have been a bummer for the church when the hypocrite, Boebert, filed for divorce from her husband this past week. It_ _wouldn't seem to fit the part where Matthew quotes Jesus saying divorce makes one an "adultress._" _To be clear: I think divorce is a healthy part of a free society where we all have choices. _**_But, _****_Boebert's tired of that "junk." She wants to tell us who to marry, when to marry and how we must remain married. Except Boebert doesn't count, because she's special. Her theocracy's only for us._** [**_Boebert's a moral abomination & hypocrite. Adam Frisch only lost to her by 546 votes in '22. Since then, she's grown more unhinged, he's gotten stronger: With a real presence on the trail and great fundraising. Will you join us in giving Frisch $5, $10, $25, or whatever you can, NOW, because freedom of (and from) religion is not, and has never been, negotiable._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a7f25a2-e2f5-447b-980e-53cef0cce46c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your dedication to freedom for all Americans. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates.
