name: Vivek Ramaswamy
disclaimer_text:
Paid for
by Vivek 2024
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs0X9sJDKN

Vivek 2024

I've said this since day one - this campaign is a
bottom-up grassroots effort. It's run not by Washington insiders
but by people like you.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os0X9sJDKN

$25.59
That was our average donation in
April, Fellow American.

Since launching this campaign
just over 2 months ago, we've been overwhelmed by grassroot
supporters across the country who are stepping up to make a
difference.

This campaign is proving that
building momentum isn't about rubbing elbows with Washington
insiders, or big donors - I don't ever be beholden to them.
That's why I've personally invested in this campaign.

I have complete conviction that
our message and solutions are what are going to revive our
nation, but my personal investment can only get us so far. To
keep this going and actually impact change, I need you to join me
and put some skin in the game with me.

Can I count on you to chip in $1,
$5, or even our average gift for this month - $25.59?

Chip in $1 ➔

Chip in $5 ➔

Chip in $10 ➔

Chip in $25.59 ➔

This isn't just a political
campaign, but a cultural movement. It's about the unapologetic
pursuit of excellence. It's about reviving conviction in our
purpose as citizens.

As I have traveled the country,
I'm more convinced than ever that our best days are actually,
truly - not in some cheesy politician kind of way - but actually
ahead of us. That we are not in some inevitable national decline.

I am not focused on the amount of
your donation. I am looking for lots of donations from
conservatives all over America to show that this campaign is a
grassroots uprising, built by people like you - not the
Washington elite.

We are leading this race with
actual *solutions.* I will do what the other GOP candidates
appear afraid to even say. But, I need your help to amplify our
ideas and message.

Please add your voice to the
growing number of grassroots leaders joining our movement.

Thanks,

Vivek Ramaswamy

CHIP IN $25.59
→

GET TO KNOW VIVEK:

Vivek is an
American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and
New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside
Corporate America's Social Justice Scam, along with his second
book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit,
and the Path Back to Excellence.

He has been a
prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory
practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he
calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes
with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do
through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a
first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he
often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that
"If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be
outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an
accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the
valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate
summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his
J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund,
then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where
his team developed five drugs that went on to become
FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded
Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct
aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and
others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth
of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the
voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading
companies to focus on excellence over politics.

STAND WITH VIVEK
➞

Paid for
by Vivek 2024

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are
not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax
purposes.

Funds received in response to
this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits.
Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals
without green cards, and federal government contractors are
prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to
collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and
name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200
in an election cycle.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/is0X9sJDKN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os0X9sJDKN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zibasd4gka9lff8d44srilu5dl0e5uo2l1hmvb98_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3jmaob5c3h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zunurap72e0av4tht9unv2gntt75qrqut0cssb6g_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3jmaob5c3h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1lpmc9ak8tfneuu36fe6ddh83t5j5387sj8k3v0_rp22sh2s8i66o71c3jmaob5c3h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Tim Scott [Personal]
subject: Why I’m running for President
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
Joe Biden and the radical Left have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. They're promoting victimhood instead of personal responsibility and they're indoctrinating our children to believe we live in an evil country.

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "TIM SCOTT - FAITH IN AMERICA")
---

Friend,

I was raised in a single-parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. And I wouldn’t ask for it to be any other way.

Charleston is home to me. It’s where I grew up, it’s where I learned to play football, and it’s where I learned to be a man of faith and conservative values.

It’s all of these things that I learned in Charleston that have led me to this exact moment: **Today, I’m officially running for President of the United States.**

---
| | | [SUPPORT ME HERE](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "SUPPORT ME HERE")
---

Today, our country is being tested. Once again, our divisions run deep and the threat to our future is real. Joe Biden and the radical Left have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. They’re promoting victimhood instead of personal responsibility and they’re indoctrinating our children to believe we live in an evil country.

And all too often when they get called out for their failures they weaponize race to divide us... to hold onto their power. When I fought back against their liberal agenda they called me a prop. A token. Because I disrupt their narrative. I threaten their control.

And that’s how I know I’m doing something right. And that’s why I will continue to fight because I believe America’s best days are ahead of us.

**_[So, Friend, will you please be one of the first donors to my Presidential campaign? I’m going to need every single person who believes we can get America BACK ON TRACK and I’m really counting on you to chip in to kick this off. I hope to see your name as a fellow American that has faith in this country.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._uXRMO5JDvmgrh-Q "So, Friend, will you please be one of the first donors to my Presidential campaign? I’m going to need every single person who believes we can get America BACK ON TRACK and I’m really counting on you to chip in to kick this off. I hope to see your name as a fellow American that has faith in this country.")_**

---
| | | [YES TIM, I SUPPORT YOU!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-D7Q "YES TIM, I SUPPORT YOU!")
---

God bless you,
Tim

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._EnOvtCvg "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-4EbH-HWB_vSJw "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._MEyT_vlihxcYPm1vrbQ "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here’s the thing though – I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn’t going to be easy.** I’ll need your help to win.

---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-FEhS_6jsQ "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](http://trk.freedomfirstproject. "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden’s America, so even if it’s just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim
---

---
| PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
---

1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD
CHARLESTON, SC 29407

[Privacy Policy](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._svJXgmIQ)

Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMTQzLWViODUzYzA0NWQwOTQ4NGU4MTRlODM2MjY5NmUxMWFhIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/69qtdbdfhT52-jbcHElGMg) to unsubscribe.
---

# I hope you can make it to our birthday party for Tom Didier!
I can tell you no one is working harder to put Fort Wayne first than Tom Didier. You may know his birthday is coming up next month. We had a generous donor who has offered to host a birthday party for Tom to help raise money for his campaign and give Tom a chance to celebrate his birthday with his friends and supporters.

---
Peter, under Tate Reeves’ leadership, corruption is thriving and lobbyists call the shots.

That’s why Brandon just unveiled the start of his comprehensive ethics reform plan, outlining the changes he will make on DAY ONE as Mississippi's governor. He’s ready to:
* Limit the gifts that politicians could receive from lobbyists and require regular disclosure of gifts and lobbying activities.

* Set boundaries on the unlimited flow of campaign contributions from individuals and groups and ban direct contributions from corporations.

* Ban state politicians from receiving campaign contributions during the Legislative session.

* Enforce a one-year waiting period for former government officials to become lobbyists and vice versa.

* Implement tougher punishments for politicians who violate ethics and campaign finance laws.

* Open up the Legislature and state government to more transparency by expanding the open meetings law and holding every state agency accountable for responding to public records requests on time.

And this is just the beginning, Peter.

[Join us in this crucial fight against corruption. Show your support for Brandon's plan to clean up Mississippi and build a government that truly serves the people >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63704623/407720699/1150748942?refcode=ea.14934976-8ff9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.14934976-8ff9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTQ5MzQ5NzYtOGZmOS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=bcjwz2nW_qBrDbsgdAdocXtPPLpibZ-mOrcOpP8NVOk=&emci=f7950ab2-18f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=14934976-8ff9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6059782)

clean_body: Check out his plan to get it done. | = Brandon Presley unveiled his plan to clean up corruption in Mississippi! “As governor, we’re going to tell the special interest, lobbyists, and the good ol’ boys that the party is over.” \- Brandon Presley | Peter, under Tate Reeves’ leadership, corruption is thriving and lobbyists call the shots. That’s why Brandon just unveiled the start of his comprehensive ethics reform plan, outlining the changes he will make on DAY ONE as Mississippi's governor. He’s ready to: Limit the gifts that politicians could receive from lobbyists and require regular disclosure of gifts and lobbying activities. Set boundaries on the unlimited flow of campaign contributions from individuals and groups and ban direct contributions from corporations. Ban state politicians from receiving campaign contributions during the Legislative session. Enforce a one-year waiting period for former government officials to become lobbyists and vice versa. Implement tougher punishments for politicians who violate ethics and campaign finance laws. Open up the Legislature and state government to more transparency by expanding the open meetings law and holding every state agency accountable for responding to public records requests on time. And this is just the beginning, Peter. Thank you for being a vital part of our movement. Team Brandon | | = = Follow along: Paid for by Brandon Presley Campaign Brandon Presley Campaign P.O. Box 208 Nettleton, MS 38858 Click here to _

name: Doug White
subject: This is the most valuable investment
body:
A letter from Doug White Thank you for supporting my campaign; I have not stopped. My core campaign team and I founded Rural Americans Unite
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fbOVdWD5Q/c?w=bjtwnn7eDy8ukquAfFPX5_ZOPm45gwbvhwcQyi_mNQQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvL2ZiT1ZkV0Q1UT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Investing In Our Future
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fbOVdWD5Q/c?w=y16c64SOeqb3rPMoSRS9x1BxIjf0_cZ6akih42uhpis.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuUnVyYWxBbWVyaWNhbnNVbml0ZWQub3JnIiwiciI6IjM4Mjg5MWY2LTU1YjAtNGExOC1kOTcxLWJlZmE1OTFlMDQ4NCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)
---
| | |
---
| | A letter from Doug White
Thank you for supporting my campaign; I have not stopped. My core campaign team and I founded Rural Americans United (a 527 registered in Washington State). We have listened, learned, and realized that spending huge amounts of money, your money, on rural races was a long shot. It would be better to invest in building our political infrastructure to ensure lasting gains. Due to a glaring absence of political infrastructure in rural areas TWO THIRDS of state legislatures are now republican controlled. Look at Florida, Tennessee, Kansas, North Carolina, Texas, Idaho or at our very own Tri-Cities to see the rise of the far right. Our mission is to increase the Visibility and Voice of Democrats in Rural Areas by building Infrastructure and Party membership, taking back America starting right here at home, Washington State.
---
| |
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fbOVdWD5Q/c?w=38oqjP_DIebLFO1sKbnzcCO04bVxe7-BCzNnWODy6x8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiI1M2Y4MTU4NS00YWFhLTQzNmMtMDU2Ni0wOWI1NDZlMTQyYmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | Why now? Ground level building of political infrastructure in rural areas is greatly under under resourced. As a result:
* Far right rhetoric dominates news and conversation

* Democrats live in increasing fear
* GenZ and Latino voters in rural areas are trending right
* National and state wide elections increasingly bypass rural areas
* Fewer democrats standing for office in rural areas
* Democrat and Dem leaning organizations increasingly back republican candidates
* Core Democrats are aging out
* LGBTQ+, immigrant and minority hate, CRT, anti vax, book banning all start in rural areas through unchecked far right propaganda

---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fbOVdWD5Q/c?w=951AeUBO6btpZUc39UYxVjW8EMmHtIuT3K3aHjh9oL0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiJiMmY0Nzg1OC1lNDc1LTRkY2QtNDY3MC02ODAzNmU0ODlmZjQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | What we do:We build! Operating with a business model we strategically build infrastructure (physically with our hands), grow market share (democrats and moderates) and create brand loyalty (sustainability and election wins) to deliver a measurable return on investment.
---
| | Our projects:
* Funding a Democratic Headquarters in Tri-Cities. A statement of Democrat’s commitment to rural Washington

* Volunteer recruitment and retention strategy with the goal of doubling the number of active volunteers in key regions by end of 2023
* Tri Pride festival. The Tri-Cities Pride Festival had been canceled and Rural Americans United took up leadership. There will be a Tri-Cities Pride this year!
* Candidate identification and support. Keeping the pipeline full with capable progressive to moderate candidates so that no race will be unopposed.
* Media management, the republican rhetoric is complete, Democrats have lost that connection with the media. We will rebuild the voice and messaging of Democrats through media buy and improved relations
* Gun Safety program to engage, schools, parents, law enforcement, community leaders and gun safety organizations. Democrats must own this space
* Providing skilled resources to build and maintain sustainable programs

---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fbOVdWD5Q/c?w=lbajQrpjwuK_G_ppxZwIz--3_LKEG-1pKCVyskrZ3eM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnIiwiciI6ImE2YzUwMGNiLTQyMWQtNGRlZS1hYjIyLTE5NTNkMjQ3OGFjYiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)
---
| | Artists rendering of proposed Democratic Headquarters in the Tri-Cities
---
| | How do we do all of this?Simple, we do it with you! We do not have all the answers, those come from the communities. We listen, apply smart strategies, skills and resources to ensure that projects are successful and reach critical mass to support themselves after a time. We monitor and measure so that knowledge learned can be shared with others. How we fit in:We compliment the Democratic National Committee's approach (DNC). The DNC uses a war model; placing extraordinary resources and vast amounts of money on isolated wins, thus leaving other areas (rural) unprotected from republican incursion. The DNC does not build the party, we have to do that ourselves. National Rural NGOs largely provide knowledge and funding distribution. Aligning with them saves cost on research and accesses additional funding streams but has low to no effect.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fbOVdWD5Q/c?w=o3FXpa4lU4lJjhPAExCWTGzNPgvX1EchcAUILMv7heg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiIzMzJlMmU1OS0zMGQ1LTQzZTQtYmQxZS0wYzc2MDYyYjliODciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | We physically, with our sweat, build infrastructure and the Party by providing people, sustainable strategies, organization, office space and technology, investment, media management and skills development. We have listened and learned from hundreds of dedicated democrats, democratic organizations, community organizations, State Party, National Party and others. There is almost no interest in doing the grass roots work of building Democratic infrastructure in rural communities and the small number of passionate volunteers on the front line need help. We are losing to Republican rhetoric and organizing.
Believe in your neighbor and invest in your community. We count on your support to grow and build strength in the Party.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fbOVdWD5Q/c?w=Nv5nrJyY6myh4WhSSyTqslT-0EO1FIIw2ioIw32lwxo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiIyNjBlYTBlMC01OGZhLTRkMjUtZmJjYS0wMjViYjZhODNlNjciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---

Add your name and stand with me!| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63705425/407722647/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmU4MGQxNS05MWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfkHpLBQdRBQAuQ6H8cdT2ZPaqewV1EfyuPzLUTrBiI=&emci=62b01a5e-90f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=76e80d15-91f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1486204)

| | Peter, enough is enough! The House GOP voted to raise the debt ceiling 3 times when our orange nemesis was in the Oval Office. But now they’re willing to sacrifice the livelihoods of hardworking Americans by playing political football with our nation’s debt. [**Tell McCarthy and his cronies to stop the games and get the job done!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63705426/407722648/-1708013130?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmU4MGQxNS05MWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AfkHpLBQdRBQAuQ6H8cdT2ZPaqewV1EfyuPzLUTrBiI=&emci=62b01a5e-90f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=76e80d15-91f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1486204) The mega-MAGA House GOP prioritizes putting vital services like healthcare, education, and veterans needs on the chopping block, while favoring major tax cuts for the top 1%. Americans see right through McCarthy’s political spin. Tell McCarthy that enough is enough! Stop holding the debt ceiling hostage!
---

Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender

The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: Add your name and stand with me!| | | | | Peter, enough is enough! The House GOP voted to raise the debt ceiling 3 times when our orange nemesis was in the Oval Office. But now they’re willing to sacrifice the livelihoods of hardworking Americans by playing political football with our nation’s debt. The mega-MAGA House GOP prioritizes putting vital services like healthcare, education, and veterans needs on the chopping block, while favoring major tax cuts for the top 1%. Americans see right through McCarthy’s political spin. Tell McCarthy that enough is enough! Stop holding the debt ceiling hostage! Together, #WeRepresent! | | Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender | The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. subject: I lost my son to a drunk driving accident

body:
After inviting my wife and I to speak at one of their events, Mothers Against Drunk Driving has now disinvited me to speak at one of their conferences because of my conservative politics.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_t=kxnDqJ-XFozVwFOLZaazBixOp0e3fSG4cNWoJVFLcB7Pj8xZjLwluPbMDd2fae3lNIkKloZeSwt55sqvm_xIIEAJX-bq-dgVTpIFxh6oyaE%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_t=kxnDqJ-XFozVwFOLZaazBixOp0e3fSG4cNWoJVFLcB7Pj8xZjLwluPbMDd2fae3lNIkKloZeSwt55sqvm_xIIEAJX-bq-dgVTpIFxh6oyaE%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_e=VpTPn7GwmqRXSStn3Muqj2AJVzW8YoH01mbpvTQfOxhuHYWrr8xc-5n9BubFDuSEXMW8MjDNpaiRSj3vKBcC_9z_kKb_TCNajCgM2anyXpCHBbwXKB1YeVoKUupfpovBwcokuC9EUxFf8DF3godxQIAzJfurKo8IvKd6bW_WKj48lrl5gqb-Sqd73p64_mkM_gBl_lEVZfI_adbMd5eaNj5QR7iHiXTk-stdyxdoPTIQnwU36ZfHa1Lg1kTBH2w-XPz5rabYcgyL9CqnrqNfV9N11vv0xp4oisxuWQssAhl228-mwcJGkONVxDNe0hKSs7njcGbH7w3agfnJBgjk5SoHACFHqZPE4ojQPAeWl8p0pW5Z1xpeVqXKxkUG5dk_3AB1yEFW0gVgdEcmkAqtrg%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. **I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving.**

First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit.

**Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today.**
Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a **Mothers Against Drunk Driving** event this July in Phoenix.

**We would have been the perfect fit.** Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022.

Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, **you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers**.

**The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political.**

**[I need your help to send a message to organizations, like MADD, who are bending to pressure from WOKE, far-left activities and canceling anyone who disagrees with their looney-tune out of left-field rhetoric.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_e=VpTPn7GwmqRXSStn3Muqj2AJVzW8YoH01mbpvTQfOxhuHYWrr8xc-5n9BubFDuSEXMW8MjDNpaiRSj3vKBcC_9z_kKb_TCNajCgM2anyXpCHBbwXKB1YeVoKUupfpovBwcokuC9EUxFf8DF3godxQIAzJfurKo8IvKd6bW_WKj48lrl5gqb-Sqd73p64_mkM_gBl_lEVZfI_adbMd5eaNj5QR7iHiXTk-stdyxdoPTIR8K4vbQc3yluSmrElNykstCHQEeoDsuDlHiIMaZHC4dbaBJv8zeMowGwG4PKlM6fqWXQTEbFhWGT5yKL8AAWZ9yupOkb6rp6VKnit_RaE8grz3jHimjFixosfa-Nd0hzJ3me0UG3hVwRuNxkQKwLEZOeccypu1tNOloFHjQA93A%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_e=VpTPn7GwmqRXSStn3Muqj2AJVzW8YoH01mbpvTQfOxhuHYWrr8xc-5n9BubFDuSEXMW8MjDNpaiRSj3vKBcC_9z_kKb_TCNajCgM2anyXpCHBbwXKB1YeVoKUupfpovBwcokuC9EUxFf8DF3godxQIAzJfurKo8IvKd6bW_WKj48lrl5gqb-Sqd73p64_mkM_gBl_lEVZfI_adbMd5eaNj5QR7iHiXTk-stdyxdoPTKKZTkzAif98jaHJVNWXmQKjbHZM7tEMJTKPJ3VbtVgFtKOlN1p2VCFxiNJXd7UytDoDmByd-6BdK3OkGOmttVgamVhpasiJQQ5zxo0lRzpMMjKhvONSGxzd0SS9mPO1xB23RvGUipJpfJ39aRDqpGJgVtiR0N9OYSPOSkGs3fCPg%3D%3D)

It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. **Let me be crystal clear:** the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; **they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold.**

**This would _never_ happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate.**

Please accept my invitation today to **[sign my petition telling Mothers Against Drunk Driving that politicizing the deaths of drunk driving victims is just plain wrong.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_e=VpTPn7GwmqRXSStn3Muqj2AJVzW8YoH01mbpvTQfOxhuHYWrr8xc-5n9BubFDuSEXMW8MjDNpaiRSj3vKBcC_9z_kKb_TCNajCgM2anyXpCHBbwXKB1YeVoKUupfpovBwcokuC9EUxFf8DF3godxQIAzJfurKo8IvKd6bW_WKj48lrl5gqb-Sqd73p64_mkM_gBl_lEVZfI_adbMd5eaNj5QR7iHiXTk-stdyxdoPTItqK6z1JO8oyoEeeusZx-M0K0awIO_xhVNE9GITPv1CtbV6CEtJsf5nSanLa8AmMdwQVNve_ntSj4xlCKEqkaijVzsOBDd3UWmm2FIGxNRqc1ibiJzfsS31DBzJTp7mVJtJK_nDWnbJZDJqHHIQeya3KNbL-UIEYXsnYGG054U5w%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_e=VpTPn7GwmqRXSStn3Muqj2AJVzW8YoH01mbpvTQfOxhuHYWrr8xc-5n9BubFDuSEXMW8MjDNpaiRSj3vKBcC_9z_kKb_TCNajCgM2anyXpCHBbwXKB1YeVoKUupfpovBwcokuC9EUxFf8DF3godxQIAzJfurKo8IvKd6bW_WKj48lrl5gqb-Sqd73p64_mkM_gBl_lEVZfI_adbMd5eaNj5QR7iHiXTk-stdyxdoPTKdTmCwzZSSTeW2ZoHBlOWrMyHpofkGCC76GfoiWfdymk8Uf_ZOL4f2nwaq3RBgri7R5Ax7XpWz9BHvFCDWn0F2k0xgyKdYd6oiH3N-SD-cwjPR45yoUI47wDRTndjZqcZQDCvGmx0odrXZrpT9Z4nLqvDTSgzB1dmwHbvONU1HWg%3D%3D)

**We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore**.

Organizations like **Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political.** Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow.

**Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds.**

This cancel culture is DISGRACEFUL. If you agree, **[then I need you to let me know you’re with me by singing my petition right now](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_e=VpTPn7GwmqRXSStn3Muqj2AJVzW8YoH01mbpvTQfOxhuHYWrr8xc-5n9BubFDuSEXMW8MjDNpaiRSj3vKBcC_9z_kKb_TCNajCgM2anyXpCHBbwXKB1YeVoKUupfpovBwcokuC9EUxFf8DF3godxQIAzJfurKo8IvKd6bW_WKj48lrl5gqb-Sqd73p64_mkM_gBl_lEVZfI_adbMd5eaNj5QR7iHiXTk-stdyxdoPTI9bwActD0iUp1Tfq22h-p3bo0dsHlviwZQ0aCW5g0aPMuRT3NMegg5hUZzDz_BaZMjdnH8UQVUN1dA3rJHc7448Q6jjIFFzCTd8o1Vt_Z-6vDhaUa1yipH-FsguSKMbwj29lSOPJtzZDPsxQEo0koSWVDG2xaPQnT5pJVzM1peAA%3D%3D)**.

Sincerely,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_e=VpTPn7GwmqRXSStn3Muqj2AJVzW8YoH01mbpvTQfOxhuHYWrr8xc-5n9BubFDuSEXMW8MjDNpaiRSj3vKBcC_9z_kKb_TCNajCgM2anyXpCHBbwXKB1YeVoKUupfpovBwcokuC9EUxFf8DF3godxQIAzJfurKo8IvKd6bW_WKj48lrl5gqb-Sqd73p64_mkM_gBl_lEVZfI_adbMd5eaNj5QR7iHiXTk-stdyxdoPTLKR3r--l7Q_0Kk5xx97QtmlwATiPHoDcDZWdlHs528hwcu-03BydRQ3MkbiDMpFY1hctaJdytj5eLpSFPUrQlgfdlcmL2tcTtkyhFNWc3Y2WrrMlCf68oAxw3DIQil8MPSBMZx_klVxoXXm-IPkRuVnq5LVbNI_80jdm54UFokpw%3D%3D)
Sheriff Mark Lamb
Republican for U.S. Senate

**Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_e=VpTPn7GwmqRXSStn3Muqjwbrz9RSlz85BZc17PceRe_p4LT-6YQyJHE0ADN9mB6aRGfXKFqNGPrNhD16e1ncYVhcs3K3QauHW8cWdTPy5ez7sup2eF2tO6PIA06rBwljPVrsxztOdzZ2QwpLi8cNnhHgxZbJSiab30xCAJk9PkI_g0X7Nz0EW8PupqhvyCyy-tWsXtsb4a6fEou_9jyVlijQukHpoKCXUGCENa1E1cM%3D) [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_e=VpTPn7GwmqRXSStn3Muqj37cVgQSzEaVpi3PefS_3QfZz6P_LxWXii5opin_RHDkwZOSCItTfg7WUSMjoqH-4MksFk4hhxMUmWvf1LrCqz7tycnPqXXPZJr8M6nlaxdF4vXG51kbsEjAIL2TRi0Ghmza3RF9oXEY9kiT6dsnrmo7sTEp66w5J0ycR5STxahqiHCDvzhk8O38LbrOylGCCg%3D%3D) [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=a91a78002a4e40aa9de42fac14550580&_e=VpTPn7GwmqRXSStn3MuqjyP0wLITDZzs-oSpiJqQ0nbkwzQEujKyRPRBC0HcdhqFnPDMicbZuMV-QyCVa8lM0aX357XXxtlVT2pPHaWMnO3_fK9ES2Xv9SpiR4LYXWskis6F76o7zy0Qp3Kl6eJDlzgLBgVLRkCH1wS4FB_FfcSmDgu-ap8ZM7xIs5nBq0rx0hdmGGPhz32YD8s9u8J2Gbsf7LejEXU7PLQbBdxAbKA%3D)

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: I am asking you to join our movement if you agree with these DAY ONE Executive Orders. | | Peter, I have big plans for DAY ONE of my presidency. If you want to: | 🚫 | | GUT the managerial class ---|---|--- 🚫 | | REDUCE the federal government 🚫 | | END affirmative action Every dollar helps get us one step closer to the presidential debate stage in August. Thanks, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Babydog Justice

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for U.S. Senate

name: Team Evergreen
subject: 4 must-know facts about power plant rules
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
EPA making big moves
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4576?t=2&akid=13326%2E53494%2E0zTGnZ)
---
Friend,
ICYMI, EPA just proposed the rules we've been waiting for: Carbon pollution standards for power plants.
During our recent virtual discussion on the rules, Evergreen Executive Director Lena Moffitt pointed out that there are currently no federal limits on how much carbon pollution power plants can spew into our atmosphere and into our communities—**and that's just one reason these rules are President Biden's most effective tool to take on climate change.**
**_[Learn about the rules and what we're calling for in the recap.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4576?t=3&akid=13326%2E53494%2E0zTGnZ)_**
[GET THE HIGHLIGHTS NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4576?t=4&akid=13326%2E53494%2E0zTGnZ)
---
On the call, Washington Governor Jay Inslee pointed out that the proposed rules are "a first draft of a strong provision." He went on to say, "I think it's up to us to nudge and encourage even stronger rules at a more rapid pace," **and we couldn't agree more.

**
_"We can go a lot faster on this transition than we are right now. We built 3,000 airplanes in 1939, and five years later we built 300,000 airplanes. We should have more confidence about how rapidly this transition can be made."_

– Washington Governor Jay Inslee
---

To hear more from Gov. Inslee, Dr. Leah Stokes, and others, **_[check out the recap.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4576?t=5&akid=13326%2E53494%2E0zTGnZ)_**
[EPA'S NEW RULES FOR POWER PLANTS](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4576?t=6&akid=13326%2E53494%2E0zTGnZ)
---
Thanks for being here! We're keeping a close eye on the public comment period for these rules and will need you to take action. Keep an eye on these emails for updates.
Sincerely,
Team Evergreen
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=13326%2E53494%2E0zTGnZ). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---
All content © 2023 EVERGREEN ACTION, All Rights Reserved
[Privacy Policy](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/287?t=1&akid=13326%2E53494%2E0zTGnZ)

name: requesting your signature | Left Action
subject: Trump mocked E. Jean Carroll in his CNN town hall. Now she’s seeking further damages
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: Support E. Jean Carroll in seeking further damages for what Trump said about her in his CNN town hall >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b5b9404-e92a-4042-8232-a419eb39fc62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc416ce6e-9728-482e-ad96-5ecb9413298a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Just one day after Trump was found liable for sexual abuse and defamation and ordered to pay $5 Million in damages to author E. Jean Carroll, he mocked her during his CNN town hall, calling her a “wack job” and calling the trial a “rigged deal.” Carroll has now decided to ask the judge to amend the lawsuit to seek further damages for Trump’s vile, disgusting comments. We want E. Jean Carroll to know that we back her 100%, and believe that Trump deserves everything that’s coming for him. [Add your name to support E. Jean Carroll in seeking further damages for what Trump said about her in his CNN town hall >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0bdfadca-72fd-419a-be6c-e3d7eb4f879c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Virginia Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: 5 seats from flipping →
body:
Our ability to block Gov. Youngkin’s far-right agenda and pass meaningful legislation hinges on electing strong Dems to lead the VA House. We only need to flip a few seats to retake control. | | |
---
| | **Did you see what’s happening in Virginia?** Since taking office, Republican Gov. Glenn Youngkin has created barriers to the ballot box, pushed an extreme abortion ban that threatens doctors with jail time, and proposed a budget that gives the ultra-wealthy massive tax handouts. _It’s absurd!_ _But there’s good news:_ This November, we have a chance to reclaim the Virginia House, defend our Senate majority, and deny Glenn Youngkin any opportunity to jam through his extreme agenda.**The DLCC is the only Democratic party committee committed to getting it done, and our efforts are ramping up quickly. So we’re coming to you directly:** [Losing in Virginia means handing extremists the power to enact their radical vision. When you pitch in $7, your donation immediately powers our work to defeat far-right Republicans in Virginia and nationwide. Step up right now »](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bNtWEzKGiF-8X7cclnrwrB8G5aVBN1FnaMWr8zHGmUjduTCg6bBARro2OJFbLDBLkNoa_Fe3xiLULiGr24DSdrYnXjtQgYABgSw-plMGIZbklS58D9p6Dfl-MgYQD0UOlzcrqc8gGvugdbQ3oe6jD2nFUBuC2jbjQuNCWJQExZgoUGveTfqbOKA-NCzFaC8oWW-7cWO7IiDKCQSVC-f7842EU1RjuCUDlOs-bVdbZ95f61zJNNFzO-f0lrJu8JxXM9u16wGkrRo1uJHUpXA2EHjDWraSZkkLiu7x1Iw64b2f8NOFCGKcH1UyBLrwcesxjaq89NVMJkbjLE7SDvj57KU/3wf/0OpoVBErQ-mINUKmTnde3w/h0/VK8tAKle8iZj8cSmpumbJxVBPdvdu1-D1Q-pWnZjZiA) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

**It gets worse: Glenn Youngkin is so bad, he even _refused_ to name a single policy difference with Donald Trump. **
Our ability to block Youngkin’s far-right agenda and pass meaningful progressive legislation hinges on electing strong Democrats to lead the Virginia House. We only need to flip five seats to retake control.
Your contribution today could help put Democrats over the top. Early investments right now go much further than those made in the weeks and months leading up to Election Day.
**[What do you say? Will you chip in $7 to empower Democrats in Virginia and across the country to run a robust grassroots organizing operation, mobilize voters in every corner of the nation, and support Democrats everywhere?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrplTq_6v4_7gQisubd1A2bNtWEzKGiF-8X7cclnrwrB8G5aVBN1FnaMWr8zHGmUjduTCg6bBARro2OJFbLDBLkNoa_Fe3xiLULiGr24DSdrYnXjtQgYABgSw-plMGIZbklS58D9p6Dfl-MgYQD0UOl4h9WbeCrfToz5FJum2XJ1hl4_WpU2ILXmGdNkUg7aRcAyCsd4M5OfzBqSxOEN8Tn2hshWGL0eKAoOUzYDo3uc4qg5wLYQJKky15ErEadOPyaAIalRttsbIvvD4DAe-uDecFXhokQEr2L5W4TYukyqzQX36ax8NqPOTPKLDxRyYfUobvQT9gcyUeq4dROnUE95S7_hgha6AsPYmkvanoBmk/3wf/0OpoVBErQ-mINUKmTnde3w/h6/2Kr4xVZJFPC2EreADuiqBY9U_uL61-JnZC6NbzuJpaw)**
Supporting our efforts to take back the Virginia House from Republicans will help make a lasting impact on the lives of millions of families across Virginia. November’s elections are pivotal.
Thank you for standing shoulder-to-shoulder with our party in this crucial fight. Your support makes all the difference.
With deep gratitude,
Team DLCC

Did you hear Joe Biden’s commencement address to Howard University’s class of 2023? | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/elderforpresident.com/230523-joe-biden-lies-about-america-fe29f8?e=0be619cbaa)

# Joe Biden Lies About America
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Peter , did you hear Joe Biden’s commencement address to Howard University’s class of 2023?

It was angry, pathetic, and – typical with this president – deceptive.

He repeated the completely debunked “fine people on both sides” hoax.

He said, to applause, “The most dangerous terrorist threat to our homeland is white supremacy.”

And according to America’s oldest and most divisive president ever, “The oldest, most sinister forces may believe they’ll determine America’s future, but they are wrong.”

Was he talking about himself?

Of all the reasons we must defeat Joe Biden and the Democrats in 2024, this — pitting Americans against Americans — is the most urgent one.

America is not a racist country.

We are the most accepting and most tolerant large, multi-racial society in human history, and it’s not close.

More black Africans have come to America of their own free will than were brought here on slave ships.

America is the only white-majority country to elect (and then re-elect!) a black president.

Americans hear the Biden and Democrat/Left narrative all the time, everywhere: “America is systemically racist!”

[This is a lie](https://larryelder.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6a42253df6197f177f9e13389&id=c21d6faf41&e=0be619cbaa).

And it’s one of the reasons I’m running for president. To have the opportunity to demolish the myth of “systemic racism” to tens of millions of Americans.

At speeches, rallies, on TV, and yes, during the primary debates, I will make the case over and over that Democrats use the lie of systemic racism to divide and conquer.

America is not just a great country; we are a good country, no matter what the Democratic Party says.

With your help, I will bring this message to the ears of many Americans who don’t hear it from their leaders anymore. Your support is crucial today with a contribution of $1 or more. We can no longer wait.

**I’m Larry Elder, and we’ve got a country to save.**
---

Fellow American, it’s Nancy Mace (the high school drop-out got her start as a Waffle House Waitress). [**I need a quick moment of your time.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1c826f26ab75439eaf530d8257b6c3e2&_e=OGec-hTJFsqKCBCNgCVGBaW0nPnY5gzCkpGaHR4ANAY_qwx9yH1gSNFZ3Gmtd467C_EhMRhX-GBRldGw-n9pr2bYjRDfhKGSCal-VbHve1110wT8Z-3GpaACoaWDm122A6UIO-2tLCCXzDqGWrLU3Q0yX9VvOGDM6gLFTpeEY3Z9sXm2GXcDYBwC_GtMqjalj5RuF2CNpewF-dPalyaLouRcCge27b-jrUsBShxXhHMyS4NtqedtphYO1GE5i58ialrBfgBCuMblO07jB0SvNWHiaS55l4eBsYE6RDSjIxwjLXd0sjDuq1agryhab05BhsJQ8mRw7C5w2RfwmYoy713OQUTD6jCV1QOw4EO7Cq9H5xzJElc2sHaNjXiM--u2Uz8b1sRjrsDLiTJFtldBwwYMC-zj_nO3-PuwCcGiVQ0%3D)

**The short version:**
I’m up against the clock on my fundraising goal and will miss it unless you take action immediately. Remember, I’m running in a district we barely flipped in 2020, and fighting tooth and nail to keep in red. [**I need to know if I can count on you to help in the next 15 minutes.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1c826f26ab75439eaf530d8257b6c3e2&_e=OGec-hTJFsqKCBCNgCVGBaW0nPnY5gzCkpGaHR4ANAY_qwx9yH1gSNFZ3Gmtd467C_EhMRhX-GBRldGw-n9pr2bYjRDfhKGSCal-VbHve1110wT8Z-3GpaACoaWDm122A6UIO-2tLCCXzDqGWrLU3Q0yX9VvOGDM6gLFTpeEY3Z9sXm2GXcDYBwC_GtMqjalj5RuF2CNpewF-dPalyaLouRcCge27b-jrUsBShxXhHMyS4NtqedtphYO1GE5i58ialrBfgBCuMblO07jB0SvNQhTaIfVjFUvzysFWKMe_8_riPuG2juUXg8_FRRag9n4qlshWkneBbroeAclWHcAfndIIhJrE9ZP5RwxTYA9FAKA8PPMSKAkPNu592pSZcZB6YaQCnwRYK9CpwAW8OgkulWw996Q0UUD8mLePb_8_XE%3D)

**The long version:**
This is what I didn’t want to have to send you, Fellow American. I know how bad things are right now. People are struggling to afford rent, buy groceries, and fill up their tank at the gas pump.

I’ve been there. Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck. At 17 years old, I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table.

I didn’t grow up with millions in the bank, and a silver spoon in my mouth. My dad was an Army General and my mom a schoolteacher. My parents taught me the key to success, **work**. And working is what I’ve been doing since I was 17.

Congress is in desperate need of someone to come in and shake things up – someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. _Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices._

So now you see why I had to email you today and ask for your immediate support. [**My fundraising deadline is coming up quickly and I’m behind. Will you tap the secure link and make an emergency donation to my campaign to send a hard-working, every-day American to Washington to fight for you?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=1c826f26ab75439eaf530d8257b6c3e2&_e=OGec-hTJFsqKCBCNgCVGBaW0nPnY5gzCkpGaHR4ANAY_qwx9yH1gSNFZ3Gmtd467C_EhMRhX-GBRldGw-n9pr2bYjRDfhKGSCal-VbHve1110wT8Z-3GpaACoaWDm122A6UIO-2tLCCXzDqGWrLU3Q0yX9VvOGDM6gLFTpeEY3Z9sXm2GXcDYBwC_GtMqjalj5RuF2CNpewF-dPalyaLouRcCge27b-jrUsBShxXhHMyS4NtqedtphYO1GE5i58ialrBfgBCuMblO07jB0SvNRyzE9bgJzSLKbV0sxKSaN71-L7O9YISp5lQ2vJLbs1uuohvDdJqZhWSHzAU_muv1ybFnHFgEkLVjF63ExgxGTQtuLvmMun3XA6pZUQxWxAk7GEYZjMQLBK-lowHwwtD7hl6HdHqvnxCkI_zvSc9gqs%3D)

body:
And despite that, Mothers Against Drunk Driving doesn't think my wife and I would make good speakers at their gatherings because I'm a Republican U.S. Senate candidate.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=482dc857acc9443f81b282f5e7e9b569&_t=i-K2jMdN786WCD2WOHgiSuqU-TJ45LexwG8fgpCZGE7p7VoJLXScQoU-bw4nGNcJioEp3OGlId4ji3PjvCpEVgwPS-274siLfwyQ1vA1Xk4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=482dc857acc9443f81b282f5e7e9b569&_t=i-K2jMdN786WCD2WOHgiSuqU-TJ45LexwG8fgpCZGE7p7VoJLXScQoU-bw4nGNcJioEp3OGlId4ji3PjvCpEVgwPS-274siLfwyQ1vA1Xk4%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. **I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving.**

First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit.

**Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today.**
Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a **Mothers Against Drunk Driving** event this July in Phoenix.

**We would have been the perfect fit.** Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022.

Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, **you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers**.

**The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political.**

**[I need your help to send a message to organizations, like MADD, who are bending to pressure from WOKE, far-left activities and canceling anyone who disagrees with their looney-tune out of left-field rhetoric.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=482dc857acc9443f81b282f5e7e9b569&_e=ZEyMIx3CUA3gqHBYaXoT4WezorbT62QFkOWrF21HOgry6aTrIGW3eFNIKBvEKEFSwRdByzrhx_gxMHRuSu8g7rWbY3TxGYlLyz7PQ_Y1Td807_0EiI710OGDVfNvBpVRRlTln7xbJ7tg_DXh1jee1RNAozEQ_yz9EmpWczNUne9WupEbor68PpnNFZC-32Kc0atgM2MhCr0QL6xDjFDnL7p8TEBroDmcUPBfpR4Q41mNr5pSt-dEPWiOR0cU_8CL6a1uMcBDHr-r-TDTHWqkjakjoDfwpf1uEaARnPur6htVdGKb9U3RtRwUUNxjTk2EMbICQMgdP9LPMGcx4Mvvzl4a4xMM3F56XG9NwsWOd9nZXqYaE7dnWwOSf3r5AXplDg-ktWz8VG4PDIyiH7wMiQ%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=482dc857acc9443f81b282f5e7e9b569&_e=ZEyMIx3CUA3gqHBYaXoT4WezorbT62QFkOWrF21HOgry6aTrIGW3eFNIKBvEKEFSwRdByzrhx_gxMHRuSu8g7rWbY3TxGYlLyz7PQ_Y1Td807_0EiI710OGDVfNvBpVRRlTln7xbJ7tg_DXh1jee1RNAozEQ_yz9EmpWczNUne9WupEbor68PpnNFZC-32Kc0atgM2MhCr0QL6xDjFDnL7p8TEBroDmcUPBfpR4Q41kEb2LeuXPl_5oHLlBsK2Q0ivM8bql6b-ZzTixbLiIviC7Rt2e3IdsTHW-quwwU-DnpU6moJUYXcwgnvEwBs6Bq63LVBv6w5SbR8tYz1V6SrCAplnutGktwzVfQ-FYCakYeTwBorgYyCyutpGlOiw1OAQPAJFl3Cd56RrY_MoQ7TA%3D%3D)

It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. **Let me be crystal clear:** the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; **they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold.**

**This would _never_ happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate.**

Please accept my invitation today to **[sign my petition telling Mothers Against Drunk Driving that politicizing the deaths of drunk driving victims is just plain wrong.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=482dc857acc9443f81b282f5e7e9b569&_e=ZEyMIx3CUA3gqHBYaXoT4WezorbT62QFkOWrF21HOgry6aTrIGW3eFNIKBvEKEFSwRdByzrhx_gxMHRuSu8g7rWbY3TxGYlLyz7PQ_Y1Td807_0EiI710OGDVfNvBpVRRlTln7xbJ7tg_DXh1jee1RNAozEQ_yz9EmpWczNUne9WupEbor68PpnNFZC-32Kc0atgM2MhCr0QL6xDjFDnL7p8TEBroDmcUPBfpR4Q41kV7ZVNiPoxvdeQROc3Ejl9wzjvfwo9oaQNRYPUDnQJVQrep0ZsDTj1-EVg18sHUxtWPgA5lDMlojB6ZMhHuGjvP9oPxQJjTJwSZf3rELYXf4eBHxLLIrPf2YEE-8gqY60S92AkiGUrYTDWP01P4SGHEfNB-p-u9nn80COmF68UpA%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=482dc857acc9443f81b282f5e7e9b569&_e=ZEyMIx3CUA3gqHBYaXoT4WezorbT62QFkOWrF21HOgry6aTrIGW3eFNIKBvEKEFSwRdByzrhx_gxMHRuSu8g7rWbY3TxGYlLyz7PQ_Y1Td807_0EiI710OGDVfNvBpVRRlTln7xbJ7tg_DXh1jee1RNAozEQ_yz9EmpWczNUne9WupEbor68PpnNFZC-32Kc0atgM2MhCr0QL6xDjFDnL7p8TEBroDmcUPBfpR4Q41npH_oRh05aGppvNjVSVQHvdLtNGnAiPwGVB5ww0JrO3_rZ5C5FwvgSwF4qNaCA1FJ2AAXSwvLYwalAQ3ch-SAFu10qPK4lfHOhH0byCC_5O0lilcCZQoPnj8bts9Dh1xVi-1DaqQWO7ypr7Qd5GVb0yQz40KuQkrm6Mxbb-tWfmw%3D%3D)

**We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore**.

Organizations like **Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political.** Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow.

**Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds.**

This cancel culture is DISGRACEFUL. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. clean_body: And despite that, Mothers Against Drunk Driving doesn't think my wife and I would make good speakers at their gatherings because I'm a Republican U.S. Senate candidate. | | Fellow Conservative, In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving. First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit. Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today. Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a Mothers Against Drunk Driving event this July in Phoenix. We would have been the perfect fit. Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022. Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers. The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political. It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. Let me be crystal clear: the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold. This would never happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate. Please accept my invitation today to We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore. Organizations like Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political. Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow. Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds. This cancel culture is DISGRACEFUL. If you agree, . Sincerely, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. ******Friend, here’s what you need to know about the House GOP’s plan to gut key programs:
**
❌ _They’ll slash healthcare benefits to military veterans_ by slashing **81,000 jobs** at the Veterans Health Administration, **meaning veterans will be unable to get appointments for wellness visits, cancer screenings, and mental health services.**

❌ _They’ll gut food assistance programs to**1.7 million women, infants, and children** , and over 900,000 seniors_ through drastic cuts to nutrition assistance programs like SNAP, WIC, and Meals on Wheels.

❌ _They’ll jeopardize the healthcare coverage of**21 million Americans.**_
[**Friend, the GOP’s extreme plans to dramatically force cuts on hard-working families, military veterans, children, and seniors are egregious. So we have to stop them. Will you chip in $5 to help our team fight back against GOP extremism? »**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKMESXaE6NL3dPa6SXUcsfAqLcGc8bdelHtaa3a_FsrvXpAlB2aAfdCz3sIZNjYivt0dVd4CiR_xHdrBuljZWy3BzICuASq1i8cLHVa9czS8C9pnLiaikJPM1w93iW2dappWo3rtwiwdxgc1ZykXu0lrDQ0QbPtqUM8T789NlKDMTKOVEgiiFl-T1SF2Bp_KaZd8BOnL8feLsFIBBChckedW-6CXEkvOT1E4qRkKOLNcEoNVAjLsIk4ts4YAB9p2o1lL_v6-uARoDHeOypgZU5sISCWfO8yWYEjccFHX625Y3Omf8l1MBXd_ECWaSOk-KQ-i2E54EFYi-SiJgSndJcbv9RDz3_M9vXodj0baEs9RwAVoZCosVG8H1mpSDGj75mF33rEw2RgmaUGnbmCQeQow/3wf/yReFYOjYSIu1m81VBjCACA/h4/wo9kG_KboEG9jN3v8Bza3EG64yzxM9A0BQirMT5O65o)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: About the information crisis
body:
The Washington Post, NPR, VICE News, and CNN.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1018%2E120351%2EvvEkdx)
The Washington Post, NPR, VICE News, and CNN.
Peter, these are just a few of the media groups who have announced massive layoffs and programming cancellations over the past few months. As these cuts sweep the mainstream media, the US’ information crisis grows deeper — with even more people being left without reliable news sources.
**That means Courier Newsroom’s mission to provide trustworthy, factual local news is more important than ever.**
[**The only way we’re able to retain our talented reporters and keep up this critical work is because of grassroots donors like you, so will you chip in $5 now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3716?refcode=em-20230523&t=2&akid=1018%2E120351%2EvvEkdx)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3716?refcode=em-20230523&t=3&akid=1018%2E120351%2EvvEkdx)**
Right now, we have local newsrooms in eight different battleground states. Our on-the-ground reporters focus their coverage on local and state news stories, but they also keep their readers informed on what’s happening at the federal level — and how it will impact their communities.
Their tailored approach to the news fills in the gaps otherwise left by the mainstream media. With the latest layoffs and cuts by major media groups, **we can only expect these gaps to widen.**
[**It’s up to us at Courier Newsroom to pick up the slack and deliver accurate, essential news stories to our readers — but to do that, we need resources. If you believe in our mission, will you chip in $5 today to power our work?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3716?refcode=em-20230523&t=4&akid=1018%2E120351%2EvvEkdx)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3716?refcode=em-20230523&t=5&akid=1018%2E120351%2EvvEkdx)**
Thanks for your support,
The Courier Newsroom Team
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=1018_120351_vvEkdx&akid=1018%2E120351%2EvvEkdx)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1018%2E120351%2EvvEkdx)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

Team -- Nearly a year ago, the far-right Supreme Court majority took a dangerous step and ripped away reproductive rights from _millions_ by overturning _Roe v. Wade_.

**Overnight, abortion was banned in multiple states, and Republicans everywhere launched a radical crusade to destroy our most fundamental rights --_but we're not going to let them get away with it_.**

Justice Sotomayor says we can never fall into despair. We have to get up and keep fighting -- so we MUST stand together and show that Democrats won't back down. **Please take action TODAY:**

**[Sign our CRUCIAL Democratic petition to fight for reproductive rights and REJECT the far right's heinous attacks >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/11585?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230523-ActionNeeded-RoePreAnniversary-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230523-ActionNeeded-RoePreAnniversary-ETG-sl1&akid=10844%2E9716520%2EIukSIT)**

name: Jon Tester

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks, Jon Tester here.
I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.
I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.
Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.
These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:
Can you split a donation between Seth Moulton and my campaign? We need to raise another $1,000,000 to reach our goal. Anything you can give helps. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
This will be one of the most competitive races of 2024, and I’ll need your help from the very beginning to build a team strong enough to win.
Thank you,
Jon
