clean_body: | Team, servant leadership is important to me. As a former Army Ranger, servant leadership meant putting the needs of the lowest-ranking Private and every other team member ahead of my own. That meant leading by example and being the first to jump out of the plane. Every single time. I’ve always been driven to be part of something bigger than myself. That’s continued even after serving in the Army. When I saw that Colorado’s values were under assault in Washington, I felt that call to serve again. Since then, I’ve channeled that servant leadership to fight so no Coloradan is left behind. It’s not easy, but it must be done. Our community deserves nothing less. Truth be told, this will be a tough election. Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, and GOP leaders are ready to throw everything to flip Colorado red. But I won’t let the odds stop me from fighting. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, Jason | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. * He pushed to impose $20 BILLION in new taxes on hard-working American families.

* He cast the deciding vote on the bill that authorized the hiring of 87,000 new IRS agents to harass YOUR family.

* He’s spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants (**and didn’t even bring home a doggy bag...**)

* He votes with Joe Biden almost 90% of the time and is responsible for fewer jobs, higher taxes, record inflation, and skyrocketing energy costs.

As long as he is in Washington, **Joe Manchin will continue to bite the hands that feed him here in West Virginia to appease Biden and the radical Democrats**.

Babydog Justice

| **MEET JIM**

Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs.

Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team.

Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog.

He doesn't play political games (the only games he plays are with me), and This campaign won’t be a walk in the park. His opponent, Democrat Joe Manchin, is a career politician who hasn’t lost a race since the ’90s. He has over $9 MILLION in his campaign accounts, and the Left is all-in to defend his seat. Truthfully, Sen. Manchin belongs in the DOG HOUSE, NOT the Senate. He pushed to impose $20 BILLION in new taxes on hard-working American families. He cast the deciding vote on the bill that authorized the hiring of 87,000 new IRS agents to harass YOUR family. He’s spent more than $1 million in campaign funds on fine dining at fancy restaurants (and didn’t even bring home a doggy bag...) He votes with Joe Biden almost 90% of the time and is responsible for fewer jobs, higher taxes, record inflation, and skyrocketing energy costs. As long as he is in Washington, Joe Manchin will continue to bite the hands that feed him here in West Virginia to appease Biden and the radical Democrats. I’m PAW-sitive we CAN defeat Joe Manchin and get America back on track, Truthfully, we need to get supporters in the doggy door so we can run the campaign it will take to compete with Manchin’s fundraising machine and FLIP this Senate seat. Any time you can spare to offer your opinions would be a real treat, Peter. This race will be the BIGGEST Senate race of 2024, and the Democrats will spend whatever it takes to keep my Dad from WINNING. Your four-legged friend, Babydog Justice | MEET JIM Gov. Jim Justice is a conservative leader, successful businessman, high school basketball coach, and devoted family man. Before being elected, Gov. Justice led over 100 companies, creating thousands of jobs. Gov. Justice has delivered on his promise of diversifying West Virginia's economy. He enacted the largest personal income tax cut in state history. He protects traditional values and has been recognized as a pro-life champion, signing more pro-life legislation into law than any governor in state history. As an avid outdoorsman, he vigorously defends the Second Amendment. He is passionate about mentoring young people and serves as the head coach of his local high school basketball team. Gov. Justice and his wife, First Lady Cathy Justice, have been best friends since high school. They recently celebrated their 46th wedding anniversary. The Governor and the First Lady have two adult children and spend time spoiling four grandchildren. In addition, they have three dogs: Lucy and Ellie, Boston Terriers, and their famous Babydog, an English Bulldog. Join the Conversation: | Paid for by Jim Justice for U.S. Senate

name: Michael Bennet
subject: another calculated attack on reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63717313/407749441/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBjYWI2Ni1hN2Y5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pgyaw2bVfCPnUhnZT4XEbiPTAt3EpgpPy-yT0amV60Q=)
Team, In the middle of the night last month, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a 6-week abortion ban, affecting as many as 4 million Florida women. Since then, Republican majorities have passed bans in Nebraska, North Carolina, and North Dakota. In total, abortions are banned in twenty different states. These policies are not based on any sort of science or research. They are, however, another calculated attack on reproductive rights. Leaders pushing their far-right, radical agenda have been working to dismantle reproductive rights for decades. They’ve had some big victories in the last year, with the Supreme Court handing them their biggest with the _Dobbs_ decision. That's why restoring and protecting reproductive rights nationwide is one of my top priorities in the Senate. Here are four bills I’m fighting for right now:
1. The _Women’s Health and Protection Act_ (WHPA) would finally codify abortion rights into federal law, guarantee equal access to abortion across the nation, and protect against any future challenges of our reproductive rights;
2. The _Let Doctors Provide Reproductive Health Care Act_ would protect doctors and providers in states where abortion remains legal from prosecution for providing abortions;
3. The _SAFER Health Act_ would strengthen privacy protections to prohibit providers from disclosing information related to abortion or pregnancy loss;
4. The _Equal Access to Abortion Coverage in Health Insurance_ (EACH) Act would guarantee abortion coverage for those who rely on Medicaid and other federal health plans.

While Colorado is a safe haven for women seeking reproductive care, women across the country are already facing the consequences of a post-Roe world. And, now, my Republican colleagues have made it clear that they want a federal law to ban abortion nationwide — including right here in Colorado. [**Will you add your name today and join me in calling on Congress to pass these bills into law? Join this coalition of people fighting for reproductive rights all across the country, and here in Colorado. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63717314/407749442/-1285935991?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBjYWI2Ni1hN2Y5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pgyaw2bVfCPnUhnZT4XEbiPTAt3EpgpPy-yT0amV60Q=&emci=170cab66-a7f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=210cab66-a7f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) **With your help, we can meet our critical end-of-month deadline and work to restore reproductive rights for women nationwide.** | **[Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63717315/407749443/-1285935991?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTBjYWI2Ni1hN2Y5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pgyaw2bVfCPnUhnZT4XEbiPTAt3EpgpPy-yT0amV60Q=&emci=170cab66-a7f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=210cab66-a7f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**
---
The fight we're in right now was manufactured on the far-right over many decades. The road ahead of us is long, but it's one of the most important battles we're waging right now.
Thank you for being a part of this, friend,
Michael
---

Denver, CO 80201
United States

Peter,

This should go without saying, but Congress should _not_ be run by folks craven enough to risk crashing the global economy to get one over on their political rivals.

House Republicans won't agree to raise the debt ceiling without making huge cuts to government programs that support working families and seniors. **They've essentially hijacked the economy to force their political agenda, and time is running out to make a real deal.**

**[Kevin McCarthy and 'Team Extreme' are literally playing chicken with the lives of the American people. If you're sick of the brinkmanship, help us win back a serious majority in Congress. Republicans talk a big game about “fiscal responsibility," and we're already hearing some Republicans whipping out old faithful -- calling Democrats _"tax and spend liberals."_ **Never mind that former president Trump added more to our national debt than any other president in history with his massive tax cuts for billionaires!**

That is not what this is about.

Today's far-right is not afraid to drive us over the debt limit cliff and into economic freefall to score a cheap political win. Remember, these are the same folks Kevin McCarthy welcomed into his conference with open arms. Now, they're forcing him to choose between holding his Speakership or taking us into a default and tanking the economy.

**[We need to bring some sanity back to Congress, that means securing a House majority that will put the good of the country before partisan politics. | The Radical Left is working nonstop to completely shred our Constitution and destroy everything America stands for.

Thankfully, the Conservative Justices are in their way.

Peter, when you become a Founding Donor to this campaign, you're making a statement. You're saying that you believe in Joe and Kamala’s vision for America. You're saying that you want an economy built from the bottom up and the middle out -- not the top down. name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: A drunk driver took my son eight days before Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Despite that, Mothers Against Drunk Driving just uninvited my wife and I from speaking at an event because of our conservative politics
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=0b696add4b3d4fbbab20cb9342a580b5&_t=hW_RzZdI8D6Yy4u_K2b81swMcy8W22jYE_7Zyb1SrJdQVZ98zz71wJOAAhTFyft9C1YvAfYeTiSzfXfv_sd1H2RSePS-F_ih8jI71ndjXjo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=0b696add4b3d4fbbab20cb9342a580b5&_t=hW_RzZdI8D6Yy4u_K2b81swMcy8W22jYE_7Zyb1SrJdQVZ98zz71wJOAAhTFyft9C1YvAfYeTiSzfXfv_sd1H2RSePS-F_ih8jI71ndjXjo%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0b696add4b3d4fbbab20cb9342a580b5&_e=r65z-nqba0fO71DjF5a-NA3an7JLRwnaFJv3cwwhVmxXMUWKBY4Dr8RRHpHYQR2E3zO39d1AlIsopYtKRETI1flkLWABdss-bXz3C1Fp3rr0n7TK_d9reGf6PCI3bR3GWX6lqSZwivu1Cr7d_4c0WXFStF2uYFl1dvDjOAm9wVmj0b7tgx9ZFkPypPfKw5ThKhu-8-ScGts4fiCI5kMRkL9dFaIPfT6t9EHwhu_hahF0KbMPaKMw785wTRLNohXlVt2unPtLAA8-bS3FzQkg4yPOAC_fcX8R13dmYkcEV_2VDPd_FWoblDi2nWZUUz8eVvgxZNJDMV50ZnBJOIvRNXwx8bHDWvcZ6uisHGo4cs-UQd8f5q1FrLiLW2lCU_iKqPkaCCYgG4Ni4fklJyuWdQ%3D%3D)
|
Peter,

In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. **I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving.**

First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit.

**Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today.**
Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a **Mothers Against Drunk Driving** event this July in Phoenix.

**We would have been the perfect fit.** Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022.

Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, **you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers**.

**The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political.**

**[I need your help to send a message to organizations, like MADD, who are bending to pressure from WOKE, far-left activities and canceling anyone who disagrees with their looney-tune out of left-field rhetoric.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0b696add4b3d4fbbab20cb9342a580b5&_e=r65z-nqba0fO71DjF5a-NA3an7JLRwnaFJv3cwwhVmxXMUWKBY4Dr8RRHpHYQR2E3zO39d1AlIsopYtKRETI1flkLWABdss-bXz3C1Fp3rr0n7TK_d9reGf6PCI3bR3GWX6lqSZwivu1Cr7d_4c0WXFStF2uYFl1dvDjOAm9wVmj0b7tgx9ZFkPypPfKw5ThKhu-8-ScGts4fiCI5kMRkL9dFaIPfT6t9EHwhu_hahGts0-_UFtMPKh-iiqSmmbNgg-AsnrgOVCh2fKj9-lSGRJSMDkmnnnZenDLlXvR6F16FAAekjQeh3yXNSlTcNiHJBQgbI6mzoIlmCt7rA6LLNU__YClmUXDVhgEJrQDQnat49QuFXjQdAzOJo1IVt4b-sJILM1AbJW-A6q1Bn2CMg%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0b696add4b3d4fbbab20cb9342a580b5&_e=r65z-nqba0fO71DjF5a-NA3an7JLRwnaFJv3cwwhVmxXMUWKBY4Dr8RRHpHYQR2E3zO39d1AlIsopYtKRETI1flkLWABdss-bXz3C1Fp3rr0n7TK_d9reGf6PCI3bR3GWX6lqSZwivu1Cr7d_4c0WXFStF2uYFl1dvDjOAm9wVmj0b7tgx9ZFkPypPfKw5ThKhu-8-ScGts4fiCI5kMRkL9dFaIPfT6t9EHwhu_hahH6EHJtEvFnklqlqbwvIF7mfmhxpeOkFfwbUbbISwsDn97xNx0lzW3HbtlnrmI9Yza8w0viyZFvPWSAOcZjReuPVyD4sbNACOpCdrMqzhTJCsjb4xLh-VzhKbPWtiQgZuiIgJ_3I65mX883tEjfUuQZOCGH7syP7dpLGhrE261PJw%3D%3D)

It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. **Let me be crystal clear:** the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; **they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold.**

**This would _never_ happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate.**

Please accept my invitation today to **[sign my petition telling Mothers Against Drunk Driving that politicizing the deaths of drunk driving victims is just plain wrong.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0b696add4b3d4fbbab20cb9342a580b5&_e=r65z-nqba0fO71DjF5a-NA3an7JLRwnaFJv3cwwhVmxXMUWKBY4Dr8RRHpHYQR2E3zO39d1AlIsopYtKRETI1flkLWABdss-bXz3C1Fp3rr0n7TK_d9reGf6PCI3bR3GWX6lqSZwivu1Cr7d_4c0WXFStF2uYFl1dvDjOAm9wVmj0b7tgx9ZFkPypPfKw5ThKhu-8-ScGts4fiCI5kMRkL9dFaIPfT6t9EHwhu_hahFLYmACuAKT_bD3GFjw9bdTh9n86w-lX5dG8qa6yHu_SL_W0S3B3kNhCHsyY5PTsZyc0Ho5KcgCLEv4FLPNPjvu5ZSq0XI9EaOm1cryclmOhZuMnWH7U31A-N5pbS22Dm1jUp9Zqd7EEbxVyhZHZASplzK034c_aC3mRfizso3mpQ%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=0b696add4b3d4fbbab20cb9342a580b5&_e=r65z-nqba0fO71DjF5a-NA3an7JLRwnaFJv3cwwhVmxXMUWKBY4Dr8RRHpHYQR2E3zO39d1AlIsopYtKRETI1flkLWABdss-bXz3C1Fp3rr0n7TK_d9reGf6PCI3bR3GWX6lqSZwivu1Cr7d_4c0WXFStF2uYFl1dvDjOAm9wVmj0b7tgx9ZFkPypPfKw5ThKhu-8-ScGts4fiCI5kMRkL9dFaIPfT6t9EHwhu_hahGlfh-KCrSjOSgOYcds7ZWvfoImwTZZyXiUc_7IghEtvuPK5rInTeemqHIPWShslD8dSVIRnq4XNhtynIm-VkIiIDnVUwAPu_4dwGpIwHNoap0S6eUxLJIhzMIkunD4fC84uUvxqijJQBLwE0fOEXRKxIzT6_vOyH7Mi2H6on1bqQ%3D%3D)

**We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore**.

Organizations like **Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political.** Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow.

**Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds.**

This cancel culture is DISGRACEFUL. clean_body: Despite that, Mothers Against Drunk Driving just uninvited my wife and I from speaking at an event because of our conservative politics | | Peter, In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving. First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit. Let me read you in on what happened and why I’m reaching out with this story today. Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a Mothers Against Drunk Driving event this July in Phoenix. We would have been the perfect fit. Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022. Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers. The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political. It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. Let me be crystal clear: the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don’t know me or my wife; they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold. This would never happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate. Please accept my invitation today to We must send a message that we won’t tolerate this anymore. Organizations like Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn’t be political. Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow. Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds. This cancel culture is DISGRACEFUL. If you agree, . Sincerely, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Team Trone
subject: STOP MAGA Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Trone for Maryland
body:
Peter,

Our country is at a critical juncture right now.

We need to continue to build on the legislative progress instituted by Democrats – making inroads to address climate change, capping out of pocket prices on life-saving insulin, and more.

But MAGA Republicans are doing everything they can to STALL progressive legislation and DENY valid election results.

So much so, that they’re willing to crash the U.S. economy just because they don’t like how President Biden is creating clean energy jobs and taking action on climate change.

Here’s where you come in: we need everyone reading this email to show their support for a Democratic Senate and STOP MAGA Republicans.

Will you add your name to get on our official list of folks who support a Democratic majority >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/5o7Xbggr6Umlk4-8QT27xQ2

One of the reasons why David is running for the Senate is to ensure Democratic voices in the Senate can continue to thrive.

With election deniers out in full force, we need to do everything we can to make sure Democrats can hold the Senate.

Thank you for your support.

– Team Trone

Paid for by David Trone for Maryland.
David Trone for Maryland
P.O. Box 83998
Gaithersburg, MD 20883-3998
United States

So, I'm inviting you one LAST time today. | OFFICIAL INVITATION Will you participate in my first annual GOP Speaker's Survey? DEADLINE: MAY, 2023 GOP PARTY ID: 01891 EMAIL: "dpwillis67@gmail.com" | | | | | Please, I'm hoping we can rely on your expertise sooner rather than later. -Speaker McCarthy | | Paid for by Jake Ellzey for Congress PO BOX 341027 Austin, TX 78734 Jake Ellzey retired from the U.S. Navy. Team – right now, voting rights are under attack across the country.

Republicans at the state and federal levels are pushing restrictive laws that aim to disenfranchise voters and undermine our democracy. Voter ID laws, attempts to curb youth voting, and gerrymandering are just a few of the ways right-wing politicians are trying to make it harder for people to cast their ballots in fair elections.

Any attempt to quiet voices in our democracy rather than amplify them goes against our core values. We have to stand up and fight back against attacks on our democratic principles.

[Nikki’s been standing firm against these efforts, and was even recognized as a youth vote champion for her efforts to keep our democracy free and fair. name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: Peter, will you help us out?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We’re launching a new goal for May.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=74%2E552475%2E-ox_Le)
Hi Peter, it’s Tiernan, Bob Casey’s campaign manager. 👋
I just sat down with my team to map out the campaign we need to build. We’re readying to be one of the most competitive and expensive races on the map, so we’re launching a fundraising goal to ensure we can defend this Senate seat, which CNN has ranked as one of the “Most Likely to Flip in 2024.”
**[Mitch McConnell is targeting our race, so we’re hoping to raise $25,000 in online donations by May 31 to fight back. Peter, are you in? Any amount you can contribute today will put us one step closer to re-electing Bob.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230523-1?refcode=em20230523-1&refcode2=74_552475_-ox_Le&akid=74%2E552475%2E-ox_Le)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230523-1?refcode=em20230523-1&refcode2=74_552475_-ox_Le&akid=74%2E552475%2E-ox_Le)
We don’t set these goals arbitrarily. The whole team works together to look at our fundraising reports and make sure we are on track to raise the resources we need to win.
When we look ahead, we know that our battleground Senate race will be expensive — that’s just the reality. That means the funds we raise early on will make a big impact. The more we raise now, the earlier we’ll be able to reach voters across Pennsylvania, put up TV ads, and start building out the best on-the-ground operation.
**[With your support, we can reach our $25,000 May fundraising goal, build a strong campaign statewide, and stop the GOP from flipping Pennsylvania’s Senate seat. Please donate now to help defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230523-1?refcode=em20230523-1&refcode2=74_552475_-ox_Le&akid=74%2E552475%2E-ox_Le)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230523-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230523-1&refcode2=74_552475_-ox_Le&akid=74%2E552475%2E-ox_Le)**
With gratitude,
Tiernan
Tiernan Donohue
Campaign Manager, Bob Casey for Senate

[**May 23, 1928:** Rosemary Clooney was born in Maysville, Kentucky. Later she moved to Cincinnati, Ohio, to live with her grandfather, where she began her singing career on the local radio station. She found success after moving to New York City and signing with Columbia Records. Notable facts about Clooney are her memorable role in White Christmas (1954) and her nephew, famous actor George Clooney.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ce89fc5b03284e9b9af86f6df867de1a&_e=8pHAWWTJ96JenguPE2z_g3lcjGfb5gkphIhe4s16EcJmRiOVCatX8eT5CLrSmugSgmnD91NEUjpke5rpYDm8Z6d7fDq-GXp1G5qEy88YLPpeG1LFeNZooPRF5pUr9hv3uFobth8PtwNUnvG09Op5G8FDUm1n8HcDp_uktCUyDANCGJ6Mb2aclov3AhKwthZhpVBlW_iVI4zse9Kyay5oNtC4aByHwWmWYkGGCML8Oc8%3D) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ce89fc5b03284e9b9af86f6df867de1a&_e=8pHAWWTJ96JenguPE2z_g3lcjGfb5gkphIhe4s16EcJmRiOVCatX8eT5CLrSmugSgmnD91NEUjpke5rpYDm8Z64p2ZnHVOas8y_WypElziQPvG2CoGRvvVbNXwr1YWjprA6bDrVm9by4WnNXHkb0DV-UFrvqXkooNY95IIbrKk3qYg2HXSbUmC_b2ZRag7kp7Lldi8rdsm0EvaFYawr88csvGxAI3n0r61oYoHer8ZA%3D)[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ce89fc5b03284e9b9af86f6df867de1a&_e=8pHAWWTJ96JenguPE2z_g7zOzjLXq8AhjMRM8s3Rt6F32jJ-s1krqDrlPJiWLRib9O5DA3lov12tay_AzZs3S4_Vp3aCrV_ums_7-WWEic9LQMgft8faAw_v6If-38Z1rzZFuFCkgjUoUuRDcaLJhY0J6WCqtR8UFeTwINPU9s390o6o6Mpfs3YMjwlIFjq8y7V5uOKhENQAfj9-hF-B0RTbKHhcqrT2dEx0592xcH_Bv-6zgeIXmsFAwnFS3j7I)**

[**May 23, 1934:** Notorious Bonnie Parker and Clyde Barrow were killed in Bienville Parish, Louisiana, after their high-profile FBI manhunt across the country. The pair met in 1930, and after Barrow was paroled from prison in 1932, they went on to commit a string of robberies, murders, and theft across the United States. ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ce89fc5b03284e9b9af86f6df867de1a&_e=8pHAWWTJ96JenguPE2z_gzH45sNcrROyA-aBr6rT8nL2Y692JZqUStt2pspfIZtguGdBnEXZIL64MhykcC36-kcoV5PZdi7El5LYfeaepUrdh1yy2LfGaW1ggT5gbrbTX7FS8f4-K_C55_Z69r27dZo20cng64TN-NXulr3okxjcCB6HXF5Mo8BQzPIHcH0b6uLcISLVymh6_W-yTgkKWJfW1INidFJYJQl2nvOU3pf-JKXLd_AL1SRacyRsG3ezhb1n2wIeO2JJQ-elH1y8FGD1lBi85Xg1dqTyHXmnkGii6fn7JCSKLHrqblkBP8tU) **Source -[fbi.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=ce89fc5b03284e9b9af86f6df867de1a&_e=8pHAWWTJ96JenguPE2z_gzH45sNcrROyA-aBr6rT8nL2Y692JZqUStt2pspfIZtguGdBnEXZIL64MhykcC36-kcoV5PZdi7El5LYfeaepUrdh1yy2LfGaW1ggT5gbrbTX7FS8f4-K_C55_Z69r27dZo20cng64TN-NXulr3okxgJB3Rk9i6OnurRtTRx-cQN0T0w4L6HQktbuJHDd2OW2Y4Gbs9Lz1DMOq07AWcMzZd2LyUo6vCpjebUuyKt5dWQwzDrdBCNT0RpNTDEQzIZ34pb4sVRQa2vYTTN1CGPfr5P8w_fYXYafO3n12AmmhtT)**

[**May 23, 1960:** After the largest earthquake ever recorded hit Chile, the resulting Tsunami struck Hilo Bay, Hawaii. 35-foot waves caused massive destruction and killed 61 people despite the tsunami warning system and evacuations. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Preparing for Trump v. DeSantis in CA (seriously)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
California's March primary could be interesting.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=23453%2E3422442%2EfuQUz7)
Derek,
Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is expected to announce his presidential campaign tomorrow. With both Trump and DeSantis in the race we can assume this will be a very competitive primary, and **California could play a huge role.**
**That could have a serious effect on our race. Here's how:**
On March 5, 2024, voters will be choosing which two Senate candidates will advance to the general election. In California, those top two candidates can be from either party—so that means two Democrats, two Republicans, or one of each could advance to November. **Now, on that same ballot will likely be a highly competitive Republican presidential primary.**
A competitive and consequential GOP primary will juice turnout for the Republican candidate in our own Senate primary.
**It will also make TV ad time significantly more expensive,** as Trump, DeSantis, and their super PACs dominate airspace and drive up prices--**we could have to make cuts to our own planned advertisements.**
We need to be prepared for how a competitive Republican presidential primary could make our race even more expensive.
**[Can you make your first donation of $5 today to help us hire organizers, mobilize voters, and compete in this expensive race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230523-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH23_1_DES_20230523_V1_F&refcode2=23453_3422442_fuQUz7&akid=23453%2E3422442%2EfuQUz7)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230523-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAH23_1_DES_20230523_V1_F&refcode2=23453_3422442_fuQUz7&akid=23453%2E3422442%2EfuQUz7)**
More to come,
Team KP

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAH23_1_DES_20230523_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=23453_3422442_fuQUz7&akid=23453%2E3422442%2EfuQUz7)**

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: I lost my son to a drunk driving accident
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Mothers Against Drunk Driving has now disinvited me to speak at one of their conferences because of my conservative politics.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4a6f29c9ea6468d836178c628b76ba4&_e=u2HzfO3Dnenh4DkjFwB2JakApoEJiu-8i7QftTgd5hGZT0eSghOx-ZHYlzram0wOPyHf_B1rmdDsdZ02dg5OSLvELosOlKV-Mgd4oXlO_D6C6fFcte5m9Qe5f4MB2jJffBR5apZp9OzbDq4HT_WrBg_ildBkksfy6oodmFzA5F4ogKTxdcjOw2HeOubCjmdm7cgY65inuwDQFZRex2T1LX0F_vGBft_IjISeAexoY81yKMB4L_PS6VUc519Oc9-1QnztJ5YeMOuB-9PkpmmjjQZx6m6Mzi54xF7Xe15MQbK4JXfeC3GrA-kvBuClrksmZlRPyJy3aT47qf_zp54JCJQly5rPnkDVGG32LlNRFlTED1OisaDoRh7fJkcpFnhG9RTl_dN4dsZeMOuLpNL53w%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

In December, my wife Janel and I lost our son, our granddaughter, and our soon-to-be daughter-in-law at the hands of a drunk driver. **I would have never let their tragic story become a part of my campaign were it not for the insane, woke policies of a select few executives at Mothers Against Drunk Driving.**

First, corporate America succumbed to the pressure of the woke left and disavowed conservatives. Now, it seems that nonprofit organizations, like Mothers Against Drunk Driving, are following suit.

**Let me read you in on what happened and why I 'm reaching out with this story today.**
Recently, my wife and I accepted an invitation to be keynote speakers at a **Mothers Against Drunk Driving** event this July in Phoenix.

**We would have been the perfect fit.** Not only are we a law enforcement family, but we lost our kids to a drunk driving accident eight days before Christmas 2022.

Both Janel and I were looking forward to sharing our story. In my capacity as Pinal County Sheriff and as a father, the invitation meant so much. So, **you can imagine our disappointment and utter shock over the weekend when we got a call uninviting us as the keynote speakers**.

**The decision to revoke our invitation was purely political.**

**[I need your help to send a message to organizations, like MADD, who are bending to pressure from WOKE, far-left activities and canceling anyone who disagrees with their looney-tune out of left-field rhetoric.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4a6f29c9ea6468d836178c628b76ba4&_e=u2HzfO3Dnenh4DkjFwB2JakApoEJiu-8i7QftTgd5hGZT0eSghOx-ZHYlzram0wOPyHf_B1rmdDsdZ02dg5OSLvELosOlKV-Mgd4oXlO_D6C6fFcte5m9Qe5f4MB2jJffBR5apZp9OzbDq4HT_WrBg_ildBkksfy6oodmFzA5F4ogKTxdcjOw2HeOubCjmdm7cgY65inuwDQFZRex2T1LX0F_vGBft_IjISeAexoY83bOdI_tbdNJgAnFP1ZoErDjRz2euzF40EKplRkEV_9ZV3EnufdMqufsA3C6uF6pX9UATbaSDTJnN-TiJApDGm6gX6Q4ykeiiFnOb5pk6kiqbIvcZWQtMEiWTK9aJG6JI1hrcNIq1-ErgLAi-uvYyknwtS3OmzhddXns5D3fDfr-w%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4a6f29c9ea6468d836178c628b76ba4&_e=u2HzfO3Dnenh4DkjFwB2JakApoEJiu-8i7QftTgd5hGZT0eSghOx-ZHYlzram0wOPyHf_B1rmdDsdZ02dg5OSLvELosOlKV-Mgd4oXlO_D6C6fFcte5m9Qe5f4MB2jJffBR5apZp9OzbDq4HT_WrBg_ildBkksfy6oodmFzA5F4ogKTxdcjOw2HeOubCjmdm7cgY65inuwDQFZRex2T1LX0F_vGBft_IjISeAexoY82erX4zPB5GMAjNEF9WZlixCRxmkiN8mRYL40-XVaeOqRNXll4ILldnBemZ4_Nicejn-eqwKOR7V9RI95W8lYQOUkbDJ1YGqjHKSHNcGnm_3N8j3kUyQo87Ub7d675XJ2uCxqFe7BnOCvxohbs7L7ugojWpIokXsznTWE7wwIOOnQ%3D%3D)
It appears that MADD executives bowed to the pressure of a few far-left activists and decided they would cancel me rather than offend a few of their progressive supporters. **Let me be crystal clear:** the people who aired their grievances against me with MADD don't know me or my wife; **they succeeded in getting me cancelled by simply saying they were offended by some of the political positions I hold.**

**This would _never_ happen to a Democrat candidate for the United States Senate.**

Please accept my invitation today to **[sign my petition telling Mothers Against Drunk Driving that politicizing the deaths of drunk driving victims is just plain wrong.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4a6f29c9ea6468d836178c628b76ba4&_e=u2HzfO3Dnenh4DkjFwB2JakApoEJiu-8i7QftTgd5hGZT0eSghOx-ZHYlzram0wOPyHf_B1rmdDsdZ02dg5OSLvELosOlKV-Mgd4oXlO_D6C6fFcte5m9Qe5f4MB2jJffBR5apZp9OzbDq4HT_WrBg_ildBkksfy6oodmFzA5F4ogKTxdcjOw2HeOubCjmdm7cgY65inuwDQFZRex2T1LX0F_vGBft_IjISeAexoY81G-CEdiWV1JgezUVYYMw6YsvbbdKrKfzPBRb-EKzetJbwV0UToweBqz0hbfKd_m4YVoc8fL6-axY85fQMGuDCIV7e62EktX3Ggf8sKxEQQ-WEzdvosZs1uEM48-TVyL3K7DBHY-J8qmVk1MK3vxEz8dyeNesLRlahc3ivuYcl9HA%3D%3D)**

[**ADD YOUR NAME TODAY**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4a6f29c9ea6468d836178c628b76ba4&_e=u2HzfO3Dnenh4DkjFwB2JakApoEJiu-8i7QftTgd5hGZT0eSghOx-ZHYlzram0wOPyHf_B1rmdDsdZ02dg5OSLvELosOlKV-Mgd4oXlO_D6C6fFcte5m9Qe5f4MB2jJffBR5apZp9OzbDq4HT_WrBg_ildBkksfy6oodmFzA5F4ogKTxdcjOw2HeOubCjmdm7cgY65inuwDQFZRex2T1LX0F_vGBft_IjISeAexoY82Cu7vjfaQpb4d1HinqfKAHCPhLZrG7p2KppuTgQpKqvy3whdotx48SRKpwn8-4ys3C6cTbxygnsmXu6pFaB8IGgwUy7toKxPkczJhAONauHWXZ2-ELSJpBv1MeXEEw-Qt8i3vCeHR0NkBsQPb-9oA9fbCrOMAnzeS4uu4MhpEPVw%3D%3D)
**We must send a message that we won 't tolerate this anymore**.

Organizations like **Mothers Against Drunk Driving shouldn 't be political.** Period, end of story. But since they decided to get political, you need people like me who are going to set them back on the path of straight and narrow.

**Losing a child is one of the hardest things me and my wife have ever experienced. By uninviting us to speak at one of their events, executives at MADD may as well have just poured salt in our wounds.**

This cancel culture is DISGRACEFUL. If you agree, **[then I need you to let me know you're with me by singing my petition right now](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4a6f29c9ea6468d836178c628b76ba4&_e=u2HzfO3Dnenh4DkjFwB2JakApoEJiu-8i7QftTgd5hGZT0eSghOx-ZHYlzram0wOPyHf_B1rmdDsdZ02dg5OSLvELosOlKV-Mgd4oXlO_D6C6fFcte5m9Qe5f4MB2jJffBR5apZp9OzbDq4HT_WrBg_ildBkksfy6oodmFzA5F4ogKTxdcjOw2HeOubCjmdm7cgY65inuwDQFZRex2T1LX0F_vGBft_IjISeAexoY80V0wJCdvlc6_DuDlYfLj1VNkLyMUCFI3ESbfeJ2aapk7h7Na-ABso1trwGEQ-5Vk7LPkfRGGyk0IbJ6G5ni965R-L8B8g_8zsBNOh0RWXS_HqHccSQeQbVzSmvJyadViVIQ5EqXFDy5tmePipp44E2VbHRDwSUc6C1zRGH4kyMcQ%3D%3D)**.

Sincerely,

body:
| | Hi, it’s Kim. I am honored to share with you that I was just endorsed by BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, which is dedicated to increasing diversity in Congress!

I'm grateful for BOLD PAC's support and look forward to working with them to flip CA-45 and win back this seat for working families.

[Will you join BOLD PAC in supporting my campaign by chipping in $10 now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63718413/407753893/760158825?contactdata=867BK5GS2s6laulfZLA6d/p+SIzonRJ/Btn3+nK2HdybPOk6qLn2iWRaVdxb195W1yb4+mpv8lhX2URqoPxXSzHSLIIzs6wUwIgmEYTaY8A=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230523_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ4MmQwY2YtYWNmOS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cr-O0k8ZI-APOXicPPBZAbknX4kcCvsBWwOdyzTooEk=) | | **[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63718414/407753894/760158825?contactdata=867BK5GS2s6laulfZLA6d/p+SIzonRJ/Btn3+nK2HdybPOk6qLn2iWRaVdxb195W1yb4+mpv8lhX2URqoPxXSzHSLIIzs6wUwIgmEYTaY8A=&amount=10&refcode=KBN_EM_FR_WL_230523_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM4MzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQ4MmQwY2YtYWNmOS1lZDExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Cr-O0k8ZI-APOXicPPBZAbknX4kcCvsBWwOdyzTooEk=)**

Here’s what Congresswoman Linda Sanchez, Chair of BOLD PAC, said about our campaign:
_“The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant and the first in her family to graduate high school and college, Kim Nguyen has lived through some of the tremendous challenges working families in Southern California face. Republicans continue to fail Californian working families. Kim will be the leader they deserve in Congress and will fight for gun safety, to protect and strengthen our democracy, and to lower costs for all working families.”_

I am honored to share with you that I was just endorsed by BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, which is dedicated to increasing diversity in Congress! I'm grateful for BOLD PAC's support and look forward to working with them to flip CA-45 and win back this seat for working families. = | | = Here’s what Congresswoman Linda Sanchez, Chair of BOLD PAC, said about our campaign: “The daughter of a Vietnamese refugee and a Mexican immigrant and the first in her family to graduate high school and college, Kim Nguyen has lived through some of the tremendous challenges working families in Southern California face. Republicans continue to fail Californian working families. Kim will be the leader they deserve in Congress and will fight for gun safety, to protect and strengthen our democracy, and to lower costs for all working families.” We need a representative who knows us — someone who understands the struggles of making ends meet and just getting by. As President Trump has said countless times, we may not have a donor who can give $75 million, but we do have 75 million Trump voters who can each give $1, $5, $24, or even more. Together, we will show Soros that our Free Republic can NEVER be bought. | Thank you, Team Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: We’re throwing out the rulebook and building the boldest campaign in Missouri history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
$0 from corporate PACs and shady mega-donors. 100% powered by real people just like you.
#
Peter — the grassroots movement we’re building to defeat Josh Hawley, flip this Senate seat, and take back power for everyday people is already the boldest campaign in Missouri history. **Please let me explain.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33431?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV)**
For decades, lying politicians have let massive corporations strip our communities for parts — and Missouri has had a front row seat.
I can’t accept a status quo where politicians who take massive donations from Big Ag tell us it’s normal for billionaires in China and Brazil to buy up our farmland and put hard-working family farmers out of business. And I won’t stand for another twenty years of members of Congress who’ve never worn a uniform sacrificing American lives and tax dollars on forever wars, while refusing to invest into the everyday people who make our country strong.
Out-of-touch elites like Josh Hawley have spent decades wasting our money on tax breaks and subsidies for Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, and just about everything else that’s gutting our country.
They’re willing to lie, cheat, and steal from the American people to protect the corporate PACs and mega-donors who own their careers — and they’ll even raise their fist to look strong before they start running from threats to our democracy.
**We don’t need any more frauds in Congress.** That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. It’s why I’m not taking a single cent from corporate PACs. **[And it’s why I’m asking you to make your first donation of $10 or whatever you think is best toward my grassroots campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33431?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33432?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33432?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33432?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33432?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33432?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33432?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33431?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV)
---
Our mission of taking power back for everyday people has earned our movement national media attention. And our commitment to running this campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs, has given us the ability to run the boldest campaign in Missouri history — taking on corrupt political elites like Hawley without hesitation about some mega-donor being upset.
More than just fighting to codify protections for abortion access — **I’m running to end the filibuster so we can actually get it done.**
More than just banning insider trading among members of Congress and their families — **I’m running to put them in jail if they steal from us.**
More than just breaking up Big Pharma — **I’m running to prosecute the insulin cartels who are killing people.**
And more than just rejecting corporate PAC money — **I’m running to abolish corporate PACs altogether.**
This campaign is powered by the people because that’s exactly who I’ll work for in the U.S. Senate — I'll be accountable to real, everyday Americans, not some corporate executive or political machine. We’re throwing out their rulebook and building a grassroots movement to fundamentally change who has power in our country. **And I need you on our team:**
**[So if you’re ready to help us take back power for everyday people in Missouri and across the country, please add a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you can to help us keep building this grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33431?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV)**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33431?refcode=em20230523-3163&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV)**
For too long, our country’s corrupt politicians have bought their way into power and maintained a broken status quo. That cycle stops with our movement.
Thanks for being part of it,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230523-3163-footer&t=12&refcode2=3163_614464_OontTV&akid=3163%2E614464%2EOontTV)**

| Peter –

I know the next election feels incredibly far away right now – and to be fair, it isn’t for almost 18 months!

I’d like to take a moment to explain why our fundraising is already in full swing, and to do that I’m going to show you what Republicans started sending to their supporters in _February:_

| | | [DEFEND SUSAN ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63719069/407756190/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230523-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWFiY2E5My1hZmY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dne_KEzsCM_osV2fgUjdaJvFYiI3yW0KUhuqsgPqmCs=)

Hey there, Peter **–** Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana. That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them. Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.** When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. # ABOUT ERIC EARLY

Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. subject: my favorite scarf

body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8USTrqmzgwkrexPgzK2cME8ovHr9r0Jjia8pwOeNdnMGBumGoAf1SF_ssNilg7su0F-GxRGJA6JeOseV_TWvixSc664eFoZIOtBetfhoH1k52wir2sshsJv61Tr5YyiC8GYwYiIpcGIuogetWKYdGn4qqNhBGmbwBN8rtvIHjHHlS-QlBhs9YvAUmWCOziD1KDMk3c01OIjbOdYQ6IcKPRCFkQFPUtGle2b5p6cuZVbWML-a5QcWArTMFTH8QPcKZhqW80GIjCzEqqakay6bcZY5IzzpFF8yZtt78Xtnob-laQmYxXgnU_NxCZahp-IpMnbdon-zWY_-Gfd4qkOWnGnoc1Q37P4yNExdNwp4rLuc/3wf/x_gRHJzIRFKAw1qKvaAoCg/h0/9N2NTu_NmA2h7ezQqQibSerzUk2s8g806adbk-RFTXY) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cyjGl-FlEjBHeKc4isWYYB1UHdTGzlRdRxDAMTmIHCk6vvTHHBKtF_gQst6D1fPybBvll25B8s8tviJEvuakBAuDS8FHH91ts_BsoIOCQBrRpJHkoZyTc3AXZHITOLK6ya91DskihV1F2Ge8E9Nd21G0bPiRl-YO0NGEZUN_Bif_OZq84U2U6EcghNlW4F60iUoYHmopoLqMHDveYpygAgijkwVt9CuuMKMb_vhkMgZOgQ1upGG5VeJ0Se8gtiMjDQM8-RzZEkKYsrdvHZUpYVduUZkqpGN2y-Wadox3XEgEErTR_fuvSSllrLKPOIYVXwAIKdflEDyFsLHkkR5SKaEMjtyzABJFrjl2Y5CaOqh0O5K5GHzWfDBW7E7OSWJ0bjH7uU-rN72SGGgDnmgY7tROom9ZJYUYFSPlj0kNTGaRRChKUg1Ry_2NTHTeuRuWWlWuEecN2WZseBTD_e9PGZic4Nd9ROzr84Khkn0KE325IOOdmSYCoIGjAgFdTGxp2/3wf/x_gRHJzIRFKAw1qKvaAoCg/h1/02Qq8I2vmOYrBlEkUlKtC4k_lS1NmNN7y70nX20D-Dw) Peter,

When I was sworn-in for the first time in 2017, my sisters and I wanted to make it special. After all, I was making history as the first woman and person of color elected as the Congressperson for Delaware.

My sister Thea is the historian of the family, and she had found this document from our great-great-great grandfather giving him the right to vote in 1867. Thea is also the crafty one of the family and she kindly printed the document onto a scarf for me. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cLwK8CqiUvFyvS3nZWtKvZa5q48xN8WZB7W6T9d-niQ8pR2CjkPiw8zgyGnw1tRTnzLnl8z1t6e_EmSmfgH0qQ_qWyT4xHM84UzBVG7V6GtkCip8dHuwhXBodGu0dPlpTJTFjNPtBYjVauyk9BW6fPBvujQ6rN_7bxr1ejH9wwnG7FPkEO_cTYHpI67OSjnCyqX4t5uZaCTHpzpkE35UYJZPu_VDbm_b2Q1ik6Y1VXsSgyeJ2SGDuj7wottuCinlwgTcCHN-HaLgeh0UIg878-RvdjFcOdRLEmGIDGMuRFdgnxmeb68x6OLtlZjbRabPpgLdqYZGEF5-hGxXxIl0MuY6QdRco_1cu4reh3Vxhgq0PGKM1FKZ35gAMOmVn033YyOpsDK49ez7mon2AELvDx5A_BOetcJxxyvVE5fpK44Siv4_1_RHgRnk9ocNcuUz2K55ZLPod-E0eq1BYM7zNEr0Ea0FdUGLKLJywcdXi4n6OV1WJlfxEmnB1YXlvSgwm/3wf/x_gRHJzIRFKAw1qKvaAoCg/h2/a30124mhPCFPYwDTj4uHeIMWsdKqQKb3RiqW4L8KMTg) The day I was sworn-in, I carried that scarf.

It was surreal — knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State.

**I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection.** On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason.

**Let’s be clear: blatant attempts to spread lies about the integrity of our democracy are rooted in racism. That’s why electing a Congress that is representative of our country is crucial, and people of color are at the forefront of that mission.**

[Chipping in to my campaign and The Collective PAC means chipping in to create a truly diverse and inclusive Congress, and I sincerely hope that you’ll get on board:](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wcVmDVfjroFVbol-C41V4cyjGl-FlEjBHeKc4isWYYB1UHdTGzlRdRxDAMTmIHCk6vvTHHBKtF_gQst6D1fPybBvll25B8s8tviJEvuakBAuDS8FHH91ts_BsoIOCQBrRpJHkoZyTc3AXZHITOLK6ya91DskihV1F2Ge8E9Nd21G0bPiRl-YO0NGEZUN_Bif_OZq84U2U6EcghNlW4F60iUoYHmopoLqMHDveYpygAgijkwVt9CuuMKMb_vhkMgZOgQ1upGG5VeJ0Se8gtiMjDQM8-RzZEkKYsrdvHZUpYVQTokZ3rraGC-2ZNWqo4BssESBSpUqPWG497Mo4KApMyk-vpB9TLRpLsbckrVShEDOoU-1chPLtskMfkbMd4lZ7ET7R0LJTYy7PSLLP8kVUS2C30F-R1tN2ku7uczIbbhj6RrjPqqwzRKIBk7c4BEwXCi61unM8LudelabCsFoLx7R8yArjVaJt_uew_Y-E4u6bZX9ex_x2qAwCoNkVyuJhg7m6meCsodYkmFgJUBvIB/3wf/x_gRHJzIRFKAw1qKvaAoCg/h3/4qK34jLuqa2EFRn18kpUbBxXz2fK1t2XwQMIR_75zHo) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Lisa Blunt Rochester and The Collective PAC.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, When I was sworn-in for the first time in 2017, my sisters and I wanted to make it special. After all, I was making history as the first woman and person of color elected as the Congressperson for Delaware. My sister Thea is the historian of the family, and she had found this document from our great-great-great grandfather giving him the right to vote in 1867. Thea is also the crafty one of the family and she kindly printed the document onto a scarf for me. The day I was sworn-in, I carried that scarf. It was surreal — knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection. On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason. Let’s be clear: blatant attempts to spread lies about the integrity of our democracy are rooted in racism. That’s why electing a Congress that is representative of our country is crucial, and people of color are at the forefront of that mission. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Lisa Blunt Rochester and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | All my best, Lisa Blunt Rochester The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Why I’m running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63719603/407757895/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjM5ZGY0My1iMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ShDYn3V8BNBMkPnEHoHdntkBzEWfCvJYQ8XWLp9p1Ro=&emci=70aecf8e-ccf8-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4f39df43-b1f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | Hi, Peter, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean _all_ work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you.

I’m running for reelection so I can _keep_ fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at _CNN_ say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.

**The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking:** [**_Will you give $25 or more right now – split between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia – to help defend this battleground seat and keep Georgia and the Senate blue?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63719604/407757896/-843865763?refcode=20230523.2_ShB_5AO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjM5ZGY0My1iMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ShDYn3V8BNBMkPnEHoHdntkBzEWfCvJYQ8XWLp9p1Ro=)

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.

But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”

The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.

[**_That’s why I’m asking for your support today, Peter: Please, will you chip in $25 or more now – split between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia – so we can win in Ohio and Georgia and defend the Senate?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63719605/407757897/-843865763?refcode=20230523.2_ShB_5AO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjM5ZGY0My1iMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ShDYn3V8BNBMkPnEHoHdntkBzEWfCvJYQ8XWLp9p1Ro=)

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown

clean_body: | | | Hi, Peter, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you. I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me. The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: = I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American. But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.” The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you. = With gratitude, Sherrod Brown | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

We’ve seen firsthand how our members help counter GOP extremism in the states – so we’re calling on you to activate your 2023 membership today. | | |

| | **Our team has set an ambitious goal of reaching 20,000 members this month – here’s why: **
1. The GOP has heightened their attacks on abortion, voting rights, and more – even going so far as to expel two Black lawmakers in Tennessee and silencing a transgender legislator in Montana.
2. Donald Trump is continuing to spew MAGA propaganda, stirring up chaos that could harm our democracy.
3. State Democrats are facing multiple special elections that are critical to expanding our Democratic power in state legislatures.

[With so much at stake in our legislatures, it’s critical that we get at least 20,000 members on our side. clean_body: We’ve seen firsthand how our members help counter GOP extremism in the states – so we’re calling on you to activate your 2023 membership today. | | | | | Our team has set an ambitious goal of reaching 20,000 members this month – here’s why: 1. The GOP has heightened their attacks on abortion, voting rights, and more – even going so far as to expel two Black lawmakers in Tennessee and silencing a transgender legislator in Montana. 2. Donald Trump is continuing to spew MAGA propaganda, stirring up chaos that could harm our democracy. 3. State Democrats are facing multiple special elections that are critical to expanding our Democratic power in state legislatures. The bad news is our Republican counterparts are ramping up to defeat state Democrats, spread lies, and push their extreme agenda through every crack in state legislatures nationwide. But the good news is we’ve seen firsthand how our members help counter this extremism – so we’re calling on you to join the 18,963 other members who have stepped up to fight the GOP’s threats. Take a look → | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you, DLCC Membership Team P.S. We only need 1,037 more members to renew their membership before we reach our goal. The information provided above is associated with the following email address: dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you have donated in the past with a different email, by check, or to another organization or party committee, that will not be reflected here. But we need to keep the momentum going this week in order to sustain the pressure on House Republicans.[**Please sign on before Thursday night!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63719627/407758062/1119725216?ms=EM_PET_230523AWB_N_RR_FULL_12_NG_N_L4&refcode=EM_PET_230523AWB_N_RR_FULL_12_NG_N_L4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDk4NDJiMC1iMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwUXYgnUpngSyIr9-54CRL50PjdQZhas_fgCxpNGq7c=&emci=2c94fb21-9ff9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ed9842b0-b1f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)_
**_***Original Bessage Below from 5/8/23***_**
* * *
As winter has turned to spring in 2023, our country has sadly seen more mass shootings. From a school in Nashville, to a bank in Louisville, to a house in rural Texas, to a mall near Dallas – assault weapons continue to wreak havoc on families.

This has to stop. The time for excuses has long since passed.

We know that banning assault weapons saves lives. The only reason Congress hasn't acted is because too many members are beholden to the gun lobby. **Jennifer is determined to show that opposing an assault weapons ban in 2023 is a completely unpopular and untenable position.**

[**Will you stand with her now and add your name to help us ban assault weapons? We want to reach 10,000 signatures this week to make sure our voices are heard.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63719628/407758063/1119725216?ms=EM_PET_230523AWB_N_RR_FULL_12_NG_N_L1&refcode=EM_PET_230523AWB_N_RR_FULL_12_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDk4NDJiMC1iMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwUXYgnUpngSyIr9-54CRL50PjdQZhas_fgCxpNGq7c=&emci=2c94fb21-9ff9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ed9842b0-b1f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)
[Add Your Name ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63719629/407758064/1119725216?ms=EM_PET_230523AWB_N_RR_FULL_12_NG_N_B1&refcode=EM_PET_230523AWB_N_RR_FULL_12_NG_N_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDk4NDJiMC1iMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwUXYgnUpngSyIr9-54CRL50PjdQZhas_fgCxpNGq7c=&emci=2c94fb21-9ff9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ed9842b0-b1f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)
It's simple: we should not have to fear weapons of war being used in residential neighborhoods or public spaces. And every day we fail to get these weapons off the street, we put more lives at stake.

Jennifer has supported an assault weapons ban her entire career — she co-sponsored one in her first weeks as a Congresswoman. She's proud to have successfully taken on the NRA in every one of her elections in a district that neighbors their headquarters.

She knows that together, our voices are more powerful than a special interest group. That's why she refuses to back down — and she needs as many supporters as possible behind her.

[**It's time we came together to save lives and stop the bloodshed. Please add your name today to support an assault weapons ban →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63719630/407758065/1119725216?ms=EM_PET_230523AWB_N_RR_FULL_12_NG_N_L2&refcode=EM_PET_230523AWB_N_RR_FULL_12_NG_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDk4NDJiMC1iMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwUXYgnUpngSyIr9-54CRL50PjdQZhas_fgCxpNGq7c=&emci=2c94fb21-9ff9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ed9842b0-b1f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=32654120)

Thank you,

Team Wexton

**Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63719631/407758066/-772585877?refcode=EM_PET_230523AWB_N_RR_FULL_12_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDk4NDJiMC1iMWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DwUXYgnUpngSyIr9-54CRL50PjdQZhas_fgCxpNGq7c=)****

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Moderate PAC and $20,000,000 against us.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

First: Our own fundraising has been steadily declining over the last year
and it’s unsustainable for our organization — if things don’t turn around
we’re going to have to look at where to cut our budget.

Then: Axios reported that ‘The Moderate PAC’ is planning on raising $20
million to stop our movement and protect corporate-backed, entrenched
incumbents.

Now: We urgently need your support to fight back against this PAC that
received $1,000,000 from a GOP-mega donor and billionaire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134552?refcode=em20230523-29091&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29091%2E1203867%2Ep-HmAc ]Will you rush a contribution of $3 right now ahead of
our end-of-month fundraising deadline? As a grassroots-funded
organization, every single donation truly makes a difference to us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134552?refcode=em20230523-29091&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29091%2E1203867%2Ep-HmAc ]Contribute $3

The political establishment is coming after us because they’re terrified
of our people-powered movement that is actually shifting political power
in our country to the 99%.

Imagine the Democratic Party without AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, or
Cori Bush in Congress.

We recruited each of these leaders to run and win and we’re building the
infrastructure for even more grassroots candidates to do the same, but the
Moderate PAC is planning to raise and spend $20 million against us and our
candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134552?refcode=em20230523-29091&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=29091%2E1203867%2Ep-HmAc ]Please make your best gift now to help us counter this obscene amount
of money against us.

Thank you,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=29091%2E1203867%2Ep-HmAc ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=29091%2E1203867%2Ep-HmAc ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230523-29091-footer&t=1025&refcode2=29091_1203867_p-HmAc&akid=29091%2E1203867%2Ep-HmAc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=29091%2E1203867%2Ep-HmAc

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

We know from experience that when we communicate with our supporters honestly and transparently, it builds stronger relationships and a stronger movement. So in that spirit, we wanted to come to you directly with an update on our online fundraising so far this month. With just 9 days to go until the end of May, we’re only about 40% of the way toward hitting our monthly goal right now. These fundraising goals matter, Peter. They determine whether we have the resources we need to win the major fights ahead of us this year — and from abortion bans to climate action to immigration reform to student loan forgiveness to preparing to take back the House in 2024, we have a lot of work to do. The truth is that these fights aren’t going to be easy. Right-wing extremists and the billionaire class are going to continue to protect their own interests at the expense of everyone else. And while we can beat them — we can’t do it alone. If just a small percentage of the people reading this email right now pitch in our average ActBlue donation of $16.37, we’ll reach our goal this month and enter summer with the resources to organize our communities, hold our representatives accountable, and prepare for one of the most important elections of our lifetime. | Dear Patriot, I need to be honest with you. I don't like to admit it - but I'm angry. I'm angry at what Joe Biden is doing to our country every day. And I'm angry at Biden sending US taxpayer money to Ukraine while Americans can't afford groceries. name: CaucusRoom
subject: That's One Heck of an Accounting Error.
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-aljhutt-trhiujldw-f/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Good Morning and Happy Tuesday! **
**Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-y/) **Hell of an Accounting Error** The Pentagon **[admitted it overestimated the value of weapons it has sent to Ukraine by $3 billion](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-j/) **amidst criticism from GOP members of Congress that American funding for the war in Ukraine threatens further escalation of the conflict. **In Case of Emergency** Dozens of **[Senators are being issued taxpayer-funded satellite phones](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-t/)** in preparation for a disruptive event. _What could that be?_ **Are They Turning on Biden?** Hillary Clinton has **[weighed in on concerns surrounding Biden's age](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-i/)** , saying it's a legitimate issue.

**Stop the EV Push** More than 150 House Republicans are **[calling on Biden to reverse regulations](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-d/)** that would force Americans to buy electric vehicles. **Blatantly Obvious** A Florida Republican says it is blatantly apparent that **[the FBI has become the law enforcement arm of the Democrat Party](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-h/).** **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-k/)!**
* It's easy to **[get confused](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-u/).**
* I don't think she's**[coming back](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-o/).**
* It's**[finally here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-x/).**

[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-m/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-c/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-q/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-aljhutt-trhiujldw-a/) | CaucusRoom, LLC

But let’s break down one of his most telling admissions... _Who is claiming the Supreme Court is “pretty illegitimate”? Why is the Supreme Court in “full crisis mode”?_ The answer to both of these questions is the far Left. It’s simple: Our constitution stands in the way of the radical policy transformation the Left wants to see in our country. And our courts are the last line of defense against their attacks.
* _It’s why they are attacking the Supreme Court. _
* _It’s why they are going after Clarence Thomas. _
* _It’s why they have started demanding to impeach justices they don’t like and calling to pack the court with justices who will sign off on their agenda._

**Peter, they aren’t even PRETENDING to respect the Supreme Court anymore.** This is DISASTROUS for our country. We can’t let them continue these attacks. _[And that’s why Fair Courts America exists.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=043a12e8869e4975b8a7edfbb94f6a53&_e=qXLFZQwaTSuh17nhSejI_cgNcqK-qd0hid5zPwusF0GFDMydoR7MljYfhKwrLgltBdaBt0HX5wxkKdPVQNMCA0RRwQDhl231PB0dmBcoatZgtjGGfEw9ax00KBXKaT1QSXJjsS3W_rEMU2LN0FXvRbiPZJzzQ25ZHh6R6QcJDSr3m3SYRGd3YwFjd-nh2aWpXDMAlMfzArZDXTQNjimIpBCEuJ5Fd1Vqsg_Y1Oe3ikrfrGVfj5rA7WzeRySBzSbWExovxoWE7O8cTo_q38ZaKH4OAsgK5kLLSITpWDSRmWZ3X0cY_TfhETRT0CY9GlOuqoAXs9YhcGrvkkTT51jAC7VffjxF9OMdVV0Dn66ylaU%3D)_ **Our mission is to fight back against the woke mob’s takeover of our judicial system, from the Supreme Court to your local prosecutor.**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=043a12e8869e4975b8a7edfbb94f6a53&_e=qXLFZQwaTSuh17nhSejI_cgNcqK-qd0hid5zPwusF0GFDMydoR7MljYfhKwrLgltBdaBt0HX5wxkKdPVQNMCA0RRwQDhl231PB0dmBcoatZgtjGGfEw9ax00KBXKaT1QSXJjsS3W_rEMU2LN0FXvRbiPZJzzQ25ZHh6R6QcJDSr3m3SYRGd3YwFjd-nh2aWpXDMAlMfzArZDXTQNjimIpC6syzgDhx55X9IrRFy7UHZ-dWAw_juUTo1LY2tqLJ_AjMpYpGZ2xV6jZnEV8DWRiuTm7HTBRCTOBktGlX7rJTrlTd65BVQpy292DTjlCm7d3qTBKJS9yLFEVI0BJBMXLX7nyOscYtK3sxZdSV2MmtA%3D)

clean_body: Confirm your info, please | THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD Friend, We’re sorry we missed you earlier! We’re reaching out to ensure we have your updated contact information so that Ted Budd can keep you informed on the latest news. Please confirm your information below: Thank you for your support. We’re excited to have you on the team! Thank you, Team Budd | | Senator Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader in North Carolina. | Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Heidi Campbell
subject: You're invited to join me and Rep. Gloria Johnson at Fido on May 30th

| | We have some big news. I am proud to invite you to a special fundraiser in support of my mayoral campaign with guest, colleague, and friend, Rep. Gloria Johnson.
---
| |
---
| | Hi Peter, I am committed to building a Nashville that reflects our shared values of unity, innovation, and equitable growth. Values that both Rep. Johnson and I share. I am determined to lead Nashville into an era of unprecedented success. But to get there, I need your support. **< <That is why Rep. Johnson is lending her support to our campaign. We have a plan and a team in place to talk to voters in every corner of the city, and by contributing, you can help make this plan a reality.>>** Come for a little, or stay for a while, this will be an event you will not want to miss. Hear directly from me and Representative Johnson as we share our vision for a brighter future for our community. [**< <To RSVP, please click here. We kindly request a contribution of $250, but please know that any donation you are able to make is greatly appreciated.>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63720668/407761654/1565890984?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDgxN2Y3NS1iNWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IS2sTWmxHNcmEo7NC5DSCIwUx3G8gZibdF_o5XkINGM=) Check’s can be sent to the address below **Heidi Campbell for Mayor** P.O Box 330302Nashville, TN 37203 I encourage you to share this invitation with friends, family, and colleagues. Thank you for considering this invitation. I am excited to have you join us for an evening filled with camaraderie and a shared commitment to building a better Nashville. Together, let's create a Nashville we can all be proud of! Heidi CampbellMayoral Candidate for Nashville
