Hi friend,
I’m going to be honest with you. When we first thought about running for Congress, a lot of folks told us we couldn’t do it. They said we couldn’t raise the money. They said our community would be too divided in a crowded race.
Excuse me, but I know that’s BS. I know we can do it because we've been bringing sí se puede energy energy to organizing our community for almost 20 years!
Now, it’s time to prove them wrong again. We need to show them that yes, we can raise the money. Yes, we can organize our community and elect the first Latina to represent Arizona in Congress. If you’re able, can you contribute $20 or more to help us prove them wrong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_052323_sisepuede&amount=20]
This is going to be a long primary and we will need all the resources we can get to keep the momentum going. But we’ve seen up close and personal that when we work together , we can do anything. That’s how we beat Joe Arpaio and Donald Trump. That’s how we beat Kari Lake and Blake Masters. It’s how we protected abortion access and the minimum wage in the legislature. And it’s how we’re going to win this campaign.
So can you help us show the power of our community’s sí se puede energy by contributing $20 today to our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raquelteran2024?refcode=X_052323_sisepuede&amount=20]
Sí se puede,
Raquel

**Your response needed | Exclusive poll for you
11:59 p.m. deadline**
|
---
Friend, let this horrifying statistic sink in: The recent mass shooting in Allen, Texas, is just one of over 230 __ mass shooting events in 2023.
**From Kentucky to Tennessee to Texas, too many communities have been shattered by gun violence – and many of these horrific events share one common denominator: military-style assault weapons. **
The majority of Americans support banning these military-grade weapons, but as usual, **Republicans are too afraid of losing corporate donations from the gun lobby to support commonsense gun safety laws. **
Biden and top Democrats are working hard on this issue, but with a GOP-controlled House, there's only so much they can do, so we launched this official poll to show the GOP where Americans stand on this critical issue.

**But right now, time is running out before our midnight deadline, and we're still missing at least 500 responses to our poll – and yours is one of them. Please, let us know:**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9228325a098c48f7b10e3a20f733beaa&_e=zl8IS7KUYzP_v2E5o81FNKhA1oUrTlfRnIkGJAL-l5OCsuJMTD3MqYUNEe6mpNurQcxwPqJdhLjYDXfpCRVJHRHLsAch8_Wsf2oIM7eJ51DpmZTn9IM1KKnO56Mge7jLFhg02lDvpG88XxqsPUBMbCIo1-W40PoS3ANhH0u8Gbh4jWd-TACYfkcFZ0rj6Ifqv-dQJ-7n4Zv7jPiJQ1O_v98H0MOKVPzpB1vF7QKvTsN0tkoslwgfw2iEaVaIkFfb6KL1-nyt69PjaOeE3klOeTJTvGLKgVhj-RaiAWcp2BkOxIoZnp9sxOgw4XkHD5rz36Zy3WjmfyAQS0sMXqT7gKKh2fJBm2WQRHHfZM5E6w68pRqDoaYOtFhlx0ZSKwn2he-Ad9cq3rueAXGy4cD9Ww%3D%3D)

---

body:
#
Hey there --
**Team Zak here. We just wrapped up the ✨first week ✨ of our campaign and we 're getting noticed.** Things are off to a great start, with voters and the press abuzz about Zak and his vision for New York's 3rd Congressional District!
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=f202fca371&e=15d98230e6)
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=20b8c60655&e=15d98230e6)
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=daeec98b58&e=15d98230e6)
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=72826c92a0&e=15d98230e6)
[](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=e7e64d8590&e=15d98230e6)
Zak is dedicated to making his hometown and every neighborhood in northeast Queens and Nassau County an incredible place to live and work. He's focused on:
1. Taking our safety seriously and passing common-sense gun legislation to curb the epidemic of gun violence, and expanding our mental-health resources;
2. Investing in the next generation by improving public education and getting partisan infighting out of the classroom;
3. Making this community a national leader in renewable energy investments that reduce costs.

**With your help, we can unseat Santos and bring a new era to New York 's third district.**
[**Will you chip in to keep our momentum going and amplify Zak 's message of defeating extremism and investing in our communities to voters all across NY-03?**](https://zakforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=30c2554cf0cbb2d4d7d50d7c7&id=5d19345e43&e=15d98230e6)

clean_body: Hey there -- Team Zak here. We just wrapped up the ✨first week ✨ of our campaign and we 're getting noticed. Things are off to a great start, with voters and the press abuzz about Zak and his vision for New York's 3rd Congressional District! Zak is dedicated to making his hometown and every neighborhood in northeast Queens and Nassau County an incredible place to live and work. He's focused on: 1. Taking our safety seriously and passing common-sense gun legislation to curb the epidemic of gun violence, and expanding our mental-health resources; 2. Investing in the next generation by improving public education and getting partisan infighting out of the classroom; 3. Making this community a national leader in renewable energy investments that reduce costs. With your help, we can unseat Santos and bring a new era to New York 's third district. -- Team Zak Paid for by Zak for Congress

body:
I am proud to have introduced legislation to increase Social Security benefits.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63721153/407763888/-1382951893?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230523-z-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2YzNTVmNi1iN2Y5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEBO_MmEmAtwHqk6yAPZzE5EAfA1Wkqnn9tWj4gUxaA=)

| Peter,

Standing up for the working class has always been my first priority. And as Republicans hold our economy hostage by refusing to raise the debt ceiling, I am working every day towards ensuring our working class remains protected.

I am proud to have introduced legislation to increase Social Security benefits. This legislation will ensure that seniors have the resources they need and that future generations don’t retire into poverty after a lifetime of hard work.

[_**Will you co-sponsor my bill to protect Social Security by adding your name today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63721156/407763891/-153709952?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2YzNTVmNi1iN2Y5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEBO_MmEmAtwHqk6yAPZzE5EAfA1Wkqnn9tWj4gUxaA=&emci=fc021e69-b4f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=c7f355f6-b7f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=6681226)

Glad to have you on my side.

name: Diana
subject: I don't see your response.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because President Biden is _officially_ running for re-election and polls show him statistically tied with Donald Trump -- but we’re _still_ missing your response to our presidential approval poll!

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s _**critical**_ that we have accurate data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

Unfortunately, we’re still 177 answers short in Pennsylvania, and without your response, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll to take on the GOP!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230523-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230523-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10847%2E9716520%2EK_6b6u)
**Do you approve of President Biden?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230523-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230523-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10847%2E9716520%2EK_6b6u)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230523-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230523-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10847%2E9716520%2EK_6b6u)
---

Thank you for your input,

Diana
Research Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

name: Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: It’s time for climate action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We need to elect climate champions unafraid to speak out against Big Oil’s atrocities and do everything in their power to protect our future.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63721310/407764142/-1917331050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMjA3ZDFkLWI4ZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3NFTUhXGJmeU_ayuulCGUbUIu_Sury2Ju90ZvOKbvJY=&emci=036be25c-a3f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=e2207d1d-b8f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)
---
| | | **Experts see climate change fingerprint in worsening heat waves and fires**

_\- The Washington Post_
---
| [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63721311/407764143/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230523-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMjA3ZDFkLWI4ZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3NFTUhXGJmeU_ayuulCGUbUIu_Sury2Ju90ZvOKbvJY=)
---
As wildfires blaze and global temperatures rise, climate scientists link them to intense _**fossil fuel emissions.**_

While people across the nation brace for another record-breaking summer season and wonder how much worse things can get, the fossil fuel industry continues to wreak havoc on our political system and our planet.

With each passing day, fossil fuel companies rack up obscene profits to line their pockets. Instead of doing the right thing and taking the steps necessary to actually transition our economy off of fossil fuels, they invest those profits — in campaign contributions to leaders on both sides of the aisle, on lobbyists whose sole job is to convince elected leaders to vote for legislation that prioritizes them over their constituents, and, of course, in continuing to expand fossil fuel infrastructure to squeeze out every drop of oil and gas in every nook and cranny.

What’s more, they spend millions of dollars every year on deceiving the public into thinking that they are responsible corporate citizens offering a necessary service while working hard to make themselves look as clean and green as possible.

They know as well as any of us that this cannot last forever. One day enough people will realize what they’re doing, why they’re doing it, and how much they’re lying about it. We need to do everything that we can to make sure that that day happens sooner than later.

We cannot sit idly by as the fossil fuel industry spends millions of dollars to strengthen their influence on our political system.

**We _need_ to elect climate champions unafraid to speak out against Big Oil’s atrocities and do everything in their power to protect our future, but we cannot do it alone.** [_**Will you contribute $10 right away to help us fight back against the fossil fuel industry?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63721312/407764144/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230523-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyMjA3ZDFkLWI4ZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=3NFTUhXGJmeU_ayuulCGUbUIu_Sury2Ju90ZvOKbvJY=)

clean_body: We need to elect climate champions unafraid to speak out against Big Oil’s atrocities and do everything in their power to protect our future. | | | | Experts see climate change fingerprint in worsening heat waves and fires \- The Washington Post | = As wildfires blaze and global temperatures rise, climate scientists link them to intense fossil fuel emissions. While people across the nation brace for another record-breaking summer season and wonder how much worse things can get, the fossil fuel industry continues to wreak havoc on our political system and our planet. With each passing day, fossil fuel companies rack up obscene profits to line their pockets. Instead of doing the right thing and taking the steps necessary to actually transition our economy off of fossil fuels, they invest those profits — in campaign contributions to leaders on both sides of the aisle, on lobbyists whose sole job is to convince elected leaders to vote for legislation that prioritizes them over their constituents, and, of course, in continuing to expand fossil fuel infrastructure to squeeze out every drop of oil and gas in every nook and cranny. What’s more, they spend millions of dollars every year on deceiving the public into thinking that they are responsible corporate citizens offering a necessary service while working hard to make themselves look as clean and green as possible. They know as well as any of us that this cannot last forever. One day enough people will realize what they’re doing, why they’re doing it, and how much they’re lying about it. We need to do everything that we can to make sure that that day happens sooner than later. We cannot sit idly by as the fossil fuel industry spends millions of dollars to strengthen their influence on our political system. We need to elect climate champions unafraid to speak out against Big Oil’s atrocities and do everything in their power to protect our future, but we cannot do it alone. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight to protect our planet, Jane Fonda Climate PAC | | Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. clean_body: Background on FBI agents testifying to Congress about FBI politicization [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] F.B.I. Revokes Security Clearances of 3 Agents Over Jan. 6 Issues [] Source: The New York Times [] The Federal Bureau of Investigation has revoked the security clearances of three agents who either took part in the riot at the Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, or later expressed views about it that placed into question their “allegiance to the United States,” the bureau said on Wednesday in a letter to congressional investigators. At least two of the three agents are scheduled to testify on Thursday to a House panel investigating what Republicans contend is the “weaponization” of federal agencies against conservatives. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2023-01-10 Judicial Watch’s Guide to Congressional Investigations [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Republican staff on the House Judiciary Committee released a “road map” to the new investigative agenda. According to the roadmap, the FBI “is pressuring agents to reclassify cases as domestic violent extremism (DVE)” and allegedly “manufacturing DVE cases where they may not otherwise exist and even manipulating its case categorization system to feign a national problem.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2023-05-15 Decorated Veteran and FBI Analyst Whistleblower to Testify at House Judiciary ‘Hearing [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Marcus Allen, a decorated veteran, FBI analyst and client of Judicial Watch, will provide testimony on Thursday, May 18, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. to a House Judiciary Committee’s Select Subcommittee hearing titled “Hearing on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.” Judicial Watch represents Allen in a lawsuit against FBI Director Christopher Wray for violating Allen’s constitutional rights by falsely accusing him of holding “conspiratorial views,” stripping his security clearance, and suspending him from duty without pay [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2021-12-01 DOJ & FBI Target Biden Political Opponents [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton: The indictment of Steve Bannon is part of a larger agenda to use the events of January 6 as “a vehicle to criminalize the speech of those that oppose the Biden agenda, who question issues about the election and just generally are Trump supporters.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2023, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

I’m working across the aisle to deliver for American families.
Peter –
The negotiations around the debt ceiling continue to stall as the risk of default gets closer and closer. If the GOP gets their way, they’ll cut programs that American families depend on for survival. My Democratic colleagues and I are working to ensure that the people we represent are not left behind.

We must take action. What we’re seeing from Congressional Republicans is unacceptable , and I‘ll continue to work to deliver on the values that matter most to the folks I represent.

name: Senator Katie Britt
subject: Honoring those who served
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
This month, and every month | | |
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=a6f78a971bae4d68985adb0964926202&_e=fYRdFNaWfCxv0xZxbfb-9607u94Ev2CPv4C0434csCVmaYyC74vpdfgDen1Kd_zqG11NTTlMUz855S6LzTpsJKSm4RgTi9KwUCDnXOn4p-ewzcYPSiXP5kKod0FAhUKP77VNWG-FwHjPuotDY0xRyqHBz3cuFE5EjaFwuqTjeEZczfiX1ke0ItXwSlmyJ5COzTySd1SokmsAZCcHd5HmktkQS5VBJH2RQFmLMCVx5FNz8VCOJ-woqH9hteeOA0uL1OJGznYeGSiNhT3qhcjy05ihX12o01_qrykw15TvkFs5h9qQ3dc-vL-QHu_YVKnqQh3LWmPFkJerFe90JaE2DYBYTZWkmL_q2HdHvqR614elTmD3lahUpCGQOEG3JTSKy6eArZ-krUaRTnRcjrd55EG-AQCryE_rqQLrlkBiGs68sRwNeUnJoc0rHhW6axJG)
---
Peter, This Military Appreciation Month, I’ve been spending time reflecting on my eternal gratitude toward all who have honorably served in our nation’s armed forces. Because of these brave men and women, we can go to sleep every night knowing that our families will be safe. **This month, we recognize everyone who has served in the U.S. Armed Forces. We appreciate and admire their sacrifices and their service to this nation.** From the American Revolution to World War II to the present day, American soldiers, guardians, sailors, airmen, marines, and the members of our Coast Guard always answer the call to bravely defend the rights and privileges we are afforded as Americans. Without them, the free country we know today would not exist. Growing up in Enterprise, Alabama, right outside the gates of Fort Rucker, I witnessed firsthand the sacrifices made not only by our military men and women, but also by the members of their families. Sitting next to classmates whose parents were serving overseas, some of whom never made it back home, made the true gravity of their service all the more real to me. Our service members deserve nothing less than the best we can give them. As Alabama’s Senator, I’m doing everything I can to not only ensure the U.S. can maintain the strongest, most well-equipped, resourced, and trained military on Earth, but also to ensure that the men and women who serve are treated like the heroes they are when they return home. This month, and every month, I encourage everyone to reflect on the sacrifice of our military service members; those who put their lives on the line every day to ensure that we can continue to live in peace. We may not know them all, but we owe them all. To the brave men & women fighting to keep our country safe, and their families: **_from the bottom of my heart, thank you_** _._ Can you join me in thanking the brave men and women of our military for their service? [**Sign our card to show your appreciation!**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=a6f78a971bae4d68985adb0964926202&_e=fYRdFNaWfCxv0xZxbfb-9607u94Ev2CPv4C0434csCVmaYyC74vpdfgDen1Kd_zqG11NTTlMUz855S6LzTpsJKSm4RgTi9KwUCDnXOn4p-ewzcYPSiXP5kKod0FAhUKP77VNWG-FwHjPuotDY0xRyqHBz3cuFE5EjaFwuqTjeEZczfiX1ke0ItXwSlmyJ5COzTySd1SokmsAZCcHd5HmktkQS5VBJH2RQFmLMCVx5FNz8VCOJ-woqH9hteeOA0uL1OJGznYeGSiNhT3qhcjy0wOERCkLmiJYMFNhJV6ouC7M83npSZif_h6BExlzSWpa_-2oqQZQtD5wTG5kGWglh_E_IQCXyzUZyMGdNqi6T6HUbN5zXBBv-aCXOqicttYY0E2ZE82pmUrOV1xrVxHUt_etRCJcnHmze7B8NmMUOGM0b__ImgmDcWDnJwNA2UEr) Sincerely,
---

clean_body: I’m personally asking | = Folks, it’s Colin Allred, running for Senate in Texas. I'm writing to ask you to chip in $10 to help me defeat Ted Cruz and expand our Democratic Senate majority, but first, I want to explain why this is so important. I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz because, as a fourth-generation Texan, I know our state deserves better. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz — when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. And only with you on my team will we have a real chance to win this thing. But here's the problem: Ted Cruz's mega-donor allies are set to funnel millions into his campaign to keep Texas red — and he's already launching attacks against me. It might not seem like much, but your $10 will make a huge difference in our ability to fight back and win. Because I believe elected officials should serve their voters, not special-interest lobbyists, I'm truly relying on your grassroots support. Just in the short time since I launched my campaign, experts at Cook Political report increased our chances of flipping this seat — and we've got to take advantage of this momentum. That's why I'm personally asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and Tina Smith will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This is what a grassroots movement is all about: thousands of people just like you feeling inspired to join this fight and giving whatever you can, whenever you can. I'm humbled to have your support. – Colin Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

| **The AZ GOP Senate Majority Leader wants to restrict the use of voting machines!**
The Arizona State Senate Majority Leader just declared that counties across the state are restricted from using machines to count ballots.

**_State and county leaders are coming out in droves to denounce this move – which is a blatant attack on our democracy and one he has no right or authority to make._**

This is just the latest in a long line of moves by far-right politicians who seek to interfere with Arizona elections. We need you to know that the AZ GOP has not slowed down in their efforts to restrict voting access, __and they will not stop anytime soon.__

That is why it is critical we have your support in these upcoming months.

name: Mark Takano
subject: cuts, cuts, and more cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
not on my watch

| Peter, I wanted to give a quick update on Kevin McCarthy’s war on Americans.

As the debt ceiling deadline approaches, **House Republicans continue to threaten us with _spending cuts for veterans, housing, social safety nets, and more._**

With the deadline just a week away, things are escalating but I want you to know I am not backing down.

I am continuing my work for the American people while also speaking up against House Republicans' despicable cuts to working families.

name: Nancy Mace
subject: Not for sale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress
body:
We can’t let the Left buy back this seat – the Lowcountry is not for sale! | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=985016fa1fdb4e82a78875235c39b0ed&_t=a9SRe5vxGrsqaFg0ODJpFZZFArMIt-Whtr7oozNamOndSKVt5S_4UVQ045M0_m55jfiNbbR7TJ3LoJ9JbGfFpPorot8L83n8BleGJ616smk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=985016fa1fdb4e82a78875235c39b0ed&_t=a9SRe5vxGrsqaFg0ODJpFZZFArMIt-Whtr7oozNamOndSKVt5S_4UVQ045M0_m55jfiNbbR7TJ3LoJ9JbGfFpPorot8L83n8BleGJ616smk%3D) [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=985016fa1fdb4e82a78875235c39b0ed&_e=H63KCxZvTDCuOu_NffM0aEdvijrtDU0IBvp2fzdbOrhCsaKO4bSuepazV4gKxuyLjFiCO0SE3XRdAjFYvH_U94Rvjsbe6GHZwisQxXi98ep8Qh09U7b3jf2rmqExlbq2fzSY3rq0hW-s1yl8NJ-clPselC5v0e4g7vaWEQVCt86vz-2HFEquRvg7fiP2gY7IqRVlABbsRSQd2no9PVypcjDEBKBpK3LRwbxN8AGYmgCj4lJS_6jTbHj5SJaBDe3eoKtcr32mHk_jc3W33A_t_SrLsk8LbuUJkHm-OWpy0thOoa4Xm_xvpGWNZg8lUySe5QzE-SCvCfHzWlSdwNUBmAjlxE3GyZCCyfFqJ5hJKw71X6azo908XdQb5QwOz_mBtE0dQInU7kOuaNRxbiG2gywHUHsKsa6YrKRqeKQsS5Q%3D)
---
Fellow American, it’s Nancy Mace (the high school drop-out got her start as a Waffle House Waitress). [**I need a quick moment of your time.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=985016fa1fdb4e82a78875235c39b0ed&_e=H63KCxZvTDCuOu_NffM0aEdvijrtDU0IBvp2fzdbOrhCsaKO4bSuepazV4gKxuyLjFiCO0SE3XRdAjFYvH_U94Rvjsbe6GHZwisQxXi98ep8Qh09U7b3jf2rmqExlbq2fzSY3rq0hW-s1yl8NJ-clPselC5v0e4g7vaWEQVCt86vz-2HFEquRvg7fiP2gY7IqRVlABbsRSQd2no9PVypcjDEBKBpK3LRwbxN8AGYmgCj4lJS_6jTbHj5SJaBDe3eoKtcr32mHk_jc3W33A_t_alBGflbMqyKPod1LvBUxVNXbDB03nMKIy1vIMCazbVBTc_G9KpUn9iDDZKRPwBJyKoXTzaekFsQwWnEj3mbAuxqRNnByb_ko1q8kZaIswWT4jF6YoG3SoGV02mb689kHoJWgRwC1Jlhp_-XepKNofI%3D)

**The short version:**
I’m up against the clock on my fundraising goal and will miss it unless you take action immediately. Remember, I’m running in a district we barely flipped in 2020, and fighting tooth and nail to keep in red. [**I need to know if I can count on you to help in the next 15 minutes.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=985016fa1fdb4e82a78875235c39b0ed&_e=H63KCxZvTDCuOu_NffM0aEdvijrtDU0IBvp2fzdbOrhCsaKO4bSuepazV4gKxuyLjFiCO0SE3XRdAjFYvH_U94Rvjsbe6GHZwisQxXi98ep8Qh09U7b3jf2rmqExlbq2fzSY3rq0hW-s1yl8NJ-clPselC5v0e4g7vaWEQVCt86vz-2HFEquRvg7fiP2gY7IqRVlABbsRSQd2no9PVypcjDEBKBpK3LRwbxN8AGYmgCj4lJS_6jTbHj5SJaBDe3eoKtcr32mHk_jc3W33A_t_dC8N4pBdOZl3fbvD5Fi3SF-e1Qdey07MYWci1UiusidsoRINZoAESBLOf_lFW6ijByxLzEUsWT17rQkHriQI_zPjli0D6ygQ9YmG66BJGDiFN-AVGBeJGbRJjgzDWMABiWhMRzhXFW-ppvhwKtQ3Fc%3D)

**The long version:**
This is what I didn’t want to have to send you, Fellow American. I know how bad things are right now. People are struggling to afford rent, buy groceries, and fill up their tank at the gas pump.

I’ve been there. Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck. At 17 years old, I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table.

I didn’t grow up with millions in the bank, and a silver spoon in my mouth. My dad was an Army General and my mom a schoolteacher. My parents taught me the key to success, **work**. And working is what I’ve been doing since I was 17.

Congress is in desperate need of someone to come in and shake things up – someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. _Someone who knows what it’s like to earn a living and make sacrifices._

So now you see why I had to email you today and ask for your immediate support. [**My fundraising deadline is coming up quickly and I’m behind. The short version: I’m up against the clock on my fundraising goal and will miss it unless you take action immediately. Remember, I’m running in a district we barely flipped in 2020, and fighting tooth and nail to keep in red. The long version: This is what I didn’t want to have to send you, Fellow American. I know how bad things are right now. People are struggling to afford rent, buy groceries, and fill up their tank at the gas pump. I’ve been there. Like a lot of Americans, I struggled to make ends meet, living paycheck to paycheck. At 17 years old, I dropped out of high school and started waitressing at the local Waffle House to put food on the table. I didn’t grow up with millions in the bank, and a silver spoon in my mouth. My dad was an Army General and my mom a schoolteacher. My parents taught me the key to success, work. And working is what I’ve been doing since I was 17. Congress is in desperate need of someone to come in and shake things up – someone who understands having to make the choice between gas or groceries because you only have enough dollar bills in your wallet to cover one or the other. body:
With a vote of 195-190, the House took one of the most drastic actions possible to defeat a bill. This means that for the foreseeable future, parents | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/citizensalliancenh.org/thank-you-for-signing-the-pledge-9248494?e=8c8e704ee6)
---
[](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=aeb70a9e9d&e=8c8e704ee6)
Peter,
**We at Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire** are disappointed with the House’s decision to "indefinitely postpone" the crucial Parental Bill of Rights, and we are actively seeking candidates to clean House in 2024. We need to reinforce our House with more champions for families across the Granite State.

_**With a vote of 195-190, the House took one of the most drastic actions possible to defeat a bill.**_

This means that for the foreseeable future, parents will continue to face an alarming lack of transparency and understanding about what goes on within our schools—the very institutions entrusted with the education and well-being of our children.
[](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=88d7ef3fc1&e=8c8e704ee6)
| [CHIP IN $50 OR MORE TO RECRUIT PRINCIPLED LEADERS TO REPRESENT US IN CONCORD >>>](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=d1e17c926e&e=8c8e704ee6)
---
**The Parental Bill of Rights sought to ensure that parents possess the necessary tools to actively engage in their children's education and protect their rights.**

This Bill promoted transparency and open communication between parents and schools. By keeping parents informed about significant aspects of their children's lives, we will foster a supportive and understanding environment for everyone involved.
**The refusal to pass the Parental Bill of Rights sends a distressing message to parents across New Hampshire: that their voices and concerns are not being heard. Join Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire today and help us recruit leaders who will represent our voices in Concord.

**[**Donate $20 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate ANY amount today >>>**](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=7abb2e2da0&e=8c8e704ee6)
Remember, change begins with us — the concerned citizens who refuse to accept the status quo. Let us unite, fight for our values, and ensure that parents have a seat at the table when it comes to their children's education.

Thank you for your unwavering commitment to the principles we hold dear. Together, we can build a better future for our children and our great state of New Hampshire.
[**Can we count on your support?**](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=f13fa06b60&e=8c8e704ee6)
[](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=2bc4db141d&e=8c8e704ee6)
Daniel Gray
Executive Director
Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire
| | | | [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=af09f70b14&e=8c8e704ee6)| [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=c718c6f7a8&e=8c8e704ee6)| [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=14314ad9bf&e=8c8e704ee6)

Friend, let's play a little game.

**_I 'm going to share some song lyrics, and you tell me what song it is. Here goes:_**

_ "O say, can you see by the dawn's early light
What so proudly we hailed at the twilight's last gleaming
Whose broad stripes and bright stars, through the perilous fight
O'er the ramparts we watched, were so gallantly streaming?" _

**I 'm sure you guessed it - the Star Spangled Banner.** And, I'm sure you know that because you grew up hearing it at baseball games, at football games, at July 4th cookouts, and in your grade school.

What scares me is the idea that thousands of kids across America might not recognize it so quickly.

The Left is **CONSTANTLY** working to attack our conservative values, and they don't stop their games at the schoolhouse door; no, they attack our kids too - in their curriculum, in their traditions, and in their teachings.

**_I want an America that knows its history, remembers its history, and learns from its history to become a better Union._**

name: S. Brown
subject: give me a moment to explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63722541/407768609/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk231-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzViYTQ0Mi1iZWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1rvX5IJUOzhK4mVEO7ngaTm_cRzmEj-WBEGVWiYRU-U=)Hi friend – before I ask you to chip in to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue, I need to take a moment to explain why I'm in this fight and what your grassroots contribution would mean today. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter. **I’ll be honest with you, friend:** The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. Over the years, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.
**Every day in the Senate, I'm fighting for _you._ B****ut I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win.** **[Will you chip in $5 or more now – before our midnight fundraising deadline – so I can keep up the fight in Ohio and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63722542/407768610/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk231-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzViYTQ0Mi1iZWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1rvX5IJUOzhK4mVEO7ngaTm_cRzmEj-WBEGVWiYRU-U=)**

Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at _Politico_ say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year’s Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and _NBC News_ reports this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
**That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking: **

**[Will you please rush $5 now – or any amount that's meaningful to you – to help us hit our $25,000 goal, power our reelection campaign to victory, and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63722543/407768611/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk231-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzViYTQ0Mi1iZWY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1rvX5IJUOzhK4mVEO7ngaTm_cRzmEj-WBEGVWiYRU-U=)**
This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team.

With gratitude,

Sherrod

clean_body: I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. | | | friend – before I ask you to chip in to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue, I need to take a moment to explain why I'm in this fight and what your grassroots contribution would mean today. I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. I spent summers working on my family's farm. Today, I live in Cleveland with my wife, Connie, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter. I’ll be honest with you, friend: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. Over the years, we've seen manufacturing jobs shipped overseas because of bad trade deals, prices skyrocketing as wages failed to keep up, and hopes for a comfortable retirement dashed. That's why I've devoted my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the idea that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do. Every day in the Senate, I'm fighting for you. But I’m facing my toughest race yet, and I need your help to win. = Right now, Mitch McConnell and the GOP need to flip only two seats to retake Senate control – and experts at Politico say it could all come down to Ohio. Last year’s Senate race here was one of the most costly in the nation, and NBC News reports this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.” That's why I simply cannot win this race – and Democrats simply cannot hold on to our narrow Senate majority – without grassroots support from folks like you. As one of the most vulnerable senators in the country, I'm personally asking: = This is gonna be a heck of a fight, but with you by my side, I know we can beat the odds and continue making much-needed progress for workers and families. Thanks for being on our team. With gratitude, Sherrod | | = Please read on for a personal message from Sen. name: Colin Allred
subject: this is why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
It’s game time, Texas

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63722694/407769166/-639893888?amount=10&refcode=RTFC_20230523_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjJmYWNhOC1iZmY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZiL6n1qFZAynBWAGlO7oEg7FpsLCk-RHRPirIPJsus=) Hi Peter, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short.
1. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation.
2. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and not for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first.
3. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them.

**If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking:** [Will you please split $10 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Ritchie Torres' campaign to raise $50,000 before midnight? Every dollar helps as we work to unseat Ted Cruz, protect the Senate and build a better future for our families. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63722695/407769167/-639893888?amount=10&refcode=RTFC_20230523_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjJmYWNhOC1iZmY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZiL6n1qFZAynBWAGlO7oEg7FpsLCk-RHRPirIPJsus=) | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63722696/407769168/-639893888?amount=10&refcode=RTFC_20230523_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZjJmYWNhOC1iZmY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vZiL6n1qFZAynBWAGlO7oEg7FpsLCk-RHRPirIPJsus=)

Colin Allred

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Colin Allred
subject: this is why I'm running to defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Francisco Aguilar [https://secure
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-2021-footer?refcode=emailheader&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052323_b2_colin-split_30ac&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052323_b2_colin-split_30ac&amount=10]
Hi, friend, I wanted to tell you why I'm running for Senate, but I know you're busy, so I'll keep this short.
1. As a father, I'm running to build a better world for my kids and yours, to create more opportunities for them and their peers to succeed and to ensure our country lives up to its promises for the next generation.
2. As a Texan, I've watched Ted Cruz fail our state for more than a decade, doing what's best for Ted Cruz and not for Texas families. I'm running to be a voice for Texans in the Senate, and I promise to always put you first.
3. As a civil rights attorney, I'm running to defend our fundamental rights. Ted Cruz and his allies are waging an all-out war on our right to vote, which is the basis for all other rights. Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best hope of stopping them.
If you're with me in this fight, I'm humbly asking: Will you please split $5 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and DASS PAC to raise $50,000 before midnight? Every dollar helps as we work to unseat Ted Cruz, protect the Senate and build a better future for our families. → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-allred-split-may23?refcode=em_fr_052323_b2_colin-split_30ac&amount=10]

Colin Allred

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: My commencement address to the Wellesley Class of 2023
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=052323 [secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=052323] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Friend,
This past weekend, I delivered the commencement address at Wellesley College. It was an honor to stand before my alma mater and share some words of advice with the outstanding graduating class of 2023.
As someone who sat in their place 24 years ago, I remember graduating with a sense of hope and uncertainty. I was on my way to Montgomery, Alabama, where I was beginning my career investigating hate groups and hate crimes with the Southern Poverty Law Center.
My hope came from my belief that I was embarking on a career of public service where I could help fight for a more just and equal world. But at the same time, I was leaving the comfort of my university and my friends, and charting a new and uncertain future.
Today, we still live in hopeful and uncertain times. Democracy unequivocally won at the ballot box in 2020 and 2022. But the same anti-democratic forces that we defeated still exist in our political system. That means we have more work to do in 2024 and in beyond to secure the future of our democracy.
Speaking with the Wellesley graduates was another reminder that our future is bright and full of great young leaders. Yes, we live in uncertain times. But the goal of my speech was to leave the graduating class with a sense of hope towards the future. After all, we need their help in shaping it. Take a moment below and read my full remarks - let me know what you think. [https://www.wellesley.edu/events/commencement/archives/2023/commencementaddress]
https://www.wellesley.edu/events/commencement/archives/2023/commencementaddress [https://www.wellesley.edu/events/commencement/archives/2023/commencementaddress]
Onward,
Jocelyn
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

| Folks,

I didn’t come to Congress for personal profit or to get involved in partisan drama – I came to be an unwavering advocate for West Michiganders. In my first term in Congress I’ve done just that, fighting every day for the issues that my constituents tell me matter most. That includes: **🟠** Ending the gun violence epidemic
**🌎 **Combating climate change
**🌊 **Protecting our great lakes
**🏥 **Defending reproductive rights While I am so proud of what we’ve accomplished, I also know that our problems cannot be solved in a single term – that’s why I’m asking for your support as I lay a strong foundation for my 2024 re-election campaign.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lauren=20Boebert?=
subject: One thing after another
body:
| | | | | [](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=962a21e1ac&e=84ee529f47)
---
Peter,
At the end of March – the first quarterly deadline of the year – we really turned on the jets and finished the quarter strong. And I have you to thank for that. I asked you for your support – and you came through.

I sincerely appreciate all of your help.

As you can see below, we’re going to need every donation we can get, so I am not going to be shy about asking for your help.
[](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=5c7f424109&e=84ee529f47)
We’re finding ourselves almost a million behind Aspen Adam, and the liberal Democrats have committed millions upon millions of dollars to target my district.

They want me out, and they want it bad.

The only way that we will stop them is if grassroots conservatives like you, come together to say NO to their radical woke money.

[**So as we face our May Mid-Month deadline, can I ask you to chip in a quick donation to help us get back some momentum?**](https://americanvictory2024.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0631e376515e4dcd945c8fba9&id=316fb3891d&e=84ee529f47)
Thank you so much for fighting for conservative values!

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, At the end of March – the first quarterly deadline of the year – we really turned on the jets and finished the quarter strong. And I have you to thank for that. I asked you for your support – and you came through. I sincerely appreciate all of your help. As you can see below, we’re going to need every donation we can get, so I am not going to be shy about asking for your help. We’re finding ourselves almost a million behind Aspen Adam, and the liberal Democrats have committed millions upon millions of dollars to target my district. They want me out, and they want it bad. The only way that we will stop them is if grassroots conservatives like you, come together to say NO to their radical woke money. Thank you so much for fighting for conservative values! | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Victory 2024. All rights reserved.

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: There are millions on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63723052/407770727/-798746786?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlNjM3ZTY3LWMzZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sQNqyKevPPNuBwUltcobsULAlKYbQB0HdtGvlzLpKDw=&emci=7fc57e8e-bdf9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e637e67-c3f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Hi Peter, We’re now at week 3 of the Republican-led Senate walkout, and earlier today, Senate Republican leader Tim Knopp announced that the Republican senators participating in the walkout will return on the last day of session–just to pass what they want. They are going against the will and interests of Oregonians for their personal agenda, and that is not acceptable. [**If you have a Republican state senator, will you write to them today urging them to return to work and do their jobs? And if you have a Democratic state senator, urge them to stay strong and get these climate action bills across the finish line.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63723053/407770728/-798746786?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlNjM3ZTY3LWMzZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sQNqyKevPPNuBwUltcobsULAlKYbQB0HdtGvlzLpKDw=&emci=7fc57e8e-bdf9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e637e67-c3f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) **Because Oregon can’t wait.** In Portland, we’re living through [a record-breaking May](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63723054/407770729/1600763953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlNjM3ZTY3LWMzZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sQNqyKevPPNuBwUltcobsULAlKYbQB0HdtGvlzLpKDw=&emci=7fc57e8e-bdf9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e637e67-c3f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) right now. This month, we experienced the most days above 90 degrees compared to other Mays, and it’s following one of the coldest Aprils on record. In [central](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63723055/407770730/1940607625?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlNjM3ZTY3LWMzZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sQNqyKevPPNuBwUltcobsULAlKYbQB0HdtGvlzLpKDw=&emci=7fc57e8e-bdf9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e637e67-c3f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) and [eastern](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63723056/407770731/2019910268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlNjM3ZTY3LWMzZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sQNqyKevPPNuBwUltcobsULAlKYbQB0HdtGvlzLpKDw=&emci=7fc57e8e-bdf9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e637e67-c3f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Oregon, we’ve been living with drought conditions for years. In January, Crook County declared yet another drought emergency. We all know that extreme and abnormal temperatures are a telltale sign of climate change. We’ve been experiencing it for years. We’ve also seen the insane wildfires devour our homes and land throughout the state. **Some of our lawmakers have worked tirelessly this session to help us fight against climate harms and pass bold climate action bills** , such as the Resilient, Efficient Buildings package (SB 868-871). These bills would help Oregonians access heat pumps for efficient heating and cooling. **And, they would set us up to bring our home state millions of federal dollars** available through President Biden’s Affordable Clean Energy Plan. **The Republican-led Senate walkout is jeopardizing all of this work** and hurting Oregonians, including their constituents. **Every day they spend receiving a paid vacation diminishes our chances of securing federal funding--millions of dollars--that would help us fight climate change and better protect the people of Oregon from its devastating impacts.[We can’t wait for climate action.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63723057/407770732/-798746786?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlNjM3ZTY3LWMzZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sQNqyKevPPNuBwUltcobsULAlKYbQB0HdtGvlzLpKDw=&emci=7fc57e8e-bdf9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e637e67-c3f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** There’s too much on the line: lives have been lost, our water supply is dwindling, and we’re about to wave goodbye to millions of federal dollars up for grabs. All because some Republican senators decided to walk out on their jobs. [**Write to your state senator today urging them to do everything they can, whether that’s coming back to work to do their jobs or staying strong against demands. We cannot wait another day.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63723058/407770733/-798746786?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdlNjM3ZTY3LWMzZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sQNqyKevPPNuBwUltcobsULAlKYbQB0HdtGvlzLpKDw=&emci=7fc57e8e-bdf9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e637e67-c3f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) In partnership, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

name: Pat Ryan
subject: Winning in New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_pryan?amounts=5,25,50,100,250 [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_pryan?amounts=5,25,50,100,250] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Team —
My name is Pat Ryan, and I have the tremendous honor of representing New York’s Hudson Valley in Congress. I attended West Point (located here in my district!), where I learned the values of duty, honor, and country.
I first swore an oath to defend this country from all enemies — foreign and domestic — at West Point nearly 20 years ago. I fought to protect freedom abroad; now, I am fighting every day to protect it at home.
For me, freedom isn’t a political bargaining chip or a cheap slogan. It’s the guiding principle of our nation and a set of ideals I risked my life to defend.
Like a woman’s right to control her own body without government interference. Or a child’s right to go to school without the fear of being hit by a stray bullet. Or every American’s right to breathe clean air or to drink clean water.
I’m fighting every single day to protect our freedoms in Congress, and today, I’m hoping you will chip in $5 or more to Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign so we can keep up the hard work to protect our freedoms. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_pryan?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Pat Ryan and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_pryan?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_pryan?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_pryan?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_pryan?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Last year, we proved pundits and pollsters wrong by winning a competitive special election in August that few thoughts a Democrat could win. Then, we proved them wrong again by winning a toss-up race in November. We did it because we pulled no punches, met voters where they were, and spoke plainly about the issues that matter. We spoke about freedom.
Now, we need to win back the Democratic House majority, and there’s no place more important in that task than New York. There are six districts in New York held by Republicans that voted for Biden in 2020 — now, it’s mission-critical to flip these seats blue and hold onto my toss-up seat.
Your support now will set us up for success for years to come. Building a sustainable, high-performing campaign in New York and beyond takes a lot of resources, and early investment is important. That’s why I’m asking:
Please , can I count on you to pitch to me and Kirsten Gillibrand and keep up the good fight for freedom, for New York, and for our country? [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_pryan?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Yours in service,
Pat Ryan
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]

name: Fair Fight
subject: Get in! We’re going to Nevada. 🚗
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
Our mission of protecting the freedom to vote for all eligible voters goes beyond a single county, city, or state. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/63723195/407771274/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230523_f_roadtrip2_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDYwYzk0NC1jNGY5LWVkMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=STP9RglKzFo1tzCXJBLldHSgNoqCpYUlkTI1ySsMqmg=&emci=5941db1b-b2f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=7d60c944-c4f9-ed11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | 📍⛰️🚗 Today on our Voting Rights Road Trip, we’re making a stop in Nevada! Nevada isn’t just home to sweeping mountain ranges and the largest gold-mining operation in the U.S. — it’s also a national hub for the labor organizing movement, led by Latino workers. For decades, union workers have leveraged their voices into progress on wages and working conditions, and ultimately Democratic political power. **And just like in past elections, Nevada is a critical swing state that could determine the balance of power in 2024.** Battle-born voters have shown their collective power in Nevada, and that’s why Republicans are determined to stop them. Despite Democratic control of the Nevada legislature and a pro-voting Democrat as Secretary of State, Republicans have already introduced eight anti-voter bills in 2023 with an eye towards tipping the scales in 2024. Most recently, Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo proposed extreme changes to the state’s election laws to require stricter voter identification and limit the acceptance of mail ballots. Make no mistake: these changes are designed to make voting more difficult, and less accessible, for Nevadans — particularly voters of color. When we see voter suppression in action, we fight back. clean_body: Our mission of protecting the freedom to vote for all eligible voters goes beyond a single county, city, or state. | | | 📍⛰️🚗 Today on our Voting Rights Road Trip, we’re making a stop in Nevada! Nevada isn’t just home to sweeping mountain ranges and the largest gold-mining operation in the U.S. — it’s also a national hub for the labor organizing movement, led by Latino workers. For decades, union workers have leveraged their voices into progress on wages and working conditions, and ultimately Democratic political power. And just like in past elections, Nevada is a critical swing state that could determine the balance of power in 2024. Battle-born voters have shown their collective power in Nevada, and that’s why Republicans are determined to stop them. Despite Democratic control of the Nevada legislature and a pro-voting Democrat as Secretary of State, Republicans have already introduced eight anti-voter bills in 2023 with an eye towards tipping the scales in 2024. Most recently, Republican Gov. Joe Lombardo proposed extreme changes to the state’s election laws to require stricter voter identification and limit the acceptance of mail ballots. Make no mistake: these changes are designed to make voting more difficult, and less accessible, for Nevadans — particularly voters of color. When we see voter suppression in action, we fight back. Peter,

Last week, I launched my 2024 campaign to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District.

Last year, my race ended up being one of the closest races in the entire country. We stunned political experts by outperforming every election forecast in CA-41, and I was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote.

Now, I’m running to finish the job in 2024.

[_**If that’s all you need to hear, I’m asking you to slit a $10 donation to my campaign and Fight for Progress to become a Founding Donor of our effort to flip CA-41. Here’s more about me and why I’m in this race:

After 9/11, I knew I wanted to work in counterterrorism. That led me to the National Security Division of the U.S. Attorney’s Office, where I served as a prosecutor. In recent years, I've seen firsthand that some of the biggest threats we face are right here at home.

More and more, I was handling domestic terrorism cases, many of which involved right-wing extremists who were motivated to do our country harm in the name of a political agenda.

**This type of conspiracy-fueled extremism is a threat to our democracy. We can’t allow it to take root in our politics, let alone the country. We need leaders who will protect our institutions and bring accountability to those who would harm them.**

My opponent Ken Calvert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda in Congress. Calvert, and extremists like him, are willing to do and say whatever it takes to hold power -- even if it means undermining democracy and putting lives at risk.

The stakes are high, and we’re also facing unprecedented challenges in 2024. With Trump back on the ballot -- and control of the House and Senate at stake -- reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, and voting rights all hang in the balance.

**We came closer than anyone expected to flipping this seat in 2022, and I wouldn’t be in this race if I wasn’t confident we could finish the job. But I can’t do this alone:**

[_**Split a $10 donation to me and Fight for Progress today to become a Founding Donor of our campaign. Winning is going to take widespread, grassroots support, and I’m counting on you to be a part of this effort.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/63723322/407771909/395234972?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230523-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjExNTg1OTQ1LWM1ZjktZWQxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rrzfHAoXZ3MZh7nPME7ZtpV_n0a1FC_oQyUrLHCwQwk=)

clean_body: My opponent Ken Calvert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda in Congress. | = Peter, Last week, I launched my 2024 campaign to unseat Ken Calvert in California's 41st Congressional District. Last year, my race ended up being one of the closest races in the entire country. We stunned political experts by outperforming every election forecast in CA-41, and I was the only Democratic challenger in California to win the independent vote. Now, I’m running to finish the job in 2024. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Here’s more about me and why I’m in this race: After 9/11, I knew I wanted to work in counterterrorism. That led me to the National Security Division of the U.S. Attorney’s Office, where I served as a prosecutor. In recent years, I've seen firsthand that some of the biggest threats we face are right here at home. More and more, I was handling domestic terrorism cases, many of which involved right-wing extremists who were motivated to do our country harm in the name of a political agenda. This type of conspiracy-fueled extremism is a threat to our democracy. We can’t allow it to take root in our politics, let alone the country. We need leaders who will protect our institutions and bring accountability to those who would harm them. My opponent Ken Calvert has been one of the worst enablers of the MAGA agenda in Congress. Calvert, and extremists like him, are willing to do and say whatever it takes to hold power -- even if it means undermining democracy and putting lives at risk. The stakes are high, and we’re also facing unprecedented challenges in 2024. With Trump back on the ballot -- and control of the House and Senate at stake -- reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, and voting rights all hang in the balance. We came closer than anyone expected to flipping this seat in 2022, and I wouldn’t be in this race if I wasn’t confident we could finish the job. But I can’t do this alone: = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Will Rollins * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
